evaluations.comment: cool reverb sur la voix, super punchy, rien a dire, super équilibre

Definitively my favourite, for the great combination of subtle vocals and efficient rhythmic section with bouncing but controlled low-end. Very groovy, but still super elegant. A lot of highs and effects, which works great for the style.
De loin la plus équilibrée, la plus punchy où les effets sont assumés et gérés jusqu'au bout. Largeur stéréo enveloppante, équilibre spectral super. J'adore!

Reverb sur le voix au début et les autres voix super. Contraste voix et instru vraiment intéressante

Contraste début et début du refrain super. Peut être pas assez de cuivres sur le début du refrain, mais vraiment bon impact
impression d'un mix qui fait une boule et fonctionne vraiment comme un tout
Bouncy et dynamique, traitement de la voix au début est bien adaptée au caractère. Refrain est vivant et a du relief.

- maybe a little bit too much reverb on the voice : it deletes of the feelings of intimacy with the voice, but it's still ok
- the mix is on the whole punchy and well-balanced
Très rempli mais plus efficace. Un peu trop d'FX....

good movements inside the parts
Large stereo
fits the genre

La reverb sur la voix est à la fois intéressante et dommage. Trop pleine-bande. Elle mériterait peut-être une automation. Je n'aime pas le sentiment de fade-in ou de release de compresseur pour le "refrain". Le traitement des cuivres à la fin est excellent. De manière générale ça groove et ça fonctionne, ça reste le meilleur mix, mais certains points me semblent rédhibitoires pour pouvoir dire qu'il est excellent.

Le mix dans lequel la cohésion entre les instruments est la meilleure, cependant (et c'est lié) la voix part trop dans la réverbe. La voix ne doit pas être plus forte que ça, idem pour les synthés qui le sont un pol trop. Dommage cependant pour les FX qui pourraient plus ressortir.

Voix couplet avec trop de reverb, peu délicat. Un peu trop devant, il l'a faudrait plus "rentrée" dans la rythmique.
Meilleur Refrain jusque présent, ça groove bien, la personne a compris comment marchait l'ensemble des instruments entre eux.
reverb sur les pêches de batterie+synthé bien choisie dans la dernière partie écoutée.

Trop d'effet sur la voix lors du couplet. Stéréo et largeur spectrale rétréci --> impression surtout lors du couplet.
Bonne gestion des effets sur le pont notamment les cuivres même si le fait que ça l'effet à droite me dérange un peu (très personnel). Manque de piste FX lors du pont qui me semble dommage.

La voix n'est pas assez claire, on sent qu'elle a été égalisé, elle se pert dans les effets de la partie instrumentale (réverbe de caisse claire et de synthés)
Le beat est assez réussi, mais les autres éléments se perdent dans des réverbes dont la couleur n'est pas jolie. On sent également un compresseur travailler (et donc "pomper"), c'est un peu trop je trouve. 
Le spectre n'est pas naturel.

Couplet : Reverb sur les voix : plutôt horrible. Je trouve que cela casse complètement l'esprit du couplet, à savoir la proximité de voix chuchotées, l'esprit intimiste et très proche disparait, ce qui est plutôt dommage.

Refrain : niveau correct, équilibres plutôt cohérents mais spectralement, les aigus sont trop présents à mon gout et

spectre bien 

début bien, voix bien et les voix sur le côté la mettent en valeur
ensuite choix assumé de mettre la voix derrière est super avec de la reverb et l'instru devant !
Puis retour de la voix devant avec tous les synthés super

Les basses (synthé) sont un peu fortes, les voix ne sont pas tout à fait dans le même espace que le reste. Le mix de batterie n'est pas défendable mais le parti pris associé est clair. On entend sur la voix une résonance assez désagréable dans le médium. Cependant l'ensemble du mix est plus équilibré que les mixs 2, 3 et 6.
Beaucoup de choses à l'arrière plan, mais esthétique intéressante.

La première chose sur laquelle je clique, c'est mon mix ! Je dois avouer que j'apprécie le bloc basse-kick très bas-mids. Je suis un peu surpris d'entendre des fûts très à l'avant, ceci cela fonctionne mieux que dans l'extrait 6.
L'intro est bonne, le delay sur la voix va bien avec le caractère, mais le refrain n'explose pas assez dans les basses.

Trop de voix dans le refrain même si recherche d'une stéréo assez large grâce au backlead. Un peu trop de basse et de kick dans le refrain à mon goût mais les deux marche très bien ensemble.
On a envie qu'entre couplet et refrain ça éclate plus.  
Effet sur les cuivres du pont très appréciable.

- a predominance of the electro part of the arrangment : bassline, kick, synths. Maybe a bit to much in the mix, but as the vibe of the song is quite electro, it's an interesting and coherent choice
- then it's a kind of "dancefloor" mix
- maybe a lack of high frequencies content (or too much low)
la base rythmique est très réussie (beat + basse), mais pourrait être plus en interaction avec les autres éléments (synthés, wood block), rapport à la voix plutôt réussi.

Couplet : très réussi. Bons équilibres, belle présence des voix, distorsion sur la basse très plaisante. 

Refrain : Equilibres mauvais à mon gout. Voix lead trop derrière, basse trop présente. Spatialisation des cuivres étrange : moins bon que le couplet. synthés trop derrière.
Too much low-end and low-mids, fat sound is fun but for this track it kills the groove, it's too layback.
probleme de plans sonore entre la droite et la gauche, bonne basse, pas assez d'aigu
the bass is too loud

Couplet vraiment pas mal pour les niveaux entre les instruments. Voix backs un peu trop devant qui rend l'aspect un peu trop ridicule et pas "fin".
Refrain synthé basse beaucoup trop devant, ne fais pas groover l'ensemble. La voix "ouhou" devrait être plus devant.
On sent un énorme creux dans le medium (800Hz ? ) pendant le drop, c'est très dérangeant.  Je pense que c'est le mauvais équilibre entre la basse et le reste.
Mix vivant, relief et dynamique. Compressé et attire l'attention dès le début (pas de sous niveau).

Couplet : plutôt réussi, belle présence des voix, équilibres cohérents qui renforcent le groove du couplet.

Refrain : Bons équilibres, claps reverbérés : cela fonctionne très bien. Bon groove. 

Pont : fonctionne bien. On aurait éventuellement apprécié un peu plus de basse

- the mix is punchy and well-balanced
- nice stereo
- to have the better mix, I would try to get a more punchy and fat bassline (like in fragment 1 for example), and maybe add more reverb to the claps
Image large, dynamique bien gérée. C'est un peu mixé comme du minimal, avec peu d'espace, et timbres un peu 1khZ, et manque de voix.
Very cool stereo image, elegant ideas, but the strong part is not contrasting and efficient enough.
trop de graves, trés large, pas assez de choses au centre, mais trés efficae
Super automation sur le pluck. Afterbeat très marqué, ça fonctionne bien. Ça pourrait groover plus sur le refrain.

Un peu trop de kick dans l'ensemble (à quelques dB près). Manque une transition entre refrain et pont plus franche (effet, piste FX etc.)
Bon couplet même si ça manque un peu d'effet.
good balance except claps (too loud)
Beaux effets intéressants et bien gérés. Mais le clap dans le drop est au beaucoup trop sur mixé, c'est vraiment génant, ainsi que les Fx. Punchy.

SD pas assez compressée ? Des fois trop forte, des fois pas assez
Synthé grave pas assez fort à la fin

Début fin fait au début ! avec les petites percus électros qui soutiennent la voix, peut être pas assez d'éléments électro un un peu sales et distordus
Ne claque pas assez du tout sur le début du refrain
Pas assez de réverb sur les voix aigues

Les basses (synthé) ressortent assez peu (manque un léger boost dans les haut-médium?). La voix n'est pas trop forte, est bien intégrée au reste, et le texte est à la limite du compréhensible. Les effets et evénements ponctuels sont mis en valeur, j'aime ça. Pas encore assez innovant an terme d'image stéréo, j'ai un peu l'impression qu'il s'agit d'un mix sage et passe partout, mais sans parti pris. Enfin, l'ensemble est un peu chargé en médiums.

spectre général manque de rondeur, mais un peu trop de haut médium ; très précis cependant dans le haut du spectre (presque trop).
Bon rapport entre voix et instrumental.

Manque de soutien de la rythmique, un peu vide. Les side sticks sont trop devant.
Refrain sympa mais manque de groove encore, CC trop forte qui casse le groove, voix trop derrière.
I like the contrast when the strong part comes in and the groove is cool with nice dry compression (short release), works well for the style. Good levels. Lack subtleties in the vocals, too low-mids.

Couplet : Les équilibres ne me plaisent pas. Manque de basse + kick. Couplet peu vivant. Couleur de la basse plutôt agréable

Refrain : Beaucoup plus fort que le couplet : trop de différence de niveau.
Equilibres cohérents. 
Couleur générale plutôt agréable,

impression voix chuchotée intéressante
voix trop devant au début avec le reste trop en retrait, cependant les voix sur le côté ressortent bien c'est chouette
Ensuite trop d'élément bas du spectre et manque  et des côté de la stéréo, éléments électro pourraient être plus fort
Puis élémetns de synthés pointilllistes pourraient être plus forts
coool, super punchy, manque la basse, un peu trop de 1khz

good balance but lacks low mid
good stereo
a bit static
Grande différence de niveau entre le refrain et l'intro. Pas assez de basses et de kick.
Où sont les basses ? Sinon la musique est là. Dynamique maladroite.

Couplet : Voix un peu trop devant, la rythmique doit venir soutenir la voix, notamment le kick 

Refrain groove plus que les mixs 1 et 2. Idem des instruments devant sans bonne raison

- to me, the mix seems not large enough (piano, brass sounds, etc)
- only the reverb seems to be large
- a lack of low frequencies for the bassline

Prédominance de la voix un peu tout le temps.
Trop de clap dans le refrain, équilibre bass/kick moyen (mérite plus de kick pour donner du punch). Bien qu' il y est une utilisation d'effet sur le pont on a un ensemble un peu vide. On sent des éléments très détachés qui ne font pas corps avec le reste du mix et je trouve ça un peu dommage. 
Recherche de largeur différente entre le couplet et le refrain intéressante.
Manque une assise dans le grave, cependant les synthés qui ont l'harmonie sont mieux intégrés au reste qu'ailleurs. Les contre-temps ne ressort pas assez à mon goût.

Voix est très en retrait. Manque cruellement d'assise harmonique. J'ai l'impression qu'un limiteur ou un compresseur travaille en permanence... très désagréable. Mauvais éléments mis en avants (after beat très violent)
Dynamique vraiment mal maîtrisée... On entend les compresseurs et les fade-ins, surtout aux transitions. Les cuivres à la fin sont percutants et ça marche bien, le reste pas trop...
Aucun grave, percussions trop compressées, le drop est juste horrible : beaucoup de trop de compression, 0 punch, niveau entre les break et le drop est juste pas possible.
Trop sage à l'arrivé du pont, manque d'effet sur voix et cuivres. Manque à peine de voix sur la fin du couplet (intelligibilité)

Pas assez de grave et d'impact grave
le synthé entre le couplet et le refrain est trop fort
Elément électro peut être pas assez assumé
sur refrain effet voix chouette
Un peu "propre" pour le style
Refrain un peu décharné fréquentiellement, alors qu'on attend une explosion sonore. Mais le pont est vivant, les différentes interventions sont dynamiques
bosse à 1kh, la snare bien en avant, efficace, belle reverb', absence de basse

trop d'aigus, sonne très hifi, manque de mids, mais beaucoup d'éléments originaux qui ressortent. Certaines percussions trop au premier plan. Alternative très intéressante, mais l'essence du morceau semble perdue... Ça reste creux et le contraste avec le FX qui sonne lourd est saisissant.
Balance ok but too compressed and too dry, tiring to listen to. The timbres suffer from the compression. Too much mids.
too much highs and harmonic sections not loud enough

Couplet : même remarque que pour le fragment 3 sur les reverb : casse l'esprit du couplet.

Refrain : peu entrainant, équilibres incohérents à mon gout: trop de piano, trop peu de kick & basse. Couleur générale plutot réussie mais gachée par des équilibres douteux

Reverb sur la voix un peu too much, des instruments qui ont un rôle d'ornementation ou de coloration sonore sont devant sans raison.
Refrain manque de groove, ça n'explose pas.
Où est passé le mid et le bas mid dans le refrain ? C'est vide.

- a lack of low frequencies : in my opinion, there's not enough kick and bassline (it's too bad for such a musical style, between swing and electro)

- Erratum : during the second listening, I realized that instead of a lack of low frequencies, there might be too much high frequencies, especially in the drums sounds (snare, clap, crash, percussions, etc)

- in fact, this mix is ok for the beginning of the fragment, but when the drums and brass enter, it doesn't work at all

Manque cruellement de basses, le beat n'est pas assez marqué (dans le bas du spectre). Il y a un élément bizarre (sorte de basse glissante du synthé) qui sort du mix, incongru, pas nécessaire.
Réverbe intéressante sur les voix de côtés, mais qui n'est pas lié au reste du mix.
Spectre général très déséquilibré.
Trop de compression, on ne ressent pas assez les temps forts et le niveau des. Un effet (descente dans les basses) est trop fort, le rendant désagréable.
pas de punch, les contre chants des cuivres dans le sont sur mixées. Mauvais équilibre bass/kick. Niveau entre drop /break ahurissant.

Manque d'effet et de punch. Un peu trop de voix dans le couplet.
Refrain bien dosé. Dans le refrain je n'aime pas trop l'EQ sur la voix, mais pourquoi pas.
Manque un peu de relief, "bounce" pas assez dans les basses.
Vocals too much in front. Too much low-ends, not subtle enough. The main problem, of this mix is the strong part that sounds weaker than the verse, which is due to too much compression.

- the lead voice seems a bit too large in term of spacialization : then it's not really precise and it sometimes makes the mix unclear
- same remark for the old piano sound : the pan looks a bit too radical
- it looks there's a high frequencies filter on the bassline, that's too bad, the bassline looses her "fatty punchy sound"

Début refrain : pas assez d'impact de la caisse claire
                        ne contraste pas assez avec le début en niveau ni en impact

ensuite voix trop forte et pas assez de synthé grave

Au début du grave et de la voix mais manque d'autres éléments

Globalement ne claque pas assez et pourrait exploiter plus le côté stéréo


différence couplet/refrain chouette

Couplet : couleur des voix étrange. manque d'aigu : cela contribue à les éloigner un peu, ce qui est dommage dans ce couplet.
équilibres plutôt cohérents, même si on aurait apprécié un peu plus de pluck et de caisse claire ! On les entends à peine ...

Refrain : la transition avec le couplet marche moyennement bien. On aurait envie que ça explose plus. Equilibres peu réussi, ça ne groove pas, manque de basse et de distorsion sur la basse. très sage. 

Pont : Spacialisation très étrange

Manque d'assise, rapport entre voix et rythmique déséquilibré (un peu trop de voix).
Spectre déséquilibré, trop de haut médium. 
J'ai l'impression que certains éléments sont hors phase.

Esthétique bien marquée sur les couplets, intéressants
Refrain manque complètement de groove, manque quelque chose qui fait la cellule motrice en fond.
Bosse spectrale vers 400hz pas jolie.
The chorus should have more energy compared to the other parts
trop compréssé, pas assez punchy, trop gros filtre, ne marche pas...

Le traitement de la voix est vraiment réussi. Par contre le reste est très très creux, la basse filtrée ne donne pas ce sentiment "club" et surtout ça ne groove pas du tout. Ça ne sonne pas electro, le style du groupe n'a pas été compris.

Les aigus et les contre-temps n'ont pas été assez mis en avant, la voix et assez loin devant tout le reste et n'est pas assez intégré au tout. Les synthés qui ont les accords sont un peu trop riches en haut-médium à mon goût, et pas dans le même espace que le reste
Agressif dans le mauvais sens du terme  : très dur vers 2Hz. Les pêches des cuivres sont sur mixées. On sent le limiteur pendant le drop. 0 groove, clap trop agressif.
Ce serait bien d'entendre autre chose que la voix.
Very good. Guitars are loud enough and well distributed. The vocals are very well eq'ed and have the right processing. Bass and drums are well coupled.
evaluations.original: muito boa, guitarras com a presença correcta e também distribuídas; voz muito bem equalizada e com o processamento adequado, baixo e bateria muito "casados"

evaluations.comment: Vocals could be more present. Drums are well balanced and the keyboards also fit the mix.
evaluations.original: A voz podia estar mais presente. A bateria tem um bom equilibrio e as teclas também encaixam bem na mistura.

evaluations.comment: The vocals could fit in better with the remaining instruments. Nice definition for the different riffs of the verse. Good balance between instruments. The rainstick is too loud. An overall good mix.
evaluations.original: Voz poderia estar mais integrada com os restantes elementos. Boa definição dos diferentes "riffs" no verso. Bom equilibrio entre os diferentes instrumentos. Pau de chuva demasiado atlo. Uma boa mistura na globalidade.

evaluations.comment: The best of the four mixes. Nice balance of the drums and between guitars and bass. Vocals lack proeminence in the chorus (there should have been gain automations)
evaluations.original: A melhor das quatro misturas, bom balanço d abateria, bom balanço entre guitarras e baixos. Falta presença de voz nos refrões (automação de ganhos nessa parte).

evaluations.comment: Best of the lot. The vocal seems ok. The cymbals need to be less bright. The bass is also not good.
The vocal saturation helps the genre but could still have a little bit additional air. The guitar could be brighter.
evaluations.original: Saturação na voz ajuda para o género mas ainda assim poderia ter um pouco mais de ar. Guitarra poderia ter um pouco mais de brilho.

evaluations.comment: Lacks brigthness overall. The stereo image on the drums is a bit confusing.
evaluations.original: Mistura com falta de brilho no geral. A imagem stereo é um pouco confusa na bateria.

evaluations.comment: All elements are too compressed. Hard to hear the drums. Nice presence of the vocals and bass guitar. Excessive reverb and gate that makes the snare sound too mechanic. Nice use of panning in the toms, yet there is not enough low-end and presence in the overheads.
evaluations.original: Elementos demasiadamente comprimidos. Dificuldade de se ouvir a bateria. Boa presença de voz e baixo. Há um excesso de reverb e gate que torna o som ta tarola, muito mecânico. Bom uso de pans nos timbalões da bateria, porém faltam graves e presença dos overheads.

evaluations.comment: Vocals too far away due to the reverberation choice and the poor equalization. Bass without presence. Hammond is to loud in some moments.
evaluations.original: voz muito afastada devido à escolha da reverberação e também pela má equalização, baixo sem presença, hammond alto demais em alguns momentos

evaluations.comment: Vocal seems to be coming out of a car radio... Very mid mix.
The vocal was carefully worked, but the remaining elements are too distant in the mix.
evaluations.original: Voz bem trabalhada mas restantes instrumentos estão demasiado distantes na mistura.

evaluations.comment: Mix is well balanced (more than 2 and 3), but it has some noise at a point in the chorus that makes it sound far worse.
evaluations.original: mistura bem equilibrada (mais do que a 2 e a 3) mas tem ruido num momento do refrão que a torna  muito pior

evaluations.comment: Drums without presence. Guitars are excessively reverby.
evaluations.original: bateria sem presença, guitarras com excesso de reverb

evaluations.comment: Vocal seems a bit boxed.. The Guitars seem out of phase and too much too the right. too much bass

Drums too subdued, lacking in presence of all its elements except for the toms. There is an error in an edit on the hi-hats on the overheads. Excessive vocals. One almost exclusively hears vocals and strings.
evaluations.original: Bateria muito suprimida, falta presença em todas as peças com excessão dos timbalões. Erro no corte dos shocks do overhead. Excesso de voz. Só se ouve cordas e voz.

evaluations.comment: Reverb is too proeminent. The mix looses strength by having too much space.
evaluations.original: reverb demasiado presente. A mistura perde força por ter demasiado espaço.

evaluations.comment: Vocals with too much reverb gets too hidden among the remaining elements. The guitar effect does not help the mix. Too much reverb on the snare drum. Everything sound too distant and strengthless.
evaluations.original: Voz com demasiado reverb fica demasiado escondida entre os restantes elementos. Efeito na guitarra não ajuda a mistura. Demasiado reverb na tarola. Soa tudo muito distante e sem força.

evaluations.comment: Guitars have excessive mid-range. Vocal lacks in presence.
evaluations.original: Guitarras com excesso de médios, voz sem presença

evaluations.comment: Seems like i'm hearing this out of a tape deck.... I need to tilt my head to listen to this one... bad panning..

Excessive presence of the drums, and too much reverb. The drums are too distant and the guitars too near for the same formula. There is not enough brightness on the guitars and vocals. Excessive mid-range in the vocals. There is a lack of gain automation on the vocals. Bass guitar is absent.
evaluations.original: Excesso de presença da bateria e excesso de aplicação de reverbs. Os elementos da bateria se apresentam distantes do campo da música da mesma forma que as guitarras estão demasiadamente presenças pra essa fórmula. falta brilho nas guitarras e nas vozes. Excesso de médios nas vozes. Falta automação de gain nas vozes. Baixo ausente.

evaluations.comment: Similar to track 7 and 5, but not as much space as 7 keeping it more controlled and not as much low end as 5.
best mix, everything sounds good and i think i can hear all the harmonics equally. All the instruments have the same presence
nice.  vocal is framed nicely, though a little harsh sometimes.
pretty good. vocal level good. well balanced. my mix, right?? nice width...
Sib on voice sticks out in a couple spots. Otherwise, very good
Crisp vocal, good dynamics and nice balance, missing some space
Vocals are "mid-rangy", balance seems to work
nice. but vocal slightly too loud
Nice slap delay on the vocal. I like the width and balance.
Brings the vocals out just slightly too much (slightly too much high-frequency content in the voice), otherwise very good
good presence. Sounds like music
this mix could sound more open. Not too bad otherwise.
Nice!  Well placed vocals (maybe a tad too much, but better than the alternative).
Sounds a bit like 6 and 3 with more reverb
Sibilance is distracting, it activates the reverb - voice sits nice in the mix
no solo acoustic guitar, otherwise balanced mix
Vocals do not blend as well with the rest, a bit too loud.
seems ok
This sounds like a good mix, instruments are balanced. The only change is that the singer seems to have a deeper voice than in other mixes
Too mono. Managed to get rid of snare room. Panning has too many holes in it, and too much bunched up in the middle. Voice pretty good.
Too much importance for voice.
vocals are too loud for the mix but it does sound nice otherwise
vocals thin.. drums sound good though!
the vocal is dominant in this sound ,i not fancy with it
too many sound resource are in left sound channel
not a good mix, but the least problems
The voice lacks spatiality
Lots of space and stereo space. Very nice mix. Warmth comes through from the voice very nicely by not having much warmth behind. Again watch some of the drum hits being too strong.
nice balance, perhaps could have a bit more low end
Good
Nice and wide.                   More bass maybe?... Yeah a lot more
Nice balance and definition. Reverbs are working
nice vocal. drums. good guitar reverbs. bass a bit light.
Too much focus on bass.
You made the drum room work! Good mix, smooth tones, good balances. Some things need riding.
good space, vox a bit thin
Similar to 2 but with more energy on the drums, specially on the kick and snare. This is maybe too much
loud vocals comparing to the rest, drums also a bit in the front, but nice mix
Sounds awfully similar to 6
good balance with mixing
sounds good in general, nice & bright.. bit too much drums, bit too little bottom in the vox.
Nice vocal treatment.  Drums a bit strange (roomy, but dry?).  Decently bright, though.
Compression and level of the drumkit is inappropriate for this song. It sounds very rock: loud and aggressive. The mix is decent otherwise.
nice.  good balance, sounds right.
Snare sounds not "inside the head" but coming from behind slightly
Good vocal tone. A bit too boomy when bass drum kicks in.
seems ok
too wide, nice space but perhaps a little too much.
maybe less snare
The 'click' drum in the background is too loud compared to the rest, the guitar seem a bit faint
Drums are a little too loud here and feel separate from the mix too
EPno not mixed, or not compressed enough.
nice bass - snare is harsh and has no body
Horrible rim shot
the sound balance is weird
Good!
Brilliant mix. But a little too much in the mid-end, just some more master bus control. Vocal texture is brilliantly preserved, however sometimes gets a little lost, watch some automation!
Sounds very "private" and intimate due to the large presence and detail of the voice. Fits to the song
Intimate. Good balance.
exactly like 7 but with higher ['graves']
very good, but missing on some dynamics, a bit bottom heavy.
nice panning
sound channel is excellent
I like this one. Can't decide if I prefer this or 6
The guitar feels too present/higher in frequency
vox a bit too far back, need more compression and less guitars
I like the dark mix, but maybe a little more high end somewhere. Some instruments covering vocal sometimes.
Vocals are a bit behind the slide. Vocals should be put a bit more in the front.
the volume of vocal should increase, i do like the instruments should, but the guitar part is too much
seems ok
Nice balance, nice and warm. If the vocal was a little brighter in some parts it would be perfect. And maybe a little more reverb.
Resonance in the voice (low mids), Balance could be better for drums.
Sound of instruments a little low comparing to voice.
slightly dull and dry
good. guitars are juuuuust a little close/distracting during vocal. pretty good otherwise.
guits are nice in the mix - no bass - voice sits well in the mix
super wide guitars. hotter than the rest. vocal too hot? uneven...
not enough drums and also missing high frequencies so it sounds dirty - good mids
pretty good EGtr mix.                                                      OK LD V mix, needs more ambience to somehow make it make sense with the drums.weird choices
nice mix, but loud low frequencies, kick drum could be more present
Weird space, woofy, unbalanced spectrum
Powerful vocal well blended into the mix. Great dynamics and beautiful balance.
good balance, but drums a bit shy
smoother, nice voc and space, sounds like music
Looks like the track 0.

Balance is quite good.  Nice atmosphere, wall-of-sound-like with these guitars and a prominent tambourine. evaluations.comment: A mix which feels natural because of its balance choices, and almost refers to a Neil Young production.  The choice for a (stereo) delay on the vocal is very interesting, but not always equally controlled. Because of this, it sometimes comes across as annoying.  The kick is suggested more than defined, but this works surprisingly well in the whole.  In mono the mix retains a lot of its power,  but the vocals sound quite dry, which compromises the atmosphere a bit.  The attitude in this mix is quite good because of the 'loud' guitars and the direct approach.  The mix sounds a bit nasal,  but due to the good balance choices this could be solved at the mastering stage.
evaluations.original:
Een mix die omwille van zijn balanskeuzes erg natuurlijk aanvoelt, en haast refereert aan een Neil Young-productie.
De keuze voor een (stereo) delay op de stem is erg interessant, maar is niet altijd even gecontroleerd.
Hierdoor komt die soms storend over.
De kick is meer gesuggereerd dan uitgesproken, maar dit werkt verassend goed in het geheel.
in mono behoudt de mix veel van zijn kracht, maar klinken de stemmen wel erg droog, waardoor de sfeer enigszins gecompromittert wordt.
De attitude in deze mix zit zel erg goed omwille van de 'luide' gitaren en de directe beandering.
De mix klinkt wat nasaal, maar owille van de goede balanskeuzes zou dit in de mastering kunnen worden verhoplen.

A bit too much guitar, especially the loud one on the right.  Not enough snare  and too much hi-hat.
evaluations.original: Iets te veel gitaar, vooral die die hard rechts staat, te weinig snare en te veel HH

evaluations.comment: Bit too bright and thin
still separated.
drum，some noise in track，not comfortable
music seemed coarse and false
vocals too thin, out of place, disappear in the music, highs annoying
Too bright, snare sounds like it is clipping at times
A lot of noise is shadowing this mix. It very badly interferes with the distorted guitars and any loud sound really. Sounds very harsh to the ears, not pleasant to listen to.
expect singer voice got some special effect to mix the music better
Rhythm sensation is excellent and EQ is greatly controlled. Sounds very comfortable. I like it most.
The mix is very wide in terms of stereo image.  The voice sits nicely in the mix.  Drums and bass are balanced nicely.  Maybe the guitars should come to the front more.
evaluations.original: De mix is heel breed qua stereobeeld. De stem zit mooi in de mix. Drum en bas zitten mooi in balans. Misschien de gitaren iets meer naar voor laten komen.

evaluations.comment: Punchy, good drum and bass sound. We can hear the acoustic guitar (e.g. hidden in a lot of other mixes). Need more cohesion between the acoustic and electric guitars. A bit less hi-hat. Good width.
A very neat mix, where the genre has been listened to [/considered] well.  It doesn't contain an exaggerated amount of high or low.
evaluations.original:
Een hele nette mix. waar goed naar het genre is geluisterd. er zit niet overdreven veel hoof of laag in. 
de balans tussen gitaren en vocalen zijn in orden. er is genoeg ruimte gelaten voor instrumenten in deze mix.

evaluations.comment: Vocals feel muted and muddy, some clarity missing, more highs needed. Guitars feel nice. Drums are punchy and clean, but sometimes need more power to drive the song.

A bit too much sub low in the bass as well.  Guitar sound quite nice.  Acoustic guitar is too loud though and doesn't do much in this song.  The rest of the guitars are a bit quiet compared to this.  Nice atmosphere,  drums on the loud side though.  Fortunately the drums sound quite good,  especially the snare is nice.
evaluations.original:
-Ook hier teveel sublaag in de bas.
-Gitaren klinken best tof. Akoestische gitaar is wel te luid en die doet niet veel in dit nummer. De rest van de gitaren is wat stil vergeleken ermee.
-Leuk sfeertje, drums iets aan de luide kant wel. Gelukkig klinken die wel goed, vooral die snare is leuk.

evaluations.comment: The kick drum sound is not really my thing,  there is also no link between bass and kick drum, they don't seem to blend.  Otherwise it's cool that the drums are a bit more to the front in the mix,  the percussion is also clearly present, certainly an asset!
evaluations.original:
De basdrum klank is niet echt mijn ding, er is ook geen link tussen de bas en de basdrum, ze blenden niet echt precies.
Verder wel tof dat drums hier wat meer naar voor liggen in de mix, de percussie is ook duidelijk aanwezig, zeker een pluspunt!

evaluations.comment: The voice is too low, the guitar should have a higher volume
thin image, guitar on its own - interesting
Bass is nice and defined in this one. More panning needed

Harsh top end (heard a lot on HH and ride cymbal). The amount of compression applied (too much) squashes the sound. The mix does not have any air to breathe anymore. Vocals sound very thin and don't cut trough. Drums sound very thin as well (this is bad).
I'm missing a little bit of bass.  I quite like the kick in this mix.  It has more attack.  Maybe a bit more guitar at times, I'm missing that one a bit too.  Apart from that I think this is okay.
evaluations.original: Ik mis een klein beetje bas. De kick vind ik wel vrij goed in deze mix. Die bevat meer attack. Misschien af en toe wat meer gitaar, die mis ik ook/. Voor de rest vind ik dit oké.

evaluations.comment: Rather empty in the mid.  The individual instruments sound quite okay,  but I think there may be a bit more guitar maybe or something.  The bass is quite loud as well in the very lows.
evaluations.original:
Best wel leeg in het mid. De individuele instrumenten klinken best wel oké, maar ik denk dat er misschien wat meer
E gitaar in mag ofzo. De bass staat ook vrij luid in het héél laag.

evaluations.comment: Best mix overall
Mix sounds quite empty.  Could have a bit more body.  Not from bass but from other instruments.
evaluations.original: Mix klinkt redelijk leeg. Wat meer body mag wel. Niet via de bass maar via andere instrumenten.

evaluations.comment: hi－hat too over
Not mixed well, I can hear all the sound individually
normal
Bright mix, drums are weak and could use a dose of SSL G-series compression.
A lot of bass,  snare is quite dry.  Vocal is not very bright.
evaluations.original: Veel bas, snare vrij droog. Vocal weinig bright.

evaluations.comment: Something's missing in the song.  It seems like a part of the filling has disappeared.  Bass guitar and drums are fine though.  Guitars could come up more.  The song sounds nicely clear though.
evaluations.original: Er mist iets in de song. Er is precies een deel van de opvulling weg gevallen. Basgitaar en drum zitten wel goed. Er mogen meer gitaren op komen. De song klinkt wel lekker helder.

evaluations.comment: Because of the emphasis of elements in the high, this mix barely has any mid information because of which the whole sounds weak.  Placement of the bass works well,  but [has a lot of space] because all guitars are 'undermixed'.  A mix based more on suggestion than on concrete information.
evaluations.original:
Omwille van de nadruk op elementen in het hoog, heeft deze mix haast geen mid informatie waardoor het geheel zwak klinkt.
Plaatsing van de bas werkt goed, maar krijgt dan ook vrij spel omdat alle gitaren 'ondermixt' zijn.
Een mix die meer op suggestie is gebaseerd dan concrete informatie.

evaluations.comment: Drum sound doesn't quite fit the rest.  Too much attack in the snare.  Maybe this works on a small sound system (PC speakers...)
evaluations.original: Drumsound sluit niet echt aan bij de rest. Teveel attack in de snare. Misschien werkt dit wel goed op een klein afluistersyteem (pc speaker..)

evaluations.comment: A lot of bass.  The vocal could have been a bit more.
evaluations.original: veel bas. de zang had iets meer gemogen

evaluations.comment: thin and boxy and muddy, instruments not really discernible, drums too dry
The guitar on the left is asking too much attention.
evaluations.original: Gitaar die links staat eist te veel aandacht op,

evaluations.comment: The hi hat is harsh
good
singer voice more miscible with music than track 0
better
加强重低音
good depth and spread

The bass has too much sub.  The drums are quite soft as well.  The vocal sounds good but could have a bit more compression  and sound a bit more clear.  Too much hi-hat in the drums.  Guitars sound okay  but could come to the foreground a bit more (clearer / less reverb)
evaluations.original: De bas bezit teveel sub. De drums staan ook redelijk zacht. De zang klinkt wel goed maar mag wel iets meer compressie hebben en nog een beetje helderder klinken. Teveel hihat in de drums. Gitaren klinken wel goed maar mogen misschien iets meer naar de voorgrond komen (helderder/minder reverb).

evaluations.comment: In the low mids something 'sticks' apparently, a bit annoying/disturbing.  Can't immediately point to the source of that, might it be an acoustic guitar?  Beyond this the mix sounds very spacious,  certainly a fun mix.  The hi-hat may be a bit out of balance with the rest of the drums as well.
evaluations.original:
In het laag-mid is er ergens iets dat wat blijft hangen precies, dat stoort wel een beetje.
Kan de bron ervan niet onmiddellijk benoemen, kan het een akoestische gitaar zijn?
Verder klinkt de mix heel ruimtelijk, zeker een toffe mix.
De hihat is misschien ook wat uit balans met de rest van de drum.

evaluations.comment: The BGM of this mixing is not well-arranged at the beginning but when gradually entering its own rhythm, it sounds better.
lacks mids and too much bass for the style, but ok atmosphere and vocals nice

Similar to track 3 but more energy throughout. Feels more produced than track 3. Chorus gets a bit messy but the balance throughout is quite nice. Drums too muted and dull, get so lost in the chorus that there is just a sudden drop in energy at the wrong place.
Big bottom end; borderline unruly but could be tweaked at mastering. Vocals a little bit lost, instrumental elements are mixed in a pleasant, unobtrusive manner.
low sound range(?) is strong
Too bright sounding maybe
Finally a song with bass.  Too bad it's too much bass.  The combination of bass in kick drum can't be distinguished anymore.  But I like the general balance between guitars and vocals.
evaluations.original: eindelijk een nummer met bas. ja,,er dat het te veel bas is. de co,binatie bas en basdrum is niet meer te onderscheiden. wel vind ik de alge,ene balans tussen gitaar en vocalen in dit nummer goed.

evaluations.comment: Bass a bit too subby
normal
I would appreciate some pannings, The guitar is too low

A bright mix,  with vocals that are present albeit quite scooped in the mid.  This pulls the balance to the 'sub'.  The spaciousness works quite well though and gives oxygen to the whole.  In mono the mix retains its power somewhat,  but it becomes obvious that the rhythm guitar isn't balanced very well.
evaluations.original:
Een heldere mix, met presente stemmen, die weliswaar algemeen erg 'gescooped' is in het mid.
Hierdoor trek je de balans naar het 'sub'.
De ruimtelijkheid werkt wel erg goed en geeft zuurstof aam het geheel.
in mono behoudt de mix enigszins zijn kracht, maar valt het op dat de rhythm guitar niet zo goed in balans staat.

evaluations.comment: A lot of low,  woolly. Placement of bass and kick is hard to find because of this.  Maybe this was mixed in a space where the lows are a problem.
evaluations.original: Heel veel laag, wollig. Plaats bas en kick is hierdoor moeilijk te vinden. Misschien is dit gemixt in een ruimte waar het laag een probleem vormt.

evaluations.comment: Too much low in the bass,  okay sound wise but maybe apply it a bit more subtly.  Furthermore the balance is okay  but no depth was really created, everything is quite on top of each other.
evaluations.original:
Te veel laag in de bas, qua klank wel oké maar misschien iets subtieler toepassen.
Verder is de balans oké maar is er niet echt een diepte gecreëert alles zit redelijk op elkaar.

evaluations.comment: Sounds quite dark.
evaluations.original: klinkt vrij donker

evaluations.comment: A lot of sub in the mix.  Bass is too high which pushes everything away.
evaluations.original: Wat veel sub in de mix. Bass zit te hoog waardoor alles weggeduwd wordt.

evaluations.comment: Missing the high end, too much bass
The bass is really blowing on a very low frequency. This is quite bothersome.  The drums don't really cut through either.
evaluations.original: De bass staat echt te blazen op een heel lage frequentie. Stoort best wel. Ook de drusms komen niet echt goed door.

evaluations.comment: A lot of bass!  Vocal quite dull.  A lot of reverb on guitars.
evaluations.original: Veel bas !  Vocal vrij dof. Veel reverb op gitaren.

evaluations.comment: There is something bothersome in the lows in this mix. This annoys me quite a bit.  Snare sounds thin.  Voice sits nicely in the mix,  guitar can be a bit louder and  cut more through the mix.
evaluations.original: Er zit iets storend in het laag bij deze mix. Dit vind ik zeer storend. Snare klinkt dun.Stem zit wel goed in de mix, gitaar mag soms wat luider en meer door de mix snijden.

evaluations.comment: Sub low of the bass is mindblowingly loud.  Everything else is pushed away compared to it, it's hard to give any more feedback.  As far as I can hear the rest of the mix is quite alright.  Reverb on the drums is nice.  The loudest part of the drums here are the hi-hats, this is odd.
evaluations.original:
-Sublaag van de bas is echt hallucinant luid. Al de rest wordt weggeduwd ten opzichte ervan, het is moeilijk om nog feedback te geven. Voor zover ik kan horen is de rest van de mix best oké.
-Reverb op de drums is leuk.
-Het luidste deel van de drum is hier de hihat, dat is gek.

evaluations.comment: Bass over-compressed. Too much hi-hat.
Way too much bass  and too much hi-hat
evaluations.original: Veel te veel bas en te veel Highat

evaluations.comment: very boomy mix (this is bad!). Vocals don't stand out, the bass masks most of the instrumentation, only the top end of the snare and cymbals manage to cut through.
The guitar really shines through on this one nicely. Vocal could maybe be higher
明亮，guitar
Good cohesion. Punchy. Acoustic guitar disappeared but it works well simply with the electric one (creative choice). Instruments dominate a bit the vocals.
Sounds like it was mixed by a guitarist.  Kick and snare are quite loud.  Vocal is deep (because of the performance?)
evaluations.original: Eerder gemixt door een gitarist. Kick en Snare vrij luid. Stem zit diep (vanwege de performance?)

evaluations.comment: One of the guitars sounds a bit nasal here,  this immediately makes the mix a bit restless/uneasy,  the voice can be a bit more in the mix in my opinion.  I'm missing some bass as well, it's very deep under the mix.
evaluations.original: Eén van de gitaren klinkt wat nasaal hier, dat maakt de mix onmiddellijk wat onrustig, de stem mag naar mijn mening ook wel een beetje meer in de mix liggen. Ik mix ook wat bas, hij ligt zeer diep onder de mix.

evaluations.comment: This could be brighter  and wider.  The guitar seems to be a bit loud too,  because it sounds shit,  takes a lot of space as well with those resonances.  The other mixes that sound better here, have less guitar and more high.  The drums are quite cool though.
evaluations.original: Dit zou wel wat brighter mogen en wijder. De gitaar staat precies ook een beetje luid, want hij klinkt kut, neemt veel ruimte in ook met die resonanties. De andere mixen die hier beter klinken, hebben minder gitaar en meer hoog. De drums zijn wel cool.

evaluations.comment: too separated .feel like the musical instrument performed in different  place

The mix sounds pure,  but maybe a bit too empty because of this.  Guitars sound good,  but could have had a bit more effect to fill things up perhaps.  The guitars are a bit too loud as well.  The snare is lacking some EQ  / effects as well.  The bass guitar could come through a bit louder as well.
evaluations.original: De mix klinkt zuiver, maar hierdoor misschien iets te leeg. Gitaren klinken goed, maar mochten mischien wat meer effect hebben om het op te vullen. De gitaren staan ook wat te luid. Er mist ook wat effect/EQ op de snare. basgitaar mag iets luider doorkomen.

evaluations.comment: normal

A simple rock mix,  sounds wide because of the guitars in stereo,  but loses its atmosphere almost completely in mono. This indicates a mix in which the elements are not completely balanced. The bass is quiet compared to the rest of the rhythm section. The 'lofi' approach of the drums sounds refreshing, but the kick is EQd too messily to provide the 'support' with enough strength/power.
evaluations.original:
Een eenvoudige rock mix, die in stereo breed klinkt omwille van de plaatsing van de gitaren,
maar in mono zijn sfeer  haast volledig verliest. 
Dit wijst op een mix waarbij de elementen niet volledig in balans staan. 
De bas staat stil in vergelijking met de rest van de ritmesectie. 
De 'lofi' benadering van de drums klinkt verfrissend, maar de kick is te rommelig ge-eq'ed om de 'onderbouw' van genoeg kracht te voorzien.

evaluations.comment: The worst mix in my opinion.  I'm hearing a lot of snare bottom.  The kick is too much to the front.  The balance between guitars and vocals is also wrong.  The guitars often dominate the vocals.  I seem to remember there was an acoustic guitar as well - I won't be able to retrieve it anymore [sic].
evaluations.original: Voor mijn idee de slechtste mix. ik hoor heel veel snare Bot. de kick ligt veel te veel op de voorgrond. de balans tussen gitaren en zang klopt ook niet. de gitaren overstemmen vaak de zang. Ik Meen mij ook te herinneren dat er een acoustische gitaar in zit. ik zal deze er niet ,eer uit kunnen halen.

evaluations.comment: I don't like the kick. It seems something is bothersome in the low mids.  I'm missing some bass.  It's not balanced well with the kick.  I don't like the snare either.  Guitars and  vocals are good in terms of balance.  In this mix the drum sound is what bothers me most. This is a drawback.
evaluations.original:
Kick vind ik niet mooi. Precies iets in het laag mid dat storend is . Ik mis wat bas. Deze zit niet goed in balans met
de kick. De snare vind ik ookniet zo mooi klinken. Gitaren en stem zitten wel goed qua balans. In deze mix stoort de drumsound mij vooral. Dit vind ik toch wel een minpunt.

evaluations.comment: Drums a bit dry and guitar a bit loud

Your guitars are a bit odd. I think guitar amp and room signal are panned left and right respectively. You now have one guitar sounding loud and the rest underneath it.  Drums sound quite nice,  the kick may be a bit too loud but this doesn't really bother [me]. It's driving the song a bit.  Mix sounds very empty.
evaluations.original:
-Je gitaren zijn een beetje gek. (Ik denk dat hier gitaaramp + roomsignaal links en rechts gepanned zijn.) Je hebt nu één gitaar die luid klinkt en de rest dat eronder hangt.
-Drums klinken best leuk, die kick is misschien iets luid maar dat stoort niet echt. Het drijft het nummer wel een beetje.
-Mix klinkt enorm leeg.

evaluations.comment: This mixing sounds tiring because the voice of bass is a little high, I can't even hear the vocal clearly. And the rhythm is not consistent enough, so I think it's a bit poor.
Nice but some panning should be added to all the instruments
Vocal drowns because of the guitars that are too far left / right,  only of the 7 where the kick drum cuts through, but too much.
evaluations.original:
Stem verdrinkt door de gitaren die te extreem Links/rechts staan, enige van de 7 waar de basdrum er door komt,
maar wel meteen te veel.

evaluations.comment: Unbalanced sound
Vocals are too far in the mix.  Balance is not quite right.
evaluations.original: Vocals zitten te ver in de mix. Balans zit niet helemaal oké.

evaluations.comment: Guitars not strong enough to support the vocals. Drums quite nice but not balanced well with the bass guitar. Some odd notes are prominent on the bass but not others, quite distracting. Vocals nice and controlled. Guitars too loud
too much prominence of bass, but lively. Voice quiet but everything clear. boxy drums.
A lot of guitar.  I'm missing the piano a little bit.
evaluations.original: veel gitaar. ik mis de piano een beetje

evaluations.comment: Don't like the snare
Not a nice low / low mid in the mix.  The kick drum sounds very flat  and the bass line completely disappears.  Way too much 800-2.5k in the mix which makes it tiring to listen to.
evaluations.original:
Geen mooi laag/laagmid in de mix, de basdrum klinkt héél plat en de baslijn verdwijnt helemaal.
Veel te veel 800-2.5k in de mix waardoor het vermoeiend is om naar te luisteren.

evaluations.comment: music too loud ,lack of texture,singer voice too weak
No bass end at all. Mix balance is all off.
too wide and dry
Weird EQ,  guitars loud,  little top/open high.  Not a lot of reverb.
evaluations.original: Vreemde EQ , gitaren luid , weinig top/open hoog. Weinig reverb.

evaluations.comment: Guitars are too loud. Vocals are way too far back. The tonal balance is terrible.
I suspect this mix works on multiple playback systems.  Not the wildest balance but perhaps the most honest one.  There is a feeling of rest in this mix.
evaluations.original: Ik vermoed dat deze mix overeind blijft op meerdere systemen. Niet de wildste balans maar misschien wel de eerlijkste. Er is een rust gevoel in deze mix.

evaluations.comment: got rhythm sensation,not volume change
Rhythm sensation is not very strong but still sounds good. Maybe because there is not much redundancy.

In the low mids the acoustic guitar (?) is bothering me a little bit, personally I would low cut a bit higher on this, it is really apparent and not really an added value to the mix.  Furthermore the vocal is also very direct, can be a bit more in the mix with a bit more reverb.
evaluations.original:
In het laag-mid stoort de akoestische gitaar (?) mij een beetje, ik zou daar persoonlijk iets hoger op low-cutten, het 
valt hard op en is niet echt een meerwaarde aan de mix.
De zang is verder ook heel direct, mag voor mijn part is meer in de mix liggen met iets meer reverb.

evaluations.comment: normal

I find the acoustic guitar in this song has an annoying +/-200Hz. It may be the body of the guitar, but it bothers me a lot.  Since the mix contains little top high I think it has an appropriate sound for the genre.  I'm missing kick as well in this song.
evaluations.original:
De akoestische gitaar in dit nu,,er vind ik een vervelende +- 200 Hw hebben. Dit is Misschien wel de body van de
de gitaar, ,aar ik vind hem zeer storend. Doordat de mix weinig top hoog bevat vind ik het voor het genre een toepasselijke 
sound hebben. ik mis ook kick in dit nummer.

evaluations.comment: Sounds quite empty.  The acoustic guitar is very prominent, while it's not doing much.  The electric guitars, which really let the song carry its full weight, are buried.  Lows sound quite good as well.
evaluations.original:
-Klinkt nogal leeg. De akoestische gitaar is heel prominent, terwijl die niet veel doet. De elektrische gitaren, die het nummer tot z'n recht laten komen, zitten begraven.
-Laag klinkt best goed.

evaluations.comment: Lacks definition and clarity. Not enough mids and highs. Guitars on the sides work well. Lacks a bit of cohesion between the instruments. Decent balance. Bass is quite boomy, makes the mix a bit muddy. Drums too much in the middle, not spread enough.
too low for the music
well balanced, but sound is stuffy.
Vocal don't really stand out
Bass sounds a bit messy in terms of sub.  I'm missing some guitar at times.  This makes this mix lack impact.
evaluations.original: Bas klinkt wat rommelig qua sub. Ik mis soms wat gitaar. Daardoor mist deze mix wat impact.

evaluations.comment: sounds veiled, no highs and too much bass, but nice distribution in space and unity
Quite dull instrumentally.  Can have a bit more freshness.
evaluations.original: Instrumentaal redelijk dof. Mag wat meer frisheid in komen.

evaluations.comment: The voice is not well processed, seems muffed to me, some reverberation should be added
A lot of bass.  I'm missing something in the high.
evaluations.original: veel bas. ik mis iets in het hoog

evaluations.comment: Muddy, bass-heavy. The snare drum is buried in the mix.
Too much drums and bass,  not enough guitars.
evaluations.original: te veel drum en bas, te weinig gitaren

evaluations.comment: The drums are missing a bit of punch,  and the whole could be a bit brighter.  The vocal is a bit too loud as well in the verses.
evaluations.original: De drums missen wat punch, en het geheel mag wat brighter. De vocal staat ook iets te luid vind in de strofes.

evaluations.comment: 闷，
The snare doesn't sound good.  The drums could be better in general.  Guitar sounds quite good  but the proportions of the song aren't right.  The vocal sounds too dull.
evaluations.original: De snare klinkt niet goed. De drums in het algemeen kunnen beter. gitaar klinkt wel goed maar de verhoudingen van de song zitetn niet goed. De zang klinkt te dof.

evaluations.comment: Bass far too strong. Vocals too strong above the rest of the mix.
Snare is not cutting through.  Quite dull.  Not a lot of guitar!
evaluations.original: Snare komt niet goed door. Vrij dof. Weinig gitaar !

evaluations.comment: too much bass
The balance is okay,  but not a lot of high in general?  I'm missing some transparence
evaluations.original: De balans zit wel oké, maar weinig hoog over het algemeen? Ik mis wat transparantie

evaluations.comment: The mix doesn't have a clear anchor point, and the individual elements are not joined to form a whole. It sounds like decisions were barely made regarding which instrument should play which role.  In mono it's also obvious that the mix's balance is undecided.
evaluations.original:
De mix heeft geen duidelijk ankerpunt en zijn individuele elementen worden niet samengebracht tot een een geheel.
Het klinkt alsof er nauweliks beslissingen genomen zijn welk instrument, welke rol moet dienen.
Ook in mono valt het op dat de mixbalans onbeslist is.

evaluations.comment: very boomy track.  Maybe only pleasant to the bass player...
Poor balance and muffled
Unnatural, low-passed,
BEST MIX ON HERE. EVERYTHING GELS PERFECTLY

Great kit sound
bass perfect level
great mix can hear all the elements and have just got a great bottom end with great punch with the drums.

A very good and clear mix which makes use of all elements and presents all as a whole. Excellent positioning which creates a nice depth between the instruments.  In mono the mix retains its strength,  and it's only obvious that the voice could be controlled a bit more.
evaluations.original:
Een erg goede en heldere mix die op alle elementen steunt en alle partijen als een geheel presenteert.
Uitstekende plaatsing waardoor er tussen de instrumenten een mooie diepte ontstaat,
In mono behoudt de mix zijn kracht en valt alleen op dat de stem iets meer zou mogen worden gecontroleerd.

evaluations.comment: snare on reverb a little much
Good spatialisation. Vocals sound central. Drums and bass levels are good.
MIX WELL BALANCED.

Reverb on the guitar is nice.  Maybe a bit too much reverb on the drums.  Kick may be a dB too loud to be in the mix perfectly.  Backing vocals are a tad too quiet to really give it atmosphere? Apart from that a good mix,  good quantity of high.  A bit too much sub in the bass.
evaluations.original:
-Reverb op de gitaar zit leuk. Misschien iets teveel reverb op de drums. Kick misschien een dB te luid om echt perfect in de mix te zitten.
-Backing vocals zitten een tikkeltje te stil voor het echt sfeer te kunnen geven?
-Voor de rest een goeie mix, goede hoeveelheid hoog. Iets veel sub in de bas.

evaluations.comment: This mix sounds pretty good, still. few things here and there. I think the organ and bass should be a little down still, I think the chordal and melody instruments should be panned a little more to give it more width.

great mix
snare is nice but still a little wet
nice stereo placement
vox treated well
dbl vox effective
NEEDS TO BE A TOUCH BRIGHTER OVERALL
LEAD VOCALS MISSING SOME MIDS. GOOD BALANCE
good overall mix. drums sounding nice/
Punchy drums, excellent placement of elements. Everything is a little dry. Nice space on the drums.
This seems like a good mix,  maybe a bit too much reverb on the snare.  Best mix in terms of balance  and energy.
evaluations.original: Lijkt me wel een goede mix, misschien wat veel reverb op de snare. Beste mix qua balans en energie.

evaluations.comment: Clearly chose for the bass in this mix,  vocals a bit too quiet again but less dramatic as with the others.  I quite like keys that fit the guitars quite well.  Everything has a clear/defined place.
evaluations.original: Duidelijk voor de bas gekozen in deze mix, opnieuw stemmen iets te stil maar minder dramatisch als bij de andere. Ik hou wel van de keys die heel goed aansluiten bij de gitaar. Alles heeft een duidelijke plaats.

evaluations.comment: Nice balance.  Maybe a bit too much reverb on the guitar.
evaluations.original: Mooie balans. Misschiennet wat te veel reverb op de gitaar.

evaluations.comment: Good balance, the kick drum is little loud. Decent width and depth.
The song sounds natural,  drums sound good.  Maybe a bit too much reverb on the snare which is not present on the other instruments.
evaluations.original: De song klinkt natuurlijk, drums klinken goed. misschien iets teveel reverb op de snare wat op de andere instrumenten niet aanwezig is.

evaluations.comment: Maybe a bit too much reverb.  Balance is quite tight though.  Maybe a bit too much low?
evaluations.original: Misschien iets te veel reverb. Balans is wel strak. Evt, een beetje teveel laag?

evaluations.comment: Vocals are too quiet... All the other instruments are overpowering the vocals.

- Kick sounds very forward and in your face
- Overall levels of the drums may be a little too loud, overpowering the rest of the instrumentation
A bit too much reverb on the snare.  Weird EQ on the vocal  Guitar quite loud.
evaluations.original: iets te veel reverb op snare. Vreemde EQ op vocal. Gitaar vrij luid.

evaluations.comment: VOCALS SLIGHTLY TOO FAR BACK IN THE MIX. HI-HAT & SNARE TOO PRESENT, OVERTAKE VOCALS.
Lovely mix, fresh. Everything has its place.  Voice is the boss.  Groove sits very nicely here, very good.
evaluations.original: Heerlijke mix, fris. Alles heeft zijn plaats. Stem is de baas. Groove zit hier heel goed, heel fijn.

evaluations.comment: A mix with a lot of attitude.  The intentional space between musical sentences create a lot of tension.  The snare sound also has a lot of attitude.  Everything sounds deliberate, detailed and measured.
evaluations.original:
Een mix met veel attitude. De opzettelijke ruimte tussen de muzikale zinnen zorgt voor veel spanning.
Ook de snare sound heeft veel attitude. Alles klinkt bewust, gedetaileerd en afgemeten.

evaluations.comment: Good balance!  Energy comes across well.
evaluations.original: goede balans ! Energie komt goed over.

evaluations.comment: Nice snare.  Maybe this song can be a bit brighter.  The song sounds quite defined though.  The kick drum lacks a bit of very low perhaps.
evaluations.original:
Leuke snare. Misschien mag dit nummer wat brighter. Het nummer klinkt wel defined. De bassdrum mist misschien
een beetje heel laag.

evaluations.comment: The song sounds natural.  Drums sound good.  Maybe there could be a bit more bass guitar.
evaluations.original: De song klinkt natuurlijk. Drums klinken goed. Misschien mag er iets meer basgitaar zijn.

evaluations.comment: The snare is way too rock'n roll for this song.  The high is really not good,  real top high doesn't seem to be in here.  The guitar sounds nice.  Rhodes sounds quite thin, as though the body of the instrument is taken out of it.
evaluations.original:
-Die snare is veel te rock'n'roll voor dit nummer.
-Het hoog zit niet goed, echt tophoog zit er precies niet in.
-De gitaar klinkt leuk.
-De Rhodes klinkt nogal dun, alsof al de body van het instrument eruit gehaald is.

evaluations.comment: Balance between the guitars?
evaluations.original: Balans tussen de gitaren onderling?

evaluations.comment: This song consists of drums and vocals mainly.  The guitar sits very deep in the mix. I'm missing it.  I quite like the sound of the drums,  but it's just too loud.  Vocal sounds good,  too bad of the guitar.
evaluations.original: Deze song bevat vooral uit drum en zang. De gitaar is heel diep in de mix. Die mis ik. Ik vind de sound van de drum wel tof, ze staan enkel te luid. Zang klinkt goed, maar jamme rvan de gitaar.

evaluations.comment: Good mix. Nice reverb on the snare. Great balance of all the instruments.
Great sounding vocals and even mix vocal and guitar punch through.
Probably too much reverb/delay
A BIT TOO GLOSSY
Vocals a little thin although there is reverb, in the chorus the over dub was a little out of sink. Instruments all sitting on a nice level.
The mix has a nice sense of space. Everything is connected. The backing vocals are a little disconnected from the mix. The top end is a little too much. Bass is a little small and pokey.
SOUNDS BRITTLE IN THE MID TO UPPER MID FREQUENCY RANGE. THE SIBILANCE ON THE VOCALS IS ESPECIALLY NOTICEABLE . SNARE SLIGHTLY TOO LOUD.
DRUMS AND VOX REVERB TOO WET, MAKING THEM SOUNDS MUDDY
TOO SCOOPED. KICK NEEDS SOME SUB
vocals are jus tad bright, bass is a little lacking

- Drums are very low and swallowed by the rest of the instrumentation
- Bass overpowers the guitar in some parts
- Reverb is a little too intense and can be heard ringing out
Snare hit and hihats are very prominent, tops are emphasised too much. Bass frequencies seem lacking. Spatialisation is alright.
reverb a bit much
LEVELS ARE GOOD BUT THERE NEEDS TO BE MORE LOW END AND THERE'S AN ANNOYING MID RING IN THE SNARE. TOO MUCH REVERB ON THE VOCALS. EASE UP ON THE COMPRESSION
Too bright, balance and panning are off.

good mix but very wet
the build up after "pimp" needed more automation to build dynamics
vox a little too far forward in the mix
Nice and clear. Drums are well placed and levelling of vocals is good in conjunction with the other instruments.

Drums a bit too bright, but the best so far. Nice levels. Push the guitar solo bits. When it hits hard, let it get loud! Bass needs more level, needs to support the song. Spread the back vocals out for more impact.
Great vocals and best groove balance of the bunch.
sounds good
Rhodes keys are too dark, makes the articulation muffled - and level too low overall. Solid drums. Good kick/snare/hihat/bass/vocal balance. Ring in the snare is a little distracting.
EXCELLENT MIX, CAN'T FIND ANYTHING WRONG WITH IT. KEEP UP THE EXCELLENT WORK
Nice and tight, love it

- Great vocals mix
- Great guitars and keyboard mix
- Good drums mix
Excellent mix. Great relationship between frequencies. All elements are there and without exageration. Bass and kick give the necessary weight to the song.
evaluations.original: Excelente mistura. Ótima razão entre frequências. Todos os elementos se fazem perceber sem exageros. Baixo e kick dão o peso necessário à faixa.

evaluations.comment: WELL BALANCED. EACH INSTRUMENT SOUNDS CLEAN.
great mix, great levels, can hear body within the drums guitar and bass
nice top end. just a bit thin.
In this mix the snare is a bit to mid-rangey and the overall low-end is too exagerated.
evaluations.original: Nesta mistura a tarola está um pouco média de mais e o grave ligeiramente exagerado.

evaluations.comment: Very punchy and fun. A little bright at times but otherwise very pleasant.
gtr thin.  BG light.
Very well balanced, tight punch sound that works really well with the music. Music comes through without being hampered by the mix.
DRUMS TOO DRY BUT INTO THE REST, JUST NEEDS SOME OF THE AIR OF NUMBER 8
Kick is a bit much, organ is to soft, balance needs to be refined. A bit dry
I like the space on this, but it seems too loose.
vocal needs to be a bit louder, overall it's good
fun snare
bright vocals/ everything, bass and kik sit nice together, thin vocals

evaluations.original: Gosto da definição na voz do equilíbrio com os outros instrumentos. Comparativamente, tem mais definição e brilho do que as outras. Brilho nos instrumentos também. Aumentaria o volume da voz, no entanto

evaluations.comment: Great. Good timbral balance (maybe on the bright side), gtr/wurli maybe a little dry
Kick drum too loud. At some point the vocal gets displaced from the mix.
evaluations.original: o kick está um pouco alto demais. Em alguns momentos a voz foge da mistura.

evaluations.comment: OK.
SNARE AND HI-HAT SIT ON TOP OF OVERALL MIX, NOT IN IT. OVERALL GOOD CLARITY.

okay mix
nice dynamics difference to other mixes in the verse to the others
nice snare
good stereo sound
dbl vox needs to be pulled back a little
pretty good overall

Drums cut through

evaluations.comment: Rhythm sensation sounds very clear and it's a good rock style.
Most professional sounding mix, good bottom end, bright at the top without being offensively so. Vocals well balanced with the instrumental, well spatialised - hammond particularly.
nice punchy drums
TOO BRIGHT, TOO DRY, NO MIDS. GOOD BALANCE
nice space, sounds live, punchy drums

evaluations.original: Bateria óptima. Relação com o baixo. As vocals estavam todas muito boas. Gostava de ver mais relação entre guitarra e teclas.

evaluations.comment:
low ends a little boxy
organ too loud
maybe a little dry

evaluations.original: Voz parece muito distante. Bom equilibrio entre os restantes instrumentos.

Nice and dry. Yes. More width on the BG vox would be nice. Be careful with the sibilant range. Kick is a bit tubby some times.
ok
Drums are too prominent.
reverb a bit long on bg vox good push on the kick
a bit weak low end, too bright vocals
Too airy.
Excessive low-end
evaluations.original: demasiados graves;

evaluations.comment: louder ,particularly the drum and small cymbals. the vocal sound like in the middle

ok, whimpy bass
Levels are good, but less interesting mix.
hats too high. too fizzy. also bit dry
tinny. but vocals nice
Too much tops. Emphasising the sibilance in vocals and the "shhh" sounds in the high hat and the snare.
Needs a bit more vocals. The song is really dry. The balance of the instruments seems ok.
Punchy, more tops.
lose lower frequency,narrow
Too bright, drums are a tad too loud.

Too aggressive. I don't think it's incorrect, but I don't like the style, it hurts my ears.
Too trebly
like float on the surface,
too much to the left and too much high

evaluations.comment: Good balance.
evaluations.original: Goede balans.

evaluations.comment: Kick may be too loud in the mix.  I quite like its punchy character though.  It highlights 'the one' of course, which is good in funk.  Bass sounds quite nice though.  Hammond is too loud.  Lacking a bit in the low mid in the drums to carry the song better.
evaluations.original:
-Kick is misschien te luid in de mix. Ik vind het punchy karakter ervan nog wel tof. Het zet the one natuurlijk goed in de verf, wat goed is bij funk.
-Bas zit wel leuk.
-Hammond is te luid.
-Mist iets wat laag mid in de drums om het nummer beter te dragen.

evaluations.comment: The vocal is a bit quiet,  and the mix could be a bit brighter in general.
evaluations.original: De vocal staat wat te stil, en de mix mag over het algemeen een beetje brighter.

evaluations.comment: The mix builds on the rhythmical elements mostly, and seems to have less attention for vocals.  Backing vocals are positioned quite well  and the general presence is interesting. The balance choices seem deliberate.  The quiet lead vocal is unfortunate.  In mono the whole retains its strength, but the quiet lead vocal is even more apparent.
evaluations.original:
De mix klinkt steunt vooral op de ritmische elementen, en lijkt minder aandacht te hebben voor de zang.
Koortjes zijn erg goed geplaatst en de algemene presentie is interessant.
De balanskeuze lijkt opzettelijk.
Jammer van de stille lead.
In mono behoudt het geheel zijn kracht, maar valt de stille lead nog meer op.

evaluations.comment: The drums sound quite nice,  but maybe they are a bit too loud.  Guitar could be a bit quieter as well.  Apart from that it sits well.
evaluations.original: De drums klinken wel lekker, maar staan misschien net iets te luid. Gitaar mag ook et iets stiller staan. Voor de rest zit het goed.

evaluations.comment: Voice is too deep in the mix compared to the rest of the instruments.  Guitar may be a bit too loud.  Bass and drums are alright in terms of balance.  Guitar is too loud and  keyboards too quiet.
evaluations.original:
Stem zit hier te diep in de mix tov de rest van de instrumenten. Gitaar staat mss vrij luid. Bas en drum zitten wel 
goed qua balans. Gitaar staat enkel te luid en keys te stil.

evaluations.comment: Big balance mistakes.  Not an honest translation.  Also not within the already existing philosophy of the genre.
evaluations.original: Grote balansfouten. Geen eerlijke vertaling. Ook niet binnen de al bestaande filosofie van dit genre.

narrow sounding

bright mix

tinny/distorted in parts, unbalanced.

organ sounds weird

evaluations.comment: The snare and the keyboards are too loud. In general, the snare stands out as it is too filtered and has a very strong mid-range characteristic. The mix is practically monophonic, which makes it uninteresting and confusing.

evaluations.comment: Decent mix, the bass sounds nice, but it is a tad too loud. Quite narrow and lacks vibe.

evaluations.comment: Highs are a little over the top

evaluations.comment: Snare sounds too compressed. The drums lack some brightness. The vocal seems boxed. The rest of the elements are quite hidden.
Mix sounds empty. Other instruments besides drums and electric guitar are very low. Organ is far too noticeable. Vocals are pretty nice.
nice tight mix. don't love the snare or hats yet & toms don't come out enough. this one is definitely mine, lol.. shoulda used a bit of vocal verb support & a slightly thicker EQ.
Very spacious, warm mix.
highlight bass，

Pretty good, would want a little more snap on the snare. I like the stereo vocal effect. Organs need to be brighter/more aggressive. Good levels overall. More back vocals, they are important in this tune!

Finally some louder Rhodes. Phased out electric guitar is an interesting effect... but I prefer the image to be more discrete. Same thing with the organ image. Snare it a little soft. Vocal is a little dry. Interesting effects on the vocal - cool. Kick would benefit from body - I'm not feeling the punch.
Good. well balanced sound
good punch, maybe too dry
Vocals are a bit dry. Bass too loud

Strong bass guitar presence

evaluations.comment: Not exceptional, but has a better balance than the others
rhythm quite heavy

nice

clear, well defined, bass lacks presence/boomy, good balance, vocals mid range-ie

highlight drum，dynamic
Good.

ok

evaluations.original: Låter som man lyssnar på en mix som endast justerats i nivå och med EQ. Saknar efterklang. Men annars så är det en skön mix. Låter som man lyssnar lite live då trummorna har ett skönt rums sound. Dock lite stark Bas-gitarr.

evaluations.comment: This is how it's supposed to sound. Maybe a bit do much distorsion on the bass. The vocals could have been given more space. [Not space as in reverb.]

evaluations.comment: The mix glues nicely with good dynamic range. Lacks a small reverb.

evaluations.comment: Good soft mix with little too much bass.
evaluations.original: Bra mjuk mix med lite för mycket bas.

evaluations.comment: TOO MUCH BASS GUITAR, MORE LEAD VOCALS, KEYS AND GUITAR.
Liked this one the best. It's dry and not very aggressive but I think it suits the musical style. The bass is at a good level and feels warm and crispy.
evaluations.original: Gillade den här bäst. Den är torr och inte så aggressiv men det tycker jag passar musikstilen. Basen är bra i nivå och känns varm och krispig.

evaluations.comment: The mix generally lacks treble. A bit too loud kick and bass.
evaluations.original: Det fattas generellt diskant i mixen. Aningen hög kick och bas.

evaluations.comment: A bit [too?] dry. The bass is somewhat loud. A bit more reverb and a bit more balanced level on the bass [not clear if it is bass as in "bass guitar" or as in frequency range] would have meant that this mix would have been the best, without a doubt. Also the bass is a bit too loud.
evaluations.original: Lite torr. Bassen är något stark. Lite mer reverb och lite mer balanserad nivå på bass hade gjort att denna mix varit andra bäst, utan tvekan. Bassen är också lite för stark.

evaluations.comment: A bit too much bass guitar. other than that quite nice/good/beautiful. warm and nice.
evaluations.original: lite mycket basgitarr. i övrigt rätt snyggt. varm och skön.

evaluations.comment: I like the sound image in this mix. The bass could be lowered [in volume, not tone] a bit, though.
evaluations.original: Jag gillar ljudbilden i den här mixen. Basen hade kunnat sänkas lite, dock.

evaluations.comment: a little too dull, tubby
evaluations.original: lite för doft, mulligt

evaluations.comment: Nice, but a little too loud bass. This [the mix] had been good if the bass hade been softer [in volume, not in tone] I think this is the mix that sound the best in the Avantone speakers [Mix Cubes]
evaluations.original: Skön, men lite väl stark bas. Hade basen varit lite svagare hade denna vart bra! Tycker att detta är den mix som låter bäst i Avantonehögtalarna.

evaluations.comment: Good bass and good groove. It sounds a bit "closed off" and "burkigt" [boxy, maybe] though
evaluations.original: Bra bas och bra groove. Dock låter det lite instängt och "burkigt"

evaluations.comment: Good level balance, lacks reverberation.
evaluations.original: bra nivåbalans, saknar efterklang

evaluations.comment: A bit too much bass, apart from that nice clarity in the mix. A little dry, could have had a bit more reverberation.
evaluations.original: Lite för mycket bas, annars bra tydlighet i mixen. Lite torr, kunde varit en aning mer efterklang.

evaluations.comment: BASS WAY TOO LOUD
The voice kind of disappears. It feels like the rest of the instruments are to loud.
evaluations.original: Rösten försvinner lite- Kanske för att resten av instrumenten ligger för starkt.

evaluations.comment: Good overall sound on the mix and on the individual instruments. The bass is too loud in the mix but has a good sound. The vocals should be louder in the mix. I like the dry sound but a little more reverb could make the mix a bit bigger.
evaluations.original: Bra sound på hela mixen samt på alla individuella instrument. Basen ligger för högt i mixen, dock med ett bra sound. Sången borde vara högre i mixen. Tycker om det torra soundet, litet mer reverb kunde dock göra mixen litet större.

evaluations.comment: A good balance between the instruments, the frequency spectrum could be broadened since it sounds a bit closed off [or maybe muted, as in muted trumpet]
evaluations.original: Bra balans mellan instrumenten, skulle behöva bredda frekvensspektrat då den låter lite instängd.

evaluations.comment: Good level balance but it sounds closed off and lacks treble. Too dry as well and too loud bass guitar.
evaluations.original: Bra nivåbalans men låter lite instängd och är diskantfattig. Något torr också och för hög basgitarr.

evaluations.comment: Good definition and stereo image. Good levels, though a bit bass heavy. Lacking in the midrange, and a bit in the treble.
evaluations.original: Bra tydlighet och stereobild. Bra nivåer, dock lite bastung. Saknar en del i mellanregister, och lite i topp.

evaluations.comment: Good/nice groove. The bass is way to loud though and a bit too dry [the whole mix, i guess] too low [in volume] harmonies.
evaluations.original: Skönt groove. dock är basen alldeles för stark och lite väl torr för svaga stämmor

evaluations.comment: A bit/tad too much bass. Too little reverberation, space [in the reverb sense]. A bit skewed instrumental balance. Good/proper dynamic range.
evaluations.original: Aningen tydlig bas. För lite efterklang, rymd. Aningen skrev instrumentbalans. God dynamik.

evaluations.comment: the vocals aren't loud enough here. I can hear the other elements quite clearly

The bass is far front in the mix and disturbs [the rest of the instruments?] a bit. The vocals are too soft/weak [as in level]. The guitar disappears a bit as well. However, this mix is comfortable for the ears.
evaluations.original: Basen ligger långt fram i mixen och stör lite. Sången är alldeles för svag. Gitarren försvinner lite även den. Denna mix är dock behaglig för öronen.

evaluations.comment: the bass is very much up front it sounds good but takes over the mix
evaluations.original: basen ligger väldigt långt fram den låter bra men tar över mixen

evaluations.comment: A bit too much bass in the mix but apart from that it's well balanced but a bit too dry.
evaluations.original: Lite för mycket bas i mixen annars välbalanserad, men lite väl torr.

evaluations.comment: Not very dynamic and the voice is a little too dry and placed too far back. It's more like the bass that's heard. It's "nice" with a slappy bass "in the face" but I think I'll prefer when the voice is up front. Too mono-heavy.
evaluations.original: Inte så dynamisk och rösten är lite för torr och ligger för mycket i bakkant. Det är snarare basen som hörs. Najs med lite  slapping bas sådär i ansiktet, men föredrar nog att rösten ligger i framkant. Lite mono-tung.

evaluations.comment: Lots of low bass/sub in the kick. The rest of the mix is very low frequent. Lacks treble.
evaluations.original: Mycket lågbas/sub i kicken. Resten av mixen är väldigt lågfrekvent. Saknar diskant.

evaluations.comment: Too loud bass, other than that for most of the time a comfortable balance between instruments. Good amount of reverberation, "lagom" torr.
evaluations.original: För hög bas, i övrigt behaglig balans mellan instrumenten för det mesta. Bra med efterklang, lagom torr.

evaluations.comment: Way too dry mix. Though kind of good frequency wise. Guitar a bit too quiet. Too loud bass.
evaluations.original: Alldeles för torr mix. Dock rätt bra frekvensmässigt. Gitarr lite för svag. För stark bas.

evaluations.comment: Too much 600 Hz-ish in the kick drum. Good level[balancing] but the vocals are a bit too quiet. The bass clips. [As in distorsion].
evaluations.original: För mycket typ 600 Hz i bastrumman. Bra nivåer, men sången är lite för svag. Basen klipper.

evaluations.comment: Drums and Bass are too loud, drowning the vocal. Can hardly hear the organ, keys and guitar.
A bit too much low, where the kick and bass takes over. The levels are a bit unbalanced and the mix is a bit too dry.
evaluations.original: En aning för mycket low, där kicken och basen tar över. Ljudnivåerna en aning obalanserade, samt att mixen är en aning för torr.

evaluations.comment: Too much bass but the other instruments sits nicely in the mix.
evaluations.original: För mycket bas men de andra instrumenten sitter bra i mixen.

evaluations.comment: Bass is prominent, less tops. Resonant frequency on the snare hit.

bass is too loud
not enough guitar
low end is crowed
vocals need to come forward
A bit too much electric bass a too weak [volume, not tone] vocals and all other things. Otherwise good dynamic range and frequency respons. Lacks depth.
evaluations.original: Lite för mycket el-bas och för svag sång och allt annat. Bra dynamik och frekvensgång i övrigt. Saknar lite djup.

evaluations.comment: Good warmth. Good levels. Poor on effects. Dry, though that might be suitable.
evaluations.original: Bra värme. Bra nivåer. Fattigt med effekter. Torrt, kan dock vara passande.

evaluations.comment: BASS TOO LOUD, VOX TOO SOFT.
BASS TOO LOUD, AS WELL AS THE HI-HAT. THE MIDDLE RANGE OF THE SONG (SNARE, GUITAR, AND VOCALS) LACK PRESENCE, OVERALL CLARITY IS OK.
Sounds very live, like it was straight from recording, granted a good recording. Melody instruments not balanced well. Snare too loud in the drums compared to overheads.
