dry and tight mix
guitar is lost in the mix
no keys
odd placement of snare in the chorus?
harmony vox okay but could be louder
Bass is wayyyyy too loud. Overpowers the rest of the instruments - it's to far in front of the vocals.

Way too much bass frequencies and way too little of everything else. The bass sounds as if it's distorted sometimes as well. But it's the bass guitar that takes all the space [not reverb related] in the mix and pushes everything else to the background.
evaluations.original: Alldeles för mycket basfrekvenser och alldeles för lite av allt annat. Basen låter även som den distar ibland. Men det är basgitarren som tar all plats i mixen och puttar allt annat till bakgrunden.

evaluations.comment: MIX IS GOOD BUT THE BASS IS TOO LOUD.
Very loud bass which makes everything else appear as if it's in the background.
evaluations.original: Väldigt stark bas vilket gör att allt kommer lite i bakgrunden.

evaluations.comment:
- Way too bass heavy
- Snare is audible but tends to hide behind the rest of the instrumentation (possibly from the overbearing bass and low end)
bass/drums too loud
Bass is too loud. Mix sounds muffled. Too many elements in the centre competing for space.
Way too much bass

Really good! everything glues together and the levels [level balance] are good good EQ and everything glues really nicely. a bit more reverb on the vocals and this would have been a homerun! [The student used the English word "homerun".] AWESOME/WICKED.
evaluations.original: Riktigt bra! allt limmar och det är bra nivåer ligger bra EQ och allt limmar riktigt fint. lite mer reverb på sång så är det en homerun! GRYMT.

evaluations.comment: Nice balance between vocals and backing vocals/choir. Nice reverb. Lacks bass.
evaluations.original: Bra balans mellan sång och körer. Snyggt reverb. Basfattig.

evaluations.comment: The drums are too loud. Otherwise really good!
evaluations.original: Trummorna lite för starka. Annars jättebra!

evaluations.comment: A lot of treble messes up the whole.
evaluations.original: Mycket diskant förstör helheten.

evaluations.comment: A bit sharp/harsh vocals and hihat otherwise good mix.
evaluations.original: En aning vass sång och hihats annars bra mix.

evaluations.comment: Good frequency balance, good reverb and level balance, a bit lacking in dynamic range. Lacks a bit of bass. Too dry backingvocals/choir.
evaluations.original: Bra frekvensbalans, bra reverb och nivåbalans, aningen dynamikfattig. Lite basfattig. För torr kör.

evaluations.comment: The mix is good, apart from the bas, which is a bit lacking. The vocals gets presented/appears very well. Maybe a bit too good. Ay(!) that the bass wasn't given more low end, or else the mix had been very good.
evaluations.original: Mixen är bra, bortsett från basen, som är lite fattig. Sången kommer fram väldigt bra. Kanske lite för bra. Ack att bassen inte fick mer botten, annars hade mixen varit riktigt bra.

evaluations.comment: Maybe lacks a bit of mid [range] but good balance and energy.
evaluations.original: Saknar kanske lite mid men bra balans och energi.

evaluations.comment: The choir [is] a bit too loud. Apart from that I like/dig the level-balancing. Nice spectral-balance as well, but maybe a bit too [much] treble. The stereo image isn't super duper.
evaluations.original: Kören lite väl stark. Annars diggar jag nivåbalanseringen. Bra spektralbalans också, men lite väl diskant kanske. Stereobilden är inte superduper.

evaluations.comment: The vocals fits the genre perfectly. The guitar to the left, the one with the "waowao" effect, sticks out a bit.
evaluations.original: Sången passar perfekt för genren. Gitarren till vänster, den med "waowao"-effekt, sticker lite.

evaluations.comment: good, a bit too much treble in the cymbals, lack of weight in the snare
evaluations.original: bra, lite mycket diskant på cymbalerna, lite dålig tryck i virveln

evaluations.comment: Quite open contains a bit more high frequencies than some of the other mixes
evaluations.original: Ganska öppen innehålls lite mer högre frekvenser än några av de andra mixerna

evaluations.comment: A lot of treble, but is quite clear/open. If this had been a bit fuller, it would have been good.
evaluations.original: Mycket diskant, men är rätt klar. Hade denna vart lite fylligare hade denna vart bra!

evaluations.comment: Well-balanced.
evaluations.original: Välbalanserad.

evaluations.comment: Felt at bit too mono for my taste. Other than that a good balance between instruments apart from the choir which stuck out a bit too much. Some annoying frequencies in the guitar that sticks out.
evaluations.original: Kändes aningen för mono för min smak. I övrigt bra balans mellan instrumenten förutom kören som stack ut lite väl. Någon jobbig frekvens på gitarren som sticker ut.

evaluations.comment: A bit much reverb. Generally lacks bass. Other than that nice.
evaluations.original: Lite mycket reverb. Fattas generellt bas. Annars trevlig.

evaluations.comment: a bit too clean. a bit sharp
evaluations.original: lite för rent. lite skarpt

evaluations.comment: Too much "high" frequencies, it cuts a lot [Cuts in the ears, that is.]
evaluations.original: för mycket "höga" frekvenser, det skär en hel del

evaluations.comment: Hi-hat is too brilliantly mixed ["brilliantly" is the literal translation of the ord "brilliant". I guess the word the student is really looking for is "sibilant".], too sharp. The mix as a whole is hard/sharp.
evaluations.original: Hi-hat är för brilliant mixad, för vass. Mixen i helhet hård.

evaluations.comment: Too airy, same hear, snare where??
evaluations.original: För luftig, samma här, virvel vart??

evaluations.comment: There are some sharp/harsh and annoying frequencies in the treble. Apart from the the mix would be really good.
evaluations.original: I diskanten finns några vassa och störande frekvenser. Annars vore mixen riktigt bra.

evaluations.comment: A bit essy [as in too much of the "S" sound, the one that you use a DeEsser too remove] and sharp/harsh, could have had more "low end".
evaluations.original: Lite essig och vass, kunde haft mer "botten".

evaluations.comment: Lacks bass, a bit sharp/harsh in places.
evaluations.original: Saknar bas, lite vass på sina ställen.

evaluations.comment: A bit too aggressive mix in the treble. Maybe a bit too much compression as well. The bass needs to be raised! [In level, I assume.]
evaluations.original: Lite för aggressiv mix i diskanten. Kanske lite för mycket kompressor också. Basen måste upp!

evaluations.comment: nasal and a bit too sharp.
evaluations.original: nasal och lite för vass.

evaluations.comment: Very bassthin [or very lacking in the bass], but not in a way that makes it sharp/harsh in the treble. The snare cuts through too much thou. The vocals and the backingvocals/choir are really good thou.
evaluations.original: Väldigt basfattigt, men inte så det blir för skarpt i diskanten. Dock så skär virveln igenom alldeles för mycket. Sången och kören är riktigt bra dock.

evaluations.comment: Good feeling n' groove, kind of thin. Too dry as well. and kind of sharp/harsh.
evaluations.original: Bra känsla o groove, ganska tunn. Även för torr. och ganska vass.

evaluations.comment: Way too nasal mix, very trebley leadvox, guitar and OH [overhead].
evaluations.original: Alldeles för nasal mix, väldigt diskant leadvox, gitarr och OH.

evaluations.comment: The guitars are very sharp/harsh and has a lot of reverberation. It doesn't blend in. The vocals suffers a bit from the same problem. The choir/backing vocals comes in and are very loud. The bass is somewhat lacking.
evaluations.original: Gitarren är väldigt vass och har mycket efterklang. Den smälter inte in. Sången lider lite av samma problem. Kören kommer in och är väldigt stark. Basen fattas lite.

evaluations.comment: Distinct/pronounced mix, but a bit too treble-rich and sharp.
evaluations.original: Tydlig mix, men aningen för diskantrik och vass.

evaluations.comment: Too much treble in the drums. Lacks bass frequencies. Skewed instrument and frequency balance. [The student didn't actually write "skev", the Swedish word for "skewed", but instead wrote "skrev" which means "wrote" however I don't see how the intention could be to write anything other that "skev".]
evaluations.original: För mycket diskant i trummor. Saknar basfrekvenser. Skrev instrument och frekvensbalans.

evaluations.comment: [Hard to translate literally. It refers too the mix being very treble rich (or possibly poor in non-treble frequencies).]
evaluations.original: Väldigt top-ig.

evaluations.comment: The mix is nasal, and the sound levels are a bit unbalanced. Lacks punch, the kick is almost not tangible.
evaluations.original: Mixen är nasal, samt att ljudnivåerna är en aning obalanserade. Saknar även punch, kicken är nästan inte påtaglig.

evaluations.comment: A bit too thin mix but other than that good dynamics and balance effects.
evaluations.original: Lite väl tunn mix men i övrigt bra dynamik och balans effekter.

evaluations.comment:
Very nasal, misses the warm low frequencies
 Very nasal, misses the warm low frequencies
evaluations.original: Very nasal, misses the warm low frequencies

evaluations.comment: A bit too hard/sharp treble. Otherwise a good mix. But the treble [the Swedish word is misspelled, but it can't possibly mean anything other than "treble" in this context] destroys the mix.
evaluations.original: Lite väl hård diskant. Annars så en bra mix. Men diskonten förstör för mixen.

evaluations.comment: Lacks some low end. The guitars are very sharp/harsh, they appear to be [low] cut up to the mid range. The drums seems too lack some mid [range] instead.
evaluations.original: Saknar viss botten. Gitarrerna är mycket vassa, de verkar vara skurna upp till mid-registret. Trummorna verkar sakna mid istället.

evaluations.comment: Sharp, cold.
evaluations.original: Vasst, kallt.

evaluations.comment: Really good! Good balance.
Good backing vocals
Best vocal sound between all of them, great automation to bring out stuff.
sounds good
Very similar to track 3 but a little too dull. The backing vocals are far FAR too loud.
Nice, subtle mix.
Very nice balance, the hats almost want to rape my ears but not quite. Background vocals are too loud. Pretty good!
background vocals are TOO LOUD. but nice.
Lead vocal too soft compared to the BGs. kick too soft. Great level for hi-hat. Feels thin in the mid-lows. More bass and kick.
highlight vocal accompaniment，
drums are a little dark, vox could have some more presence
A little thin
Organs too quiet.
OK balance, Backs too loud, A bit on the dry side. No punch on drums
the vocal sound like in the left and right side and create a stereo effect.the harmony is louder compared to the former,
nice
background vocal it's a little bit loud and dry
ok
Bg vocals are too loud/ not tucked in the same space as main, organ too soft
too loud backing vocals
Backing vocals too loud. Bass too loud, too, but maybe it's the room.
the placement of the instruments in the stereo field makes sense, except for the vocals.  I think they could have panned the background vocals wide because it is covering up the lead vocal too much.
weak energy and flat.  needs better vocal control. way too much "fun stuff" going on with the vocals.  They should be leveled and balanced first!
The BG vox are a bit out of control. Snare is not super great. Vocal levels are really inconsistent.
Nice. BG vox are too hot, hammond is a little low in the Verse, but overal good
Decently tight-sounding instrument mix, lacking in bottom end perhaps, could be a tad brighter in the drumkit (snare and overheads particularly). Vox and BV far too loud.
Balance between instrument is off and too dry. even the balance between the main vocal and back up vocal was not blanced
Chorus sounds a little weird.
extra LD voices (delay).  BG too loud.  too much verb on kbd
snare doesnt speak (too dry) and is too dark. bass is good, and kick bg vox too hot, one lead double sticks out on the R
Backing vocals are too loud.
backing vox way too loud
hate that out of phase crap.
Vocal has too much taken out of it around 250Hz, and there's something weird going on in the stereo image. backing vocals are too present.
singer voice lack of balance ,accompany singing too loud
panning awkward, backing vocals way too loud, main vocals disappear, rhythm flat and muddy
Drums don't sound full. In fact everything sounds small. Back vocals way too loud, they are louder than the lead...
vocal sounds are strong. specially chorus

Unnecessarily good mix. The snare makes me want to run three laps around the school and cry hallelujah. The only thing I think about [that's negative] is that the hi hat is a bit too bright, but it doesn't matter since it's obvious that it is the GML 8200 that's at it, and that's always nice. The vocals could be a biiiiiiiit louder, but I could listen to this [mix] on accounts of the snare alone. Fantastic stereo width as well. Almost [an] exemplary mix. BY FAR the best. API 2500 on the drum buss? There's hope for humanity!
evaluations.original: Onödigt bra mix. Den där virveln får mig att vilja springa tre varv runt skolan och ropa hallelujah. Det enda jag kommer på är att hi haten är lite för bright, men det gör inget för man hör på långa vägar att det är GML 8200 som är i farten, och det är ju alltid trevligt. Sången skulle kanske kunna vara liiite starkare, men jag skulle kunna lyssna på den här enbart för virvelns skull. Fantastisk stereobredd också. Nästintill exemplarisk mix. ÖVERLÄGSET bäst. API 2500 på trumbuss? Det finns hopp för mänskligheten!

evaluations.comment: Also really good ! super sweet reverb on the snare. A bit too dull voice and a bit weird level-balance with a bit too loud snare.
evaluations.original: Också riktigt bra ! superskönt reverb på virvel. lite dov röst och lite konstig balans i nivå med lite stark virvel

evaluations.comment: Well balanced [or literally more like "good balance" or "nice balance".]
evaluations.original: Bra balans

evaluations.comment: Airy and nice. Too heavily filtered in the bass [frequencies] on for example the vocals. The mix gets a kind of "radio effect" from this. Good reverberation, sounds big. Nice use of the stereo image. Good balance between the instruments and nice snare.
evaluations.original: Luftig och bra. Dock lite väl skuren i basen på exempelvis sången. Mixen får lite "radioeffekt" utav detta. Bra efterklang, låter stort. Snygg användning utav stereobilden. Bra balans mellan instrumenten och snygg virvel.

evaluations.comment: Nice flick in the snare and an even frequency spectrum.
evaluations.original: Härlig snärt i virveln och jämnt frekvensspektrum.

evaluations.comment: Good mix with a sweet low end. Lacks a bit in the upper frequency range.
evaluations.original: Bra mix med en go botten. Saknar lite i det högre frekvensområdet.

evaluations.comment: Good mix, the vox dub can be a bit too intrusive at times
evaluations.original: Bra mix, vox dubben kan vara lite väl påträngande ibland

evaluations.comment: Good frequency balance and level balance, a bit too much reverberation, good dynamics but little too loud snare and to quiet vocals, Good stereo image. A bit thin/lacking in the bass.
evaluations.original: Bra frekvensbalans och nivåbalans, lite mycket efterklang, bra dynamik men aningen för hög snare och för låg sång, Bra stereobredd. Lite basfattig.

evaluations.comment: Nice balance between the instruments, even though it can be a bit loud in the treble from the guitar at times. Good stereo image and [I] like how the vocals work together with the choir/backing vocals.
evaluations.original: Fin instrumentbalans, även om den kan vara lite stark i diskanten från gitarren ibland. Bra stereobild och gillar hur sången arbetar tillsammans med kören.

evaluations.comment: Too much snare+ its reverb. Other than that perhaps a bit too airy, treble-heavy.
evaluations.original: För mycket virvel+ reverbet på den. Annars kanske lite för luftig, diskantrik

evaluations.comment: Too loud snare, otherwise good! A bit too sharp/bity in my opinion [or "for my taste"].
evaluations.original: För stark snare, i övrigt bra! lite för vass för mitt tycke.

evaluations.comment: Good Groove, and a good feeling, though the snare is way too heavily compressed. Also it sounds very much "radio speaker" [loudspeaker, not a person speaking] (Boosted frequencies from 100 Hz -> 5 kHz in an arc)
evaluations.original: Bra Groove, och bra känsla, dock är virveln alldeles för hårt komprimerad. Samt låter väldigt "radiohögtalare" (Höjt frekvenserna från 100Hz -> 5kHz i en båge)

evaluations.comment: A bit sharp/hard and "essy". [As in the syllable you use a de-esser to get rid of.] Otherwise a nice balance. Maybe a bit too much snare.
evaluations.original: Lite vass och "essig". Annars bra balans. Kanske lite mycket virvel.

evaluations.comment: A bit too much bass has been cut away from the vocals. I doesn't feel like the lead vocal dub syncs when it's present.
evaluations.original: Lite mycket bas skuren från sången. Känns inte som om leadsångdubben synkar där den finns med.

evaluations.comment: A little too much treble, it cuts in the ears but apart from that a very good mix.
evaluations.original: Lite för mycket diskant, det skär en hel del i öronen men annars en väldigt bra mix

evaluations.comment: Open and airy mix. A bit too much treble, though. The snare also breaks through too much.
evaluations.original: Öppen och luftig mix. Aningen mycket diskant, dock. Virveln gick också igenom för mycket.

evaluations.comment: Too "middy" vocals [refers too midrange], apart from that a quite good mix, good reverberation on the snare.
evaluations.original: För "midig" sång, annars ganska bra mix, bra efterklang på virveln.

evaluations.comment: A bit too heavily compressed. A bit muddy in placed, with the background vocals. Nice frequency and audio balance.
evaluations.original: Lite för hårt komprimerad. Lite grötig på sina ställen, med bakgrundssången. Bra frekvens- och ljud-balans.

evaluations.comment: Overly compressed snaredrum, that also has a gate that's too heavy (too short release time). Loose vocals [loose might not be the right translation. The word I'm looking for is the opposite of musical tightness.], probably due to pre-delay of some sort. Would also need de-essing.
evaluations.original: Överkomprimerad virveltrumma, som även har en för hård gate (för kort release tid). Otight sång, förmodligen p.g.a. pre-delay av något slag. Skulle även behöva de-esser.

evaluations.comment: Very hard snare, with a reverb that's a little too short. Too heavily compressed? The vocals are somewhat quieter that the rest of the mix. When the background vocals entered, the mix became very messy.
evaluations.original: Väldigt hård snare, med ett lite för kort reverb. För hårt komprimerad? Sången är något svagare resten av mixen. När bakgrundssången kom in blev mixen väldigt rörig.

evaluations.comment: Poor balance [probably level, not frequency] nice snare a bit much reverb
evaluations.original: Dåligt balans snygg virvel lite mycket reverb

evaluations.comment: A bit to "eq:ed" voice. [Meaning it feels too processed.] Otherwise good.
evaluations.original: Lite för "eq:ad" röst. Annars bra.

evaluations.comment: Feels very compressed/highly limited. Nice snare but it's too far forward [in the mix, probably meaning too loud] so it and its reverb takes over a bit. The voice feels kind of flat [not in terms of pitch] and is placed too far back [once again probably meaning level, not spacial placement].
evaluations.original: Känns väldigt komprimerad/limiterad. Skön snare, men den ligger lite väl mycket i framkant så den och dess reverb tar över lite. Rösten känns rätt platt och ligger för mycket i bakkant.

evaluations.comment: Very nasal, too much treble. Relatively good reverberation though. Interesting work with the choir/backing vocals, but it gets a bit too much. Lead vox too quiet.
evaluations.original: Väldigt nasal, för mycket diskant. Relativt bra efterklang dock. Intressant arbete med kören, men det blir lite för mycket. Leadvox för svagt.

evaluations.comment: Distinctive snare, a bit too snappy.
evaluations.original: Utmärkande virvel, lite för ärtig.

evaluations.comment: Messy
evaluations.original: Rörig

evaluations.comment: A little sharp, especially the snare drum.
evaluations.original: Lite hård, speciellt virveltrumman.

evaluations.comment: Too distinct vocals. Slapback delay on the vocals? [The delay] gives a very disorienting effect.
evaluations.original: För tydlig sång. Slapback delay på sång? Ger en väldigt desorienterande effekt.

evaluations.comment: A little too sharp [or cutting], the cymbals and snare takes over. The vocals sound a bit nasal and needs more warmth.
evaluations.original: Lite för vass, cymbalerna och virveln tar öven. Sången låter lite nasal och behöver mer värme.

evaluations.comment: Very thin sounding vocals. Weirdly filtered in the mid range.
evaluations.original: Väldigt tunt sound på sången. Konstigt skuren i mellanregistret.

evaluations.comment: Too much treble. The drums take over.
evaluations.original: För mycket diskant. Trummorna tar överhanden.

evaluations.comment: Lacks mid and is a little sharp/edgy in the treble. The snare doesn't glue too the rest of the mix.
evaluations.original: Saknar mid samt lite hård i diskant. Snaren limmar inte riktigt i mixen.

evaluations.comment: The kick in this mix is almost non-existent, the whole mix lacks low frequencies.
evaluations.original: Kicken i denna mix finns nästan inte, hela mixen saknar låga frekvenser.

evaluations.comment: Interesting approach to the drums. I like the snare but I don't know if it really fits this musical style/genre. I gets a little too aggressive.
evaluations.original: Intressant approach till trummorna. Jag gillar virveln men jag är osäker på om det verkligen passar till den här musikstilen. Blir lite väl aggressivt.

evaluations.comment: It appears to me a very compressed guitar. The vocals are a bit too quiet. The snare sounds like pea-shooter [or maybe BB Gun is a more appropriate translation], meaning a "plopping" sound, with a lot of reverberation. The organ in this mix seems to be the best since it binds the mix together when it plays.
evaluations.original: Väldigt komprimerad gitarr verkar det som. Sången är lite för svag. Virveln låter lite som en ärtbössa, alltså som ett "plopp", med mycket efterklang. Orgeln verkar vara det bästa i denna mix då den binder ihop mixen där den spelar.

evaluations.comment: Too sharp/hard and loud snare that also has to much reverb. That is what's negative, otherwise good. Some instruments would have been better with a bit of reverb.
evaluations.original: För hård och stark virvel som även har för mycket reverb. Det är dock det som drar ner låten för i övrigt bra. Vissa instrument skulle må bra av lite reverb.

evaluations.comment: [Hard to translate literally. It means the mix has extreme levels of treble/high frequencies.]
evaluations.original: Extremt top-ig.

evaluations.comment: Too heavily compressed, poor dynamics. Poor levels, it sound as if it distorts. Messy. [It doesn't actually say "distar", the Swedish word for "distort", it says "diskar" which means "washing-up" but I'm fairly confident that the student meant "distar". :) ]
evaluations.original: För starkt komprimerat, dålig dynamik. Dåliga nivåer, låter som det diskar. Rörigt.

evaluations.comment: i like this one but it's a bit thin on the low end.
clear rhythm and balance between singer voice and music
Nothing to say about this mix. Everything is together!!
evaluations.original: Nao tenho nada a apontar a esta mistura. Está tudo no sitio!

evaluations.comment: It seems clear. I like how I listen to the instruments. Maybe it lacks of cohesion. Sharp.
interesting reverberation; nice quality choir; interesting panning; interesting guitar on the right channel.
evaluations.original: reverberação interessante; coro bem conseguido; panorâmicas interessantes; guitarra interessante no canal direito

evaluations.comment: poor,seems too separated and not grouping
Excellent mix. Great relationship between frequencies. All elements are there and without exageration. The bass guitar could be a touch louder.
evaluations.original: Excelente mistura. Ótima razão entre frequências. Todos os elementos se fazem perceber sem exageros. Falta um pouco de ganho no baixo.

evaluations.comment: The best out of the bunch.  Tight, controlled.
hi hat too present/ snare nice snap but no body
good hat level.  good mix.  not quite enough bass.
Individual elements stand out distinctly, but the overall mix is cohesive. Spectrally balanced, nice tight ambience
Snare feels thinner here. Kick needs more body from the low end. Vocals need more reverb.
Seems a bit harsh. Nice mix. Drums seem to tend a bit to the right.
Good one. Too bright hi-hat, bass should have more presence.
This was the mix that sounded best to me. I however think that the backing vocals should have a little bit reverb, in order to enhance spaciousness.
evaluations.original: Foi a mistura que melhor me suou. No entanto, acho que as back vocals deviam ter um pouco de reverb para dar a noção de maior espacialidade.

evaluations.comment:
- Vocals too high (but good use of backvocals)
- Nice guitars location (left and right)
It has a good EQ. Sounds good.
Snare has less definition than the remaining versions. Too much high-end.
evaluations.original: tarola tem menos definição do que as outras. Demasiadas frequências agudas.

evaluations.comment: Sounds dry
The hi-hat is too proeminent. Vocals are well placed within the mix and the choir.
evaluations.original: O prato de choques está demasiado presente. A voz está bem posicionada com a mistura e com o coro.

evaluations.comment: For the small intergetions of the guitar panned off to the sides makes sense to me.  They don't get in the way of grooving instruments.  Altough, the background vocals are too loud because they cover up everything else when they come in.
thin and crisp, clear distribution (panning), but a little too much highs (especially hihat)
highlight hi-hat，little noisy
hat sticks out too much
The vocals could be louder. Cymbals, even though helping to brighten the song, are too loud. The choir is processed in a way that is deterimental to the song.
evaluations.original: Voz poderia estar um pouco mais alta. Pratos ainda que ajudem a dar brilho à música, estão demasiado altos. Coros com tratamento que não beneficia a música.

evaluations.comment: Mix is quite bright but well balanced. Brightness is not for me personally but it's not offensive. Bass guitar could be a bit more upfront.
Similar to track 6 but a little brighter. However too bright and quickly becomes difficult to listen to.
wimpy
Too busy, drums overpower the vocals.
hats too high. doesn't generally gel well
Too much high hat.
drums too bright
not much ambience
Bass is not present enough and makes the song loose its swing. The electric guitar stands out too much in the mix.
evaluations.original: baixo pouco presente faz com a música perca o balanço;  guitarra eléctrica muito a frente na mistura

evaluations.comment: Brrrright. Like the gtr/wurli relationship, but the hihats are pretty distracting
I can hear all the sounds strongly.
Drums too bright, there is no beef at all. More punch in the drums. Levels are OK.
Sounds small and a little bright. kinda band-limited, i love lo-fi, not this way.
toodry, untreated.snare is leftish - distracting. guitar licks dwarf vocal at times/
hit hat is too bright
The drums don't sound right. Maybe too loud.
Way too much treble in drums and vocals
no low end, very bright
[McG-pro2] turn down that high shelf! It's just too much, can't take it.
harsh high hat sound. Does not fill the stereo field. balance between L and R is not right. heavily panned toward left
What? No low end, no groove. Super not OK
Holy hi hat! Where is the kick?
Nicely balanced
wet,浑厚，各方面平均
ok low end, vocal could be a bit brighter
Nice organ. Nice bass. Also the vocals are well arranged with the rest. Groovy. Good also when listening at high volume. A bit muffled on lows.
music rhythm quite weak
Yeah! Low end on the bass is too much, makes it feel too loud. I like the balance overall. Fix the bass and collect your Grammy
good one, not very bright.
A little too much lows on the bass, too boomy. Drums sound OK. Vocals too loud overall.
sounds good
Not bad, but strong low sound
pretty good, just the vocal needs more automation
Nice natural sounding snare, could be a touch louder. Kick and bass guitar mixed well, mix has a strong bottom end; Perhaps could use a touch of high-pass at mastering
A little bit too much reverb on vocals. Just a tad.
Believe this may be over compressed. Not feeling a full dynamic range is present.
ok

Clear room for the kick and bass to be heard independantly, but still work together. Rhodes louder. Reverb on the rhythm section stuff less, but I like what it's doing for the vocal. I would like the reverb brighter. Some more presence in the lead vocal would be nice - especially the BG vocals louder and more present.
Sounds good but the EQ needs to be much improved.
snare too far back. voc a little thick., nice org presentation
use a better vocal verb. otherwise cool.
too much bass and not enough presence in the vocal
bass boomy - lacks definition
not bad
Bass a bit loud. Not a huge fan of the verb.
Nice! A little beefy in the low mids, maybe too much, also a little long on the verb
vocal could be a little brighter
sound in the left side is strengthened
Bad EQ on Bass, OK balance. Lacks of power.
Too much low end on bass guitar. Vocal reverb is too long for my taste, and too bright. Stereo image is nice and wide. A little dark over all.
Vocals a little low-mid heavy. Good bass, but too much maybe.
The drums don't sound panned at all.  Also, the vocals sit too far back in the mix.  Background vocals are panned wide, which is peferred.
muffled - too bassy
Very subtle mix, but lacks impact.
Too much low end. Clouding what could otherwise be an OK mix.
reverb too much/wrong.  vocal spread is neat, but evertyhing sounds separated
bad rides on vocal.  verb on Lead Voc out of perspective.  weird drum perspective (too low). bass too loud
too much bass
really muddy and veiled
Very similar to track 0 but a little more life, some more dynamics. Vocals far too quiet, cannot hear some lyrics
Would have needed a bit more "eq" on the voice and less effects added to the voice.
evaluations.original: hade behövts lite mer "eq" på rösten samt mindre effekter tillagd på rösten.

evaluations.comment: Well balanced mix every part of it has its place and is audible, well mixed vocals and good reverberation.
evaluations.original: Välbalanserad mix alla komponenter har sin plats och hörs, bra mixad sång och bra efterklang.

evaluations.comment: Nice clarity. Stable mix.
evaluations.original: Fin klarhet. Stabil mix.

evaluations.comment: The snare rings a bit, but other that that it's a good mix. [I] would wish the automation of the reverb on the lead vocals wasn't so tangible.
evaluations.original:
Virveln ringer något, men annars är det en bra mix.
Skulle önska att automationen av reverbet på lead-sången inte var så påtagande.

evaluations.comment: Nice balance. A bit dry.
evaluations.original: Bra balans. Något torr.

evaluations.comment: A nice soft mix. Lacks quite a bit in the low end.
evaluations.original: En fin mjuk mix. Saknar en del botten.

evaluations.comment: nice balance, a bit too poor snare.
evaluations.original: snygg balans, lite för fattig snare.

evaluations.comment: Well balanced but feels a bit closed off/muted from time to time (but also in a good way).
evaluations.original: Bra balanserad men känns dock något instängd ibland (men även på ett bra sätt).

evaluations.comment: Good level balance and dynamic range. A bit too much reverberation on the the choir/backing vocals and a little narrow stereo width.
evaluations.original: Bra nivåbalans och dynamik. Lite mycket efterklang på kör och lite smal stereobredd.

evaluations.comment: Good levels and dynamic range but there is some weird sound in the reverb that I don't think suits very well. could have been more reverb on the instruments that are too dry and [it] doesn't really glue together.
evaluations.original: Bra nivåer och dynamik men det är nåt konstigt sound på reverbet som jag inte tycker passar så bra. kunde vart lite mer reverb på instrumenten som är för torra och limmar inte riktigt

evaluations.comment: A bit too heavy in the mid range frequencies, but has a nice balance.
evaluations.original: Lite för tung i midfrekvenserna, men har en bra balans.

evaluations.comment: nice balance a lot of reverb on the choir/backing vocals a bit too much mid [range]
evaluations.original: bra balans mycket reverb på kören lite mycket låg mid

evaluations.comment: Decent level balance, but lacks a bit of low end. Feels like there's phase incoherence with the guitar or something and it gets a lot quite in mono. The choir/backing vocals could have been panned to the sides to have a bigger effect. It gets weak when it's in mono. And the reverb doesn't really suit this mix.
evaluations.original: Hyfsad nivåbalans, men saknar lite botten. Känns som att det uppstår fasfel med gitarren eller något och den blir mycket svagare i mono. Kören kunde ha panorerats ut till sidorna för att den ska ha en större effekt. Blir lite klent när den ligger i mono. Samt att reverbet inte riktigt passar till denna mix.

evaluations.comment: The guitar could have been placed more in the middle, too much reverberation on the choir/backing vocals and sometimes on the vocals, overall good
evaluations.original: gitarren kunde ha legat mer i mitten, för mycket efterklang på kören och ibland på sången, överlag bra

evaluations.comment: A bit stripped down. The voice is well mixed.
evaluations.original: Lite för avskalad. Rösten är bra mixad.

evaluations.comment: [I] like it, Maybe it's a bit too airy. Then where is the snare drum??
evaluations.original: Gillar den, Kanske att den är lite för luftig. Sen vart är virveln??

evaluations.comment: Generally a good mix. I think the backing vocals/choir and sometimes the lead vocals have a bit too much and weird reverb.
evaluations.original: Generellt bra mix. Jag tycker körerna och stundvis leadsången har lite för mycket och konstigt reverb.

evaluations.comment: Too "burkigt". Weird reverberation on the choir/backing vocals. Otherwise relatively good balance. Kind of dry.
evaluations.original: För burkig. Konstig efterklang på kören. Relativt bra balans annars. Ganska torr.

evaluations.comment: A guitar is to the left and is very prominent. It sounds very weird, because sometimes it's almost coming from behind in the room. The choir/backing vocals have way to much reverberation.
evaluations.original: En gitarr ligger till vänster och är väldigt framträdande. Den låter väldigt konstig, för ibland kommer den nästan bakifrån i rummet. Kören har alldeles för mycket efterklang.

evaluations.comment: The vocals are a bit dull/muffled, probably due to how they have EQed them. The instruments lacks a bit in the bass and a bit to sharp/harsh in the treble. There are too much reverb in the part where the choir/backing vocals enterers.
evaluations.original: Sången är lite dov, antagligen på grund av hur de har EQ;at den. Instrumenten är lite basfattiga och lite för skarpa i diskonten. I partiet där kören kommer in så är det för mycket reverb.

evaluations.comment: Tail-heavy. Lacks distinctness/clarity, sounds kinda closed off/muted.
evaluations.original: Baktung. Saknar tydlighet, låter instängd typ.

evaluations.comment: Okay [or maybe fair] mix. But overall kind of hollow. Less reverb on the vocals!
evaluations.original: Helt okej mix. Men överlag ganska ihålig. Mindre reverb på sången!

evaluations.comment: I like the reverb, but it is a bit too much reverb on the choir/backing vocals.
evaluations.original: Jag gillar reverbet, men det är lite för mycket reverb på kören.

evaluations.comment: Too much fx on choir/backing vocals. Kind of mushy in the vocal tracks.
evaluations.original: För mycket fx på kör. Lite grötig i sångspåren.

evaluations.comment: sounds a bit metallic.
evaluations.original: låter lite metalisk.

evaluations.comment: The mix lacks low, too wet. The audio levels are a bit unbalanced.
evaluations.original: Mixen saknar low, för blöt. Ljudnivåerna är en aning obalanserade.

evaluations.comment:
"Pappig" snare drum. ["Pappig" in this context means that the snare sound resembles that of cardboard or a cardboard box.]
 Weird reverb that enters after a while.
 The vocals are too far in the back [of the sonic image].
evaluations.original:
Pappig virvel.
Skumt reverb som kommer in efter ett tag.
Sången är långt bak.

evaluations.comment: Something weird with the electric guitar since it sounds as if there is a problem with the phase. Other than that a generally okay mix of the volume of the instruments. The snare drum sounds thin as well.
evaluations.original: Något skumt med elgitarren då det låter som den har problem med i fas. Annars en generellt okej mix med volym på instrument. Snare trumman låter även tunn.

evaluations.comment: good levels. kind of thin though. Don't like the sound of the snare, lacks [or I lack, perhaps] the feeling.
evaluations.original: bra nivåer. dock något tunn. Gillar ej ljudet på virveln, saknar känslan.

evaluations.comment: Very dry. The bass sticks out a bit too much but other than that a fairly pleasant distribution of the instruments. A bit weird reverbs on the choir/backing vocals. Feels "muddy" and lacks high frequencies.
evaluations.original: Väldigt torr. Basen sticker ut lite väl men i övrigt ganska behaglig fördelning utav instrumenten. Lite konstiga reverb på kören.  Känns "muddig" och saknar högra frekvenser.

evaluations.comment: Weak mix, [weak as in lacks power, not necessarily as in bad] but good levels. Good width, I like what they intended with the guitar panning.
evaluations.original: Klen mix, men bra nivåer. Bra bredd, jag gillar hur ni tänkt med gitarrpanorering.

evaluations.comment: Kind of a sprawling mix, [I] thought it felt very dynamic in the vocals. The choir/backing vocals had too much "bathroom echo".
evaluations.original: Lite spretig mix, tycket att det kändes väldigt dynamiskt i sången. Kören hade för mycket "badrumseko".

evaluations.comment: Bad sound on the vocals, too much reverb. The band sounds good.
evaluations.original: Dåligt sound på sången, för mycket reverb. Bandet låter bra.

evaluations.comment: Too much reverb on- [Yes, the comment says the Swedish eqiuvalent of "on-" without specifying what on refers to. It's possible that it means "There is too much reverb on this".] Lacks low end in the drums. The guitars are very nice in panning and eq. Poor compression on the vocals (are there any at all?), The bass lacks low en. The kick drum sounds as if it has [been processed with] an extreme compressor with a bit longer attack time, or a short delay. There's a reverb on the vocals that has way too long pre delay, sounds as if the dude is standing in a big shower. The vocals doesn't mix with the choir/backing vocals.
evaluations.original: För mycket reverb på- Saknar botten i trummorna. Gitarrerna är mycket snygga i panorering och eq. Dålig komprimering på sången (är det någon i huvud taget?). Basen saknar botten.  Bastrumman låter som att den har en extrem kompressor med lite längre attacktid, eller ett kort delay.  De kommer ett reverb på sången som har alldeles för långt pre delay, låter som att snubben står i en stor dusch. Sången sitter inte ihop med kören.

evaluations.comment: No reverberation. Dry. Only reverberation on the vocals which is too distinct.
evaluations.original: ingen efterklang. Torr. Bara efterklang på sång vilken är för tydlig.

evaluations.comment: Closed-off/Muted mix that lacks depth. The vocals sound good with good dynamic range and frequency spectrum. Same for the drums. The choir/backing vocals is loud and has a "bathroom reverb" that's used too much.
evaluations.original: Instängd mix som saknar djup. Sången låter bra med bra dynamik och frekvensspektrum. Samma för trummor. Körer för starka och med ett badrums-reverb som det är för mycket av.

evaluations.comment: Lacks dynamic range. Dull. the effects are too loud.
evaluations.original: Saknar dynamik. Dov. för starka effekter.

evaluations.comment: Too little bass, sounds a bit radio-like. A bit boomy with some annoying mid-frequencies popping out. The reverb does not fit the song, it's too "hard". [The student wrote the comment in English.]
evaluations.original: Too little bass, sounds a bit radio-like. A bit boomy with some annoying mid-frequencies popping out. The reverb does not fit the song, it's too "hard".

evaluations.comment: Really good!
evaluations.original: Riktigt bra!

evaluations.comment: Very heavy on the right. [I assume it refers to the panning leaning heavily on the right speaker]. Apart from that the best mix.
evaluations.original: Väldigt högertung. Annars den bästa mixen.

evaluations.comment: Very well balanced.
evaluations.original: Väldigt bra avvägd.

evaluations.comment: The vocals are panned too much to the right and they're a bit too loud and pokes out of the mix. Otherwise it's a good mix of the instruments.
evaluations.original: Sången är för mycket panorerad till höger samt att den är lite väl stark och utstickande i mixen. Annars så en bra mix på instrumenten.

evaluations.comment: Nice mix a lot lies too the right in the mix which was distracting/irritating.
evaluations.original: Snygg mix mycket ligger till höger i mixen vilket var lite störande.

evaluations.comment: Good but the lead vocals are a little too protruding. a little dull
evaluations.original: Bra men leadsången är lite för utstående. lite dov

evaluations.comment: Sounds a bit tail-heavy, too "maffigt" ["much", "big", "extreme", something in between those]. Otherwise fine.
evaluations.original: Låter lite baktung, för maffigt reverb. Annars helt okej.

evaluations.comment: Nice balance between the instruments (frequency-wise). A little too much reverb on the snare.
evaluations.original: Bra balans mellan instrumenten (frekvensmessigt). Lite mycket reverb på virveln.

evaluations.comment: The vocals seems too emit mostly from the right, and the guitar as well. Something seems to have happened to the panning. Otherwise the song is well-mixed with distinct vocals and nice drums. However there is some kind of reverberation on the guitar that makes it sound as if it's played in a church. This doesn't fit in at all.
evaluations.original: Sången verkar komma mest från höger, och gitarren likaså. Något verkar alltså hänt med panoreringen. Låten är annars välmixad med framträdande och tydlig sång och snygga trummor. Det ligger dock en efterklang på gitarren som får den att låta som att den spelas i en kyrka. Passar inte alls in.

evaluations.comment: Firstly a lot is panned to the right. Apart from that a good mix with good frequency range.
evaluations.original: För det första ligger mycket panorerat till höger. Annars är det en bra mix med bra frekvens omfång.

evaluations.comment: Nice sound, though strangely panned. Too much reverb (and most of all a reverb that don't suit the tight character of the song).
evaluations.original: Bra sound, väldigt konstig panorering dock. För mycket reverb (och framför allt ett reverb som inte alls passar låtens tighta karaktär).

evaluations.comment: The entire mix is panned to the right (probably by mistake). Otherwise a good mix. A little too dry but it suits the style. Had gotten a higher rating if it wasn't for the panning.
evaluations.original: Hela mixen är högerpanorerad (troligtvis ett misstag). Annars bra mix. Lite torr men det passar stilen. Hade fått högre betyg om det inte vore för panoreringen.

evaluations.comment: Lacks quite a lot of bass in the mix otherwise good.
evaluations.original: Saknar ganska mycket bas i mixen annars bra.

evaluations.comment: Very good balance between instruments and the vocals, the frequency spectrum is very well used. But, very much panned to the right, I feel like almost all of the sound comes from the right speaker.
evaluations.original: Väldigt bra balans mellan instrumenten och sången, frekvensspektrat är väldigt bra använt. Men, väldigt högerpanorerat, jag upplever nästan bara ljud från den högra högtalaren.

evaluations.comment: Nice balance. Louder in the right channel.
evaluations.original: Bra balans. Starkare i höger kanal.

evaluations.comment: The warmth and distinction is there, but the mix is a bit closed-off/muted. Apart from that I like the balance between the instruments.
evaluations.original: Värmen och tydligheten finns, men mixen är lite instängd. Annars gillar jag balansen mellan instrumenten.

evaluations.comment: mix too much too the right.
evaluations.original: mix för mycket åt höger.

evaluations.comment: "Boxy" mix, very dry. Kind of nice reverberation on the guitar though. Otherwise a relatively good balance.
evaluations.original: Burkig mix, väldigt torr. Dock rätt skön efterklang på gitarren. Relativt bra balans annars.

evaluations.comment: A little too much reverb on the guitar, weird stereo level mixning and too "thick" sound.
evaluations.original: lite för mycket reverb på gitarr, konstig ljudnivåmixning och för "tjockt" ljud

evaluations.comment: Most elements lies too the right, which makes it very weird to listen too. Somewhat closed-off/muted [as in muted trumpet] mix.
evaluations.original: Det mesta ligger i höger, vilket gör det väldigt konstigt att lyssna på. Något instängd mix.

evaluations.comment: The mix is a bit too dry. Otherwise okay balance in levels, the electric guitars could have been a bit louder. Lacks punch, the kick is almost non-existent.
evaluations.original: Mixen är en aning för torr. Annars okej balans i ljudnivåerna, elgitarrerna kunde ha fått vara lite starkare. Saknar punch, kicken är nästan borta.

evaluations.comment: Oh/Wow/Oops. [In a negative sense.] Lame mix and the energy level is much more too the right. What happened? Very dry. Apart from that levels and frequency balance is good. A little more low end in the bass perhaps.
evaluations.original: Oj. Lam mix och det är mycket mer energi på höger sida. Vad hände där? Väldigt torr. Annars är nivåer och spektralbalans bra. Lite mer botten i basen kanske.

evaluations.comment: It feels like everything comes from the right side. Slant mix but it sound okay in mono. The reverb is a little too long. Lacks reverb/delay on the vocals.
evaluations.original: Känns som allt kommer från höger sida. Sned mix men låter helt ok i mono. Lite för långt reverb. Saknas reverb/delay på sången.

evaluations.comment: The sound only comes from the right, other than that a good mix.
evaluations.original: Bara ljud i höger, utöver det bra mix

evaluations.comment: Leans a bit too the right channel. A bit closed-off/muted and dry.
evaluations.original: Lutar över lite åt höger kanal. Lite instängd och torr.

evaluations.comment: Very "Right-heavy", feels like my left ear is blocked [or that he is having "airplane ears" on his left ear].
evaluations.original: Väldigt "Högertung", känns som jag har lock för vänster öra.

evaluations.comment: Right heavy. Otherwise it's good but since it's so heavy on the right it [the rating] gets pulled down.
evaluations.original: Höger tung. Annars är den bra men eftersom den är så höger tung så dras allt ner.

evaluations.comment: Too distinct vocals. Too quiet instruments. No reverberation.
evaluations.original: För tydlig sång. För låga instrument. Ingen efterklang.

evaluations.comment: Dull mix. Warm. Panned to the right?
evaluations.original: Dov mix. Varm.  Högerpanorerad?

evaluations.comment: The mix lies too much too the right and is fairly hard/sharp. Lacks fullness in the bass and needs more width in the stereo image.
evaluations.original: Mixen ligger för mycket åt höger och är ganska hård. Saknar fyllighet i basen och behöver mer bredd i stereobilden.

evaluations.comment: The voice is a little too dry and takes over a bit too much. The stereo image [literally "sound image"] leans a bit too the right. The guitar has a reverb that don't really feels appropriate on it.
evaluations.original: Rösten lite väl torr och tar över lite för mycket. Ljudbilden lutar lite åt höger. Gitarren har ett reverb som inte riktigt passar in på den.

evaluations.comment: Less good levels levels. [The Swedish word for levels, "nivÌ´er", are written twice in a row.] Poorly panned "narrow". Good effects. okay warming, okay dynamics.
evaluations.original: mindre bra nivåer nivåer. Dåligt panorerat "smalt". Bra effekter. okej värmer, okej dynamik.

evaluations.comment: The mix leans to the right, but other than that the frequency spectrum is good.
evaluations.original: Mixen lutar åt höger, men annars bra i frekvensspektret.

evaluations.comment: Sound dull/tubby. In need of eq.
evaluations.original: låter doft/mullig. Skulle behövas eq.

evaluations.comment: Too much that's placed to the right.
evaluations.original: För mycket som ligger i höger.

evaluations.comment: The stereo image feels very uneven. Everything leans to the right.
evaluations.original: Stereobilden känns väldigt ojämn. Allt lutar åt höger.

evaluations.comment: Felt very right-heavy. Very dry except for a guitar reverb that sticks out very much. Lacks a bit i the higher frequencies.
evaluations.original: Kändes väldigt högertung. Väldigt torr förutom ett gitarreverb som sticker ut väldigt. Saknar lite i de höga frekvenserna.

evaluations.comment: The whole mix is overly panned to the right. It feels as if I've gotten my left ear blocked [or that he is having "airplane ears" on his left ear]. It makes it hard to assess how the mix i made. Other than that the levels are good‰Û_
evaluations.original: Hela mixen är överpanorerad till höger. Känns som man har fått lock för vänster öra. Blir svårt att avgöra hur mixen är gjord. Nivåerna är väl bra annars...

evaluations.comment: Goldilocks zone of track 1 and 3, not too bright not too dark. Wonderful balance, good energy and lovely space. All the little synth/keys are individually placed. Foot tapping along!
Nice and wide and balanced
interesting reverberation; nice quality choir; interesting panning.
evaluations.original: reverberação interessante; coro bem conseguido; panorâmicas interessantes

evaluations.comment: the verb decay is a little distracting but otherwise it sits evrything comes through well
Too much reverb. Nice groove. Too much bass (maybe it's the room).
thin mix with too much verb. and the guitar verb freaks me out.
Interesting vocal spread? Cool instrumental positioning. Too much reverb on right guitar?
The vocal is too loud and all the mix lacks body and brightness. However, the little reverbs add more dynamics [sic].
evaluations.original: A voz está muito alta e toda a mistura está com poucos copro e brilho. No entanto os pequenos rverbs oferecem-lhe mais dinâmica.

evaluations.comment: Super bright, no power, no lows.

Consiste mix, yet there is too much high-end and hi-hat and overhead proeminence. Excessive processing in the aforementioned elements. The backing vocals are too proeminent on the chorus. Nice work with panning the pianos versus the guitars. The bass guitar is consistent and carefully measured [sic].
evaluations.original: Mistura consistente porém apresenta excesso de agudos e da presença de hi hats e overheads na bateria. Excesso de processamento nas mesmas peças. Backing Vocals demasiadamente presentes no refrão. Bom trabalho nas panorâmicas dos pianos vs guitarras. Baixo consistente e na medida correta.

evaluations.comment: The electric piano with a delay effect is stealing a bit of attention from the rest of the song. It also masks a good part of the drums.
evaluations.original: O piano eléctrico com delay rouba um pouco da atenção do resto da música. E também esconde um bom pedaço da bateria.

evaluations.comment: Tad too much reverb
nice balance, verb jumps out too much occasionally on organ and vox, lacks a bit of bass
Quite balanced. Piano has excessive reverb.
evaluations.original: bastante equilibrada, piano com excesso de reverb

evaluations.comment: good drums
Mid-heavy mix, not unpleasant. Snare needs to pop more. Nicely balanced reverb. A touch of high-end lift at mastering would improve the overall sound.
Good spatial width and clarity of all elements, but there is too little strength on the bottom-end. The guitar is too reverberant.
evaluations.original: Boa abertura e clareza dos elementos mas falta um pouco de força nos graves. Guitarra com demasiado reverb.

evaluations.comment: Very bright, the balance on the drum kit isn't right.

- Abusive reverb in the vocals
- Drums could be higher (particularly the snare)
The reverb on the vocals seems to be a bit late. Probably should have be less reverb on keyboards. Needs a bit more punch on the drums. Good back vocals.
I feel that the vocals are too seperated from everything else.  I think it needs to be turned up a little more.
rhythm instruments too panned and too much reverb, nice space and live feel
Too bright overall, there's no lows... Nice organ level. Too much verb overall, this is funk..... Nice back vocals.
lots of 1K in voc. R voc double too loud org too loud in places, needs rides. guitar is thin
I would loose some of the vocal reverberation and also that of some instruments. Backing vocals sound more defined than the main vocal. In the chorus they are definitely louder.
evaluations.original: Tirava um pouco da reverberação da voz e de alguns instrumentos. Backvocals parecem ter mais definição do que a voz. No refrão estão definitivamente mais altas

evaluations.comment: Rhythm sensation is strong but BGM sounds a little segregate.
The keyboards are too loud in relationship to the remaining instrumental part.
evaluations.original: Teclas muito altas e voz em relação ao restante instrumental.

evaluations.comment: same like track7，but all instruments sounds listen more close to me
unclear
Not much bass cutting thought on this track.Nice panning of instruments
snare too low
vocals too much to the front

You destroyed the drums with that compressor (shame on you). Slapback on the organ ain't nice. Oh lord that compression, please dial it down, let them drums breathe. Kick is too cardboardy. Organ gets too loud it takes the attention out of the vocals.
not enough snare.  verb on elec piano out of place.
Drums less punchy, vocals at the front.

Rhodes keys too soft in soloing lick. Strange dark hall-like reverb on guitar and keys with a delay on it?? Nice BG vox reverb and balance the double. Good level of bass. Snare needs more snap and high end. Nice kick punchiness.
These verbs are really odd, and then why is the voice so dry in comparison. Drums sound really anemic - too much super high end and not enough punch.
balanced sound
Low end is too weak in kick drum and bass guitar. Reverb on electric piano is not to my taste. For this music I prefer a dry tight sound. Guitars don't cut through the mix like they could, too dark.
Too bright and thin hi hat
drums sound thin
Too wet!! Need more snare.
harsh and thin with too much reverb trail
singer voice too loud,rhythm quite weak
excellent and the vocal is dominant and can be separated  from the sound of the musical instrument,compare to track1 , in left side, some sound seem to be strengthened.
no low end, too bright, too much reverb

Drums sound really nice, groove well.  Not a fan of that one guitar part which has two microphones panned left and right.  Bass is a bit too loud, almost as loud as the lead.  Maybe the lead could have been a bit louder, and certainly have a bit more high.  Balance is really good otherwise.  Not a lot of high.
evaluations.original:
-Drums klinken lekker, groovet goed.
-Geen fan van die ene gitaarpartij wiens twee microfoons links en rechts gepanned zijn.
-Bas zit iets te luid, ze staat bijna even luid als de lead. De lead had misschien wel wat luider gemogen en zeker wat meer hoog hebben.
-Balans zit voor de rest echt wel goed.
-Weinig hoog.

evaluations.comment: Vocal maybe a bit too quiet?
evaluations.original: Vocal misschien iets te stil?

evaluations.comment: Kick has a bit too much attack.  Apart from that I quite like this balance.
evaluations.original: Kick bevat iets te veel attack.Voor de rest vind ik deze balans wel oké.

evaluations.comment: Quite dull , sounds as though something is wrong with the phase?
evaluations.original: vrij dof , klinkt alsof er iets mis is met fase ?

evaluations.comment: The mix could be brighter.  I'm missing quite a bit of low in the bass  and kick.  If there would be a bit more reverb,  the hi-hats would maybe shine a bit more.  The balance is quite cool though.
evaluations.original:
De mix mag wat brighter. Ik mis precies ook wat heel laag in de bass en kick. Als er iets meer reverb op stond, 
zouden de hi hats misschien wat meer shinen. De balans is wel cool.

evaluations.comment: The mix sounds a bit 'honky'  and is very dry,  but its style is consistent.  Little top high,  but the groove remains intact due to the prominent bass.  The choice for a loud kick  seems to compromise the balance of the vocal.  The backbeat with among others the snare is more important in this song.  In mono the mix retains its strength,  but the loud kick is even more apparent.
evaluations.original:
De mix klinkt wat 'honky' en is erg droog, maar is wel stijlvast. Weinig tophoog , maar de groove blijft intact door de prominente bas.
De keuze voor de luide kick lijkt de balans van de stem te compromitteren. De afterbeat met o.a. de snare is in deze song belangrijker.
In mono behoudt de mix zijn kracht, maar valt de luide kick nog meer op

evaluations.comment: There is just a tad too much bass guitar in this mix.  The snare sounds quite thin  and could be a bit more powerful.
evaluations.original:
Er zit net teveel basgitaar in deze mix.  De snare klinkt redelijk dun en mag wat krachtiger. 
De orgel mag ook meer door de mix komen. De totale song mag ook net iets helderder klinken, vooral de lead zang.
Verhouding van drum, gitaar, zang zit wel goed. de sfeer zit ook al goed.

evaluations.comment: Kick too loud,  in the way of other instruments.  Sounds more like a live mix.  Voices can be louder for this genre!
evaluations.original: Kick te luid, staat in de weg van andere instrumenten. Klinkt eerder als een live mix. Stemmen mogen veel luider voor dit genre!

evaluations.comment: Really good!
evaluations.original: Riktigt bra!

evaluations.comment: Too low "bass" [low might refer to level or to frequency content] inappropriate for a "funk song" too much reverb on the guitar
evaluations.original: för låg "bas" opassande till en "funklåt" för mycket reverb på gitarren

evaluations.comment: Good levels a bit weird level on the lead vocals almost sounds as if it's only going through the reverb. lead vocals are to quiet. which is a shame since the rest is good.
evaluations.original: Bra nivåer lite konstig nivå på leadsång som låter nästan som att den bara går genom reverbet. leadsången är för svag. vilket är synd för resten är bra

evaluations.comment: Too loud hi hat, a bit dominant snare drum. Nice spectral balance. The vocals could stand out more. A bit more definition/distinction in guitars and vocals wouldn't hurt. Also it sounds as if there's some phase incoherence on the vocals in a weird way.
evaluations.original: Lite stark hi hat, något dominant virvel. Bra spektralbalans. Sången skulle kunna komma ut lite mer. Lite mer definition i gitarrer och sång skulle inte skada. Sången låter även lite "fasfel" på något konstigt sätt.

evaluations.comment: The vocals drown in all the other instruments which is a shame because apart from that it's a very good and distinct mix.
evaluations.original: Sången drunknar i alla andra instrument vilket var synd för annars en väldigt bra och tydlig mix.

evaluations.comment: The vocals are a bit too quiet [the word for vocals is misspelt but it can't really mean anything other than vocals], would need more balance between the instruments.
evaluations.original: songen är lite för tyst, skulle behöva mer ballans mellan instrumenten.

evaluations.comment: Good feeling and good groove. Like that the hihat stands out/comes out but the hihat stands out way too much, and smothers the vocals. The vocals should stand out more.
evaluations.original: Bra känsla och bra groove. Gillar att Hihaten kommer fram, dock kommer Hihaten fram för tok för mycket, och kväver sången. Sången bör komma fram mer.

evaluations.comment: The instruments sits nicely in the mix. The vocals feels messy and sometimes isn't audible at all.
evaluations.original: Instrumenten ligger bra i mixen. Sången låter rörig och hörs inte alls ibland.

evaluations.comment: A "cool" mix that sounds a bit too much "bathroom" and loses a lot of the lower frequencies. Too much treble.
evaluations.original: En cool mix som låter lite för mycket badrum och tappar många utav de lägre frekvenserna. För mycket diskant.

evaluations.comment: Too much reverb on the vocals, otherwise good
evaluations.original: För mycket reverb på sången, annars bra

evaluations.comment: Too much reverberation. A lot of bass.
evaluations.original: För mycket efterklang. Mycket bas.

evaluations.comment: Too distinct/tangible reverberation. A bit to distinct drums. Skewed frequency balance. [The student didn't actually write "skev", the Swedish word for "skewed", but instead wrote "skrev" which means "wrote" however I don't see how the intention could be to write anything other that "skev".]
evaluations.original: För påtaglig efterklang. Aningen tydliga trummor. Skrev frekvensbalans.

evaluations.comment: Very much reverb. [Most likely referring to the amount, not the size of the space.] Doesn't sound natural. Nice distribution between the instruments except the choir/backing vocals that sticks out a bit too much. The vocals disappears a lot due to the reverb.
evaluations.original: Väldigt mycket reverb. Låter inte naturligt. Bra fördelning mellan instrumenten förutom kören som sticker ut lite väl. Sången försvinner mycket på grund utav reverbet.

evaluations.comment: The vocals are too far away. The drums are playing a bit in "there own room".
evaluations.original: Sången för långt bort. Trummorna spelar lite i "ett eget rum".

evaluations.comment: the vocals are way too distant, otherwise good
evaluations.original: sången känns alldeles för avlägsen, annars bra

evaluations.comment: [I] like the dynamic range, but the whole song feels very nasal and "burkig". The voice feels weak and sits in the back.
evaluations.original: Gillar dynamiken, men hela låten känns väldigt nasal och burkig. Rösten känns klen och ligger i bakkant.

evaluations.comment: The clean guitar has too much reverberation. The vocals disappears in the mix for the same reason. The snare sounds very closed off/muted. The backing vocals/choir is extremely prominent and steals the focus. The stereo width seems good in this mix.
evaluations.original: Den rena gitarren har för mycket efterklang. Sången försvinner i mixen av samma anledning. Virveltrumman låter väldigt instängd. Körsången är extremt framträdande och tar fokus. Stereobredden verkar bra i denna mix.

evaluations.comment: Vocals too far back. Other than that good levels.
evaluations.original: Sång för långt bak. Annars bra nivåer.

evaluations.comment: A lot of reverb, vocals are too far back, a bit too sharp/harsh but otherwise an even frequency spectrum.
evaluations.original: Mycket reverb, sång ligger för långt bak, lite för vass men annars jämnt frekvensspektrum.

evaluations.comment: A bit too treble rich. But it was pushy and nice.
evaluations.original: Lite för diskantrik. Men den var pushig och skön.

evaluations.comment: The drums are too loud, but they're good [in level] in relation to each other even though they could have been EQed better. Leadvox ends up too far in the background. The choir/backing vocals are a bit too loud. The backing instruments are in a lump in the back of the mix. The mix sounds hollow.
evaluations.original: Trummorna är för starka, men ligger i bra relation till varandra även om de hade kunnat EQats bättre. Leadvox hamnar för mycket i bakgrunden. Kören lite för stark. Kompinstrument ligger i klump lite för långt bak i mixen. Mixen låter ihålig.

evaluations.comment: "Burkig" mix where the vocals sits very far back
evaluations.original: burking mix där sången ligger väldigt långt bak

evaluations.comment: The lead vocals are too quiet, and the mix are a but dry and narrow.
evaluations.original: Leadsången är för svag, samt är mixen en aning torr och smal.

evaluations.comment: The stereo image feels kind of narrow here, and I almost get the feeling that something phases wrong (?) [Refering to phase incoherence.]
evaluations.original: Stereobilden känns ganska smal här, och jag får nästan känslan av att något fasar fel (?)

evaluations.comment: Mushy/messy, too wet. Sounds as if the vocalist is in a different room.
evaluations.original: Grötig, för blöt. Låter som sångaren står i ett annat rum.

evaluations.comment: The vocals are too "far away" a bit too much effects on the vocals.
evaluations.original: Sången för "långt borta" lite för mycket effekter på sången.

evaluations.comment: Too much effects and hi-hat but otherwise fine. Could have been a totally decent/okay live mix. nice organ
evaluations.original: För mycket effekter och hi-hat men bra annars. Hade kunnat vara en helt ok live-mix. snygg orgel

evaluations.comment: No, just no.
evaluations.original: Nej, bara nej.

evaluations.comment: Mushy and too mush reverb. The drums takes over.
evaluations.original: Grötig och för mycket reverb. Trummorna tar överhanden.

evaluations.comment: Very quietly mixed vocals, Otherwise decent/okay.
evaluations.original: Väldigt låg mixad sång, Annars helt okej.

evaluations.comment: Not [a] tight mix.
evaluations.original: Inte tight mix.

evaluations.comment: Too much reverb and way too low [as in volume] vocals. the drums are good. Only level balancing on the instrument.
evaluations.original: För mycket efterklang och alldeles för låg sång. bra trummor. Bra nivåbalans på instrument.

evaluations.comment: A bit too much bass guitar [this is not a lack of punctuation. It refers to the electric bass.] and too little guitar. And way too low [in volume] vocals, sounds as if they only used vocals that passes through the reverb.
evaluations.original: Lite mycket bas gitarr och lite gitarr. Samt på tok för låg sång, låter som de bara tagit sång som går igenom reverbet.

evaluations.comment: Too much reverb. The vocals disappears in the mix completely.
evaluations.original: För mycket reverb. Sången försvinner i mixen fullständigt.

evaluations.comment: Very boomy and nasal [The student wrote the comment in English.]
evaluations.original: Very boomy and nasal

evaluations.comment: An indistinct mix with bad stereo image which means that the choir/backing vocals doesn't sound natural when it's fully panned against everything else. A bit too much volume on the hihat. Also sounds mushy.
evaluations.original: En otydlig mix med dålig stereobild vilket gör att kören inte låter naturlig när den är fullt panorerad emot allt annat. Lite stark volym på Hi-Hat. Låter även lite grötig.

evaluations.comment: Unbalanced, out of control. Too much effects. Lacks direct vocals.
evaluations.original: Oblanserat, okontrollerat. För mycket effekter. Fattas direkt sång.

evaluations.comment: The vocals are extremely far back, and nasal. The kick drum lacks low end. [I] think that one could have worked more on the panning.
evaluations.original: Sången är extremt långt bak, och nasal. Baskaggen saknar botten. Tycker att man borde ha arbetat mer med att panorera.

evaluations.comment: Weird reverb effects on main Vox. Needs more eq on the drums.

- Bass too low
- Good guitar mix
- Abusive reverb in some of the vocals
The vocals sound muffled throughout. Too much reverberation in a specific part where the singer is singing in a lower register. I like the balance between instruments, however.
evaluations.original: A voz parece estar abafada em vários momentos. Demasiada reverberação numa parte em específico quando o cantor canta num tom mais grave. Gosto do equilíbrio dos instrumentos, no entatno

evaluations.comment: The vocals could be softer. The bass could be more proeminent. Lacks strength overall.
evaluations.original: Voz talvez pudesse estar um pouco mais baixa. Baixo poderia estar mais presente. Pouca força no geral.

evaluations.comment: Bizarre reverberation of the vocals at a given point in the song; too much diffusion sporadically [sic]; the panning and choir are well mixed though [sic]
evaluations.original: reverberação bizarra na voz a um certo ponto da música: muita difusão ponctualmente; as ponorâmicas e coro no entanto estão bem misturadas.

evaluations.comment: The vocals had some problems as the mix was ongoing. Sometimes it was doubled, other times it had a strange effect that sounded like excessive reverb. I think it should supposedly mark a strategic moment, but it did not work for me.
evaluations.original: A voz tinha alguns problemas no decorrer da mistura. As vezes estava dobrada, as vezes tinha um efeito estranho parecia me excesso de reverb. Que penso que seria para usar e marcar um momento estratégico mas não resultou.

evaluations.comment: The creative use of reverb in the vocals was not flattering of either the song or the vocals themselves.
evaluations.original: O uso criativo do reverb na voz não funcionou como elogio para a voz ou música.

evaluations.comment: Vocals too loud, and from a timbre standpoint, the high-mids are exagerated.
evaluations.original: A voz está muito alta e timbricamente a zona média aguda encontra exagerada.

evaluations.comment: Drums not present enough. Bass guitar has no low-end. Vocals too uneven and in one of the parts has excessive reverb (notoriously intentional but not well achieved).
evaluations.original: bateria muito pouco presente, baixo sem grave, voz muito pouco equilibrada e numa das parte com excesso de reverb (notoriamente intencional mas pouco conseguido)

evaluations.comment: Lacks weigth and puch. The gain balance is reasonable, but the song was not carefully equalized. Too much reverb processing in the pre-chorus.
evaluations.original: Falta peso e "punch" na faixa. Os balanços de ganho estão razoáveis mas a faixa não teve trabalho minucioso de equalização. Exagero no processamento de reverb no pre refrão.

evaluations.comment: Good mix.
Guitar is way too loud. Overpowers the vocals.
vocals a little quiet. lower frequencies a little too over powering.  upper frequency band seems to be missing, can't hear hi hats at all.

hooded mix - not as much top end
good harmonies  - could be a little drier
otherwise mixed well

The electric guitar is too far in the mix and is too distinguishable. The vocals are a little quiet. The overdubs don't sound united, it is easy to hear that they are not one sound, decreasing its effectiveness.
TOO MUDDY

- Vocals sound telephony and both the vocals and guitar have too much reverb
- The bass is very overpowering I some parts
- Can barely hear the guitars or organ
A BIT DULL, TOO MUCH GUITAR. DRUMS TOO COMPRESSED

too much reverb on vocals
guitar a bit muddy
BASS TOO LOUD. GUITAR REVERB POSSIBLY TOO WET. UPPER MID TO HIGH FREQUENCY RANGE IS LACKING. OVERALL MIX IS MISSING CLARITY.
This mix is dull. Too many elements are competing for the same space. Everything is mushy.
MIX NEEDS MORE HIGH END. REVERB ON THE BACKING VOCALS IS TOO DISTRACTING
Electric guitar is emphasised. Not enough bass frequencies, mix feels too narrow.
sounds like someone has put a high cut on everything except the vocal so just very dull
TOO WET AND DARK.
Mids missing, which results in the lows feeling very loud
Snare sounds a bit messy.  I'm missing some kick cutting through the mix.  Vocal sounds nice though.  Vocal is quite loud, but that's alright here.
evaluations.original:
Snare klinkt rommelig. Ik mis wat kick die door de mix snijdt. Stem klinkt wel tof.Stem staat vrij luid, maar hier mag 
dat wel.

evaluations.comment: A mix that gets its attitude from the lead vocal which gets a Lenny Kravitz character because of its timbre and the delay that was used.  The whole sounds a bit deconstructed  and not consistent EQ-wise.  E.g. the bass is rather honky,  while the vocal is quite bright.
evaluations.original:
Een mix die zijn attitude haalt uit de lead stem die omwille van de klankkleur en de gebruikte delay een Lenny Kravitz-karakter krijgt.
Het geheel klinkt  wat gedeconstrueerd en eq-mqtig niet consistent. Zo is de bas eerder honky, terwijl de zang erg 'bright' is.

evaluations.comment: The drums are not loud enough,  don't sound powerful enough.  The snare seems to come from too far away as well.  The bass guitar could have more sub low as well.  Apart from that it sits quite nicely.  Vocal is good,  but maybe a bit too much effects  or just a tad too loud.
evaluations.original: De drums staan niet luid genoeg, klinken niet krachtig genoeg. De snare komt precies ook van te ver weg. De basgitaar mag ook wat meer sublaag hebben. Voor de rest zit het wel goed. zang is goed, misschien net iets teveel effect ofwel net iets te luid.

evaluations.comment: Not a big fan of the balance.  Guitar a bit quiet.  Vocal quite loud.
evaluations.original: niet zo fan van de balans. gitaar wat stil. Vocal vrij luid.

evaluations.comment: Too much reverb on the lead.  The vocal is outside of the song now in terms of atmosphere because the rest is bone dry.  Backing vocals are too loud. Use a de-esser on the lead if you're adding high! Rhodes is just a tad too loud.  Drums barely cut through the mix because the hi-hat.  The song really can't groove well now.
evaluations.original:
-Teveel reverb op de lead. De vocal staat nu buiten het nummer qua sfeer omdat de rest kurkdroog is.
-Backing vocals staan te luid.
-Gebruik een De-Esser op die lead als je hoog gaat toevoegen!
-Rhodes is net iets te luid.
-Drums komen amper door de mix behalve de hihat. Het nummer kan echt niet goed grooven nu.

evaluations.comment: Lead vocal is quite sharp.  The 's' comes through quite a lot.  A lot of reverb with a space that's too large.
evaluations.original: Lead vocal is redelijk scherp. De "s" komt hier redelijk hard door. Veel reverb met te grote ruimte.

evaluations.comment: A lot of reverb in general.  I feel that reverb is best not exaggarated in a funk song, to keep the funky silences somewhat.  Maybe a shorter reverb would work better here in my opinion.
evaluations.original: Veel reverb in het algemeen. Ik heb het idee dat reverb in een funk nummer best niet overdreven wordt, om de de funky stiltes wat te behouden. Misschien zou een kortere reverb hier beter werken in mijn mening.

evaluations.comment: Wrong space for this genre.  Watery, small, cold (/chilly).  I hear warmth and cosiness but this isn't it.
evaluations.original: Verkeerde ruimte voor dit genre. Waterig, klein, kill. Ik hoor hier warmte en gezelligheid maar dit is het niet.

evaluations.comment: Reverb on the snare is way too loud.  This makes the snare the loudest instrument in the mix,  while the 'one' (funk!) is not to be found anywhere.  There is little punch in it.  The bass sounds quite thin.  Hammond is a bit loud,  but sounds nice.
evaluations.original:
-Die reverb op de snare is veel te luid. De snare wordt erdoor het luidste instrument in de mix, terwijl the one (funk!) bijna nergens te bespeuren is.
-Er zit nogal weinig punch in. De bas klinkt nogal dun.
-Hammond is wat luid, maar klinkt lekker.

evaluations.comment: Happy that the snare has a nice space.  Vocals more to the front which really defines the atmosphere of this song.
evaluations.original: BLij dat de snare een ooie ruimte heeft. Stemmen al meer naar de voorgrond wat echt de sfeer bepaalt van dit nummer.

evaluations.comment: Not a lot of body,  maybe too much high?  Snare comes in quite hard.  I like the snare!
evaluations.original: Weining body, misschien te veel hoog?. Snare komt redelijk hard binnen. Snare is leuk!

evaluations.comment: In comparing different songs it seems audible that EQ was used in the high of the drums.  Not a lot of bass guitar.  Too much high was attempted to be added to the complete song.  The proportions are okay though.  Guitars and vocals sound good too.
evaluations.original: Bij het vergelijken van de verschillende songs is het precies hoorbaar dat er in het hoog van de drum EQ is gebruikt. Weinig basgitaar.Bij de totale song is er teveel hoog geprobeerd toe te voegen. De verhoudingen zitten wel goed. Gitaar en zang klinken ook goed.

evaluations.comment: This mix has too much reverb on the snare in my opinion.  Voice sounds a bit too spacious for me.  Balance could be better.  This mix consists of drums and vocals mainly.
evaluations.original: Deze mix bevat voor mij te veel reverb op de snare. Stem klinkt iets te ruimtelijk voor mij. Balans kan voor mij beter. Deze mix bestaat vooral uit rum en zang.

evaluations.comment: A spacious mix  which suffers from weird balance choices  such as backing vocals which are too loud,  and a 'dry' lead compared to a spacious snare.  In mono the mix retains its strength,  but the too loud kick is more obvious.
evaluations.original:
Een ruimtelijke mix die lijdt onder vreemde balanskeuzes van te luide backing vocals, een 'droge' lead in vergelijking met de ruimtelijke snare.
In mono behoudt de mix zijn kracht, maar valt de luide kick nog meer op

evaluations.comment: Sounds very thin,  missing a bit of bass,  kick  and snare.
evaluations.original: Klinkt heel dun, mist wat bass en kick en snare.

evaluations.comment: A lot of reverb on the snare.  A lot of hi-hat.  Not a lot of guitar.  A lot of Hammond.
evaluations.original: Veel reverb op snare. Veel hi-hat. Weinig gitaar. Veel hammond.

evaluations.comment: Keyboards are too present
evaluations.original: teclados demsasiado presentes

evaluations.comment:
- Snare drum too dry
- Vocals too high (compared to the rest)
The guitar stereo placement is interesting. The rest however, is a bit loose.
evaluations.original: A posição da guitarra é interessante. MAs o resto está um pouco solto.

evaluations.comment: The vocal is too loud and the balance between backing vocals is out. In general, the mix lacks brigthness and definition. The mix is too monophonic, making it less interesting and more predictable.
evaluations.original: A voz está demasiado alta e os volumes entre as vários  segundas vozes está desequilibrado. No geral toda a mistura está sem brilho nenhum e sem definição. A mistura é bastante monofonica o que a torna menos interessante e mais previsível.

evaluations.comment: The drums lack brightness in the low and high frequencies [sic]. Everything seems to be too mid-rangey. That characteristic extends towards the other parts of the song, sounding as if it is a bad-quality streaming. However, it does show a nice internal balance between tracks, with the exception of the chorus vocals, which are too loud.
evaluations.original: Falta brilho nas frequências graves e agudas da bateria. Tudo parece estar muito nos médios. Essa característica se estende para as demais partes da música, soando como se fosse um streaming de má qualidade. Apesar de tudo, mostra bm balanço interno entre as faixas, com excessão de alguns vocais do refrão que estão demasiadamente altos.
