evaluations.comment: Muffled song. The vocals do not fit with the remaining instrumental. Low-end is too present.
evaluations.original: Musica abafada. Voz desenquadrada do resto instrumental. Frequências graves muito presentes.

evaluations.comment: Guitar has good definition. So does the vocal. The rest is too compressed (not in terms of the actual processing, but the sensation it gives. There is less individuality and brightness in the instruments).
evaluations.original: Guitarra tem boa definição. A voz também. O resto está demasiado comprimido (não no sentido da compressão, mas da sensação que dá. Há menos individualidade e brilho nos instrumentos)

evaluations.comment: Vocals are too dry.
evaluations.original: Voz demasiado seca.

evaluations.comment: Everything is boxoed. Seems that the only thing that is panned is the guitar, and seems out of phase.
Kick is not present enough. Snare drums too mid-rangey. Bass lacks "weight". Vocals too mid-rangey. Backing vocals too subdued and badly distributed in the mix.
evaluations.original: Kick pouco presente, tarola muito média, baixo sem "peso"; voz muito média, backing vocals pouco presentes e mal destribuidos na mistura

evaluations.comment:
VERY WIDE
almost 360 sound?
fairly well mixed
good even keys and guitar
organ a touch too high
harmony vox a little too wet for the dry lead vox

Steady orgs sound too loud, should be further down in the mix. too much reverb/delay on vocals. For this style they should be more punchy. High-hats too loud. Guitar is also pretty loud. Overall the instruments are not well-balanced.
Wide, good balance, vocal could use some more magic, too much verb on the BVs.
VOCALS WEIRD IN CONTEXT WITH THE REST OF THE MIX
BASS QUITE HOT. BACKING VOX TOO FAR BACK IN MIX.
levels are good, things just sound a bit flat (not pitch, resonance)
The mix is narrow and dull. Panned elements are not connected to the mix. Bass is pokey. The vocal reverb is muddy and detracts from the mix.
Drums aren't loud enough.... Synth/Piano is too loud in the right ear. Too hard panned right.
SNARE LACKS PUNCH AND PRESENCE. ORGAN TOO LOUD. VOCALS TOO LOW IN THE MIX.

- Frequencies jumping all over the place and ringing out
- Messy sounding around the midrange because of the guitars and bass possibly clashing
- Weird stereo sound or phase issues that disorientate the listener and even made me feel sick if I listened for too long
DRUMS TOO FAR BACK, NO KICK PRESENCE.
really wide!

snare too far back
crowded
reverb on vocals too much
guitar sounded too quiet and lacked the nice user mid frequency punch it did in the better mixes.
Weird stereo widening, backing vocals more prominent
NEEDS MORE WORK ON LEVELLING, SOUNS UNDERDONE

- Bass too high
- Good guitar mix
- Drums mix could be better (kick too high compared to hats and snare)
Bizarre equalization of the vocals; slightly excessive low-end; bizarre panning of the vocals in certain sections of the song.
evaluations.original: equalização bizarra da voz; ligeiramente graves a mais; panorâmicas bizarras em certas secções da música no que diz respeito às vozes,

evaluations.comment: Vocals seem muffled, and have a reverb that is greater than what I would want it to be.
evaluations.original: Voz parece mais abafada em com um reverberação um pouco maior do que eu quereria

evaluations.comment: The drims could have been more defined, especially on the overheads which could have provided the additional brightness.
evaluations.original: A bateria podia estar mais definida, principalmente nos OH que podiam fornecer o brilho que lhe falta.

evaluations.comment: Bass seems to loud. Good reverb on vocals. needs more bightness all round.
The bass is too loud considering the rest. Backing vocals excessively reverberant in relationship to the rest of the mix.
evaluations.original: Baixo muito alto em relação ao resto. Back vocals com muito Reverb em relação ao resto da mix.

evaluations.comment: The excessive bass makes the song loose strength and dynamics.
evaluations.original: Demasiados graves fazem com que a música perca força e dinâmica.

evaluations.comment: The bass guitar is very very loud, masking all other low-end frequencies (including the kick drum) when it is being played. Good balance between guitars and pianos, even though I notice a lack of EQ that could be extending the song into the mid-range [sic]. Nice work on the vocals, but in the chorus they are too loud.
evaluations.original: Exagero na presença do baixo, sobrepondo todas as demais frequências graves da música quando tocado (inclusive o kick). Bom balanço entre guitarras e pianos, porém noto a falta de EQ´s que expandem a música para frequências mais médias. Bom trabalho nas vozes, porém excesso nos vocais do refrão.

evaluations.comment: Very unbalanced, with excessive reverb on the vocals. Bass is too loud in comparison to the drums, which are, effectively, not present enough.
evaluations.original: muito desiquilibrada, com excesso de reverb nas vozes, baixo alto em relação à bateria que está efectivamente pouco presente

evaluations.comment: The bass guitar is too loud and present in relationship to all other instruments.
evaluations.original: O baixo está demasiado alto e definido em relação a todos os outros instrumentos.

evaluations.comment:
- Great drums mix (particularly the snare)
- Great vocals mix
- The 2nd guitar could be higher
I did not enjoy the drum snare, and the vocals seemed to be a bit too distance. This might be on account of the reverb. The whole instrumental also seemed distant.
evaluations.original: Não gostei do snare da bateria, e a voz também parecia bastante distante. Talvez por causa do reverb. Todo o instrumental parecia distante.

evaluations.comment: Bizarre equalization of the vocals when they become too bass-heavy (in the beggining of the sont)
evaluations.original: equalização bizarra da voz quando esta se torna bem grave (no inicio da música).

evaluations.comment: The vocals are a bit far away. The snare reverb is too proeminent.
evaluations.original: a voz está um pouco afastada. E o reverb na tarola fica muito presente.

evaluations.comment: The vocal isn't poorly worked, but the remaining instruments sound more muffled, in need for better volume balancing. Instruments also need more brightness.
evaluations.original: A voz não está mal tratada, mas o resto dos instrumentos parecem mais abafados, sendo necessário um maior equilíbrio entre volumes. Instrumentos precisam também de mais brilho

evaluations.comment: I feel a lack of kick in the song. Excessive reverb in the main vocals and not enough gain on the same track. Lacks EQ and more careful compression on the bass guitar, that becomes too evident in certain frequencies. Nice balance between guitars and pianos.
evaluations.original: Falta presença de kick na faixa. Excesso de reverb na voz principal e falta de ganho no mesmo. Falta EQ e compressão mais bem elaborada no baixo que para certas frequências fica muito evidente. Bom equilíbrio entre guitarras e pianos.

evaluations.comment: The snare stands out when compared to all other instruments. The mix is too mid-rangey and with excessive reverb.
evaluations.original: A tarola destaca em relação a todos instrumentos. A mistura está bastante média e com demasiado rverb.

evaluations.comment: Snare drum to "bland". The distribution of instruments in the mix is poorly done (piano and guitar are "fighting" for the same space.
evaluations.original: tarola completamente "choca", distribuição dos instrumentos na mistura mal feita (piano e guitarra estão a "lutar" pelo mesmo espaço

evaluations.comment: Vocals are too distant. The snare is where the vocal should be. Bass guitar too loud.
evaluations.original: Voz muito distante. Tarola está no lugar da voz. Baixo demasiado alto.

evaluations.comment: too much reverb! Lack of definition all round.
Drums have nice compression and lots of space in the mix. Bass less prominent.
This mixer has a good EQ example of delay and chorus.
not expect latency
space，空间感很强
lead vocals sometimes not present enough, other times too present, but everything sits generally well
too much reverb
Reverb tiny bit much, nice balance.
Sound does not have room(?), I mean that sounds seems to be compressed after mix
ok, vox a bit low and dont like the mix verb
Nice depth, but the rest is not properly sculpted.
Needs more kick. Verb needs tweaking.
little too much verb, kick has no punch, vox sits too far back
I don't like your snare, the drums are a little muffled.
vox thick and they get lost in all that verb.
too much drum. dosen't sit well with the vocal
Too bassy
Vocals are too loud and reverbered. Muffled eq
bass balance not good, nice vox
the sound seems lower especially the musical instrument seems to be kept down
Too dark, too wet. Not a bad balance between instruments though.
not so balanced
Vocals sound thin. High hat sound poor
Drums EQ bad, needs to be brighter and more lows. Vocal verb is way too much, way too long, just makes mud. More drum level. Vocal needs leveling. Wrecks the music.

Reverb is too obvious, on the snare particularly. Mix sounds quite lo-fi, almost like it's been mixed down to an unclean tape machine at low IPS. Could use some (more substantial) bus compression to bring everything together.

There is too much reverb on the vocals and quiet, and the whole mix in general could be a little louder.  Also, the kick doesn't communicate well with the bass, so you don't really get a dance feeling.
too washed out with reverb. snare is boxey
Loud snare! An the eq on it is funny. Bass is too loud. The reverb on the background vocals is too long and too much.
Too dark, drums sound dull and dead, vocal is muddy, there's a really long reverb tail going on, possibly on drums.. way too long, makes everything unclear and out of balance.
Too much reverb on the snare.
really muddy and veiled, like 2 but strange space
Dark, muffled a little overall. Room reverb is weird. Organ and keys stuff is too dry, relative to wet drums and voice.
Very dull and flat. Vocals sit on top. Could be a backing track and singer. Vocals too quiet as well.
too much reverb and too dark
muddy mix
horrible drum sound. long verb on snare???
a bit muddy
There is a lot wrong here.
messy all over.  muddy, too much reverb, reverb needs to be EQ'ed to reduces low and high resonances that are annoying to listen to.  Vocal balance is too loose.  No real punch to anything.
In this mix the voice sounds more like a detail than a 'lead'.
evaluations.original:
In deze mix lijkt de stem eerder een detail dan een 'lead'. 
Je moet doorheen de kick en bas luisteren.
Muzikaal niet de sterkste balans, hoewel de individuele elementen goed ge-eq'ed zijn.
Het geheel klinkt wat dof, maar dat zou in de mastering kunnen worden opgelost.
Jammer van de elec guitar die uit fase is geplaatst en meer als een gimmick klinkt dan als een ruimtelijk effect.
In mono behoudt de mix zijn kracht, maar valt de luide kick en bascombinatie nog meer op; de elec gitaar valt haast volledig weg

evaluations.comment: Voice sounds a bit too quiet.  A lot of attack in the kick, I don't like it.  Backings are quite loud wrt the vocal in the chorus,  these could sound more spacious.  I quite like the instrument balance though.
evaluations.original: Stem staat soms te stil. Veel attack in de kick, vind ik niet mooi. Backings staan vrij luid tov de vocal in het refrein, mogen ruimtelijker klinken. Balans van de instrumenten vind ik wel tof.

evaluations.comment: A lot of bass.  Vocal is pushed away by this.
evaluations.original: Veel bass. Vocal wordt hierdoor weggeduwd.

evaluations.comment: Could be mixed a bit brighter perhaps.  The vocal lacks a bit of power as well it seems. Maybe mix a bit louder? Bass and kick are too loud compared to the rest of the mix.  The bass sounds a bit woolly as well.
evaluations.original: Mag misschien een beetje brighter gemixt worden. De vocal mist pecies ook wat kracht. Een beetje luider mixen evt? Bass en kick zijn te luid in vergelijking met de rest van de mix. De bass klinkt ook wat wollig.

evaluations.comment: The 2 guitar mics panned left and right are odd.  It seems like the guitar is nowhere.  The lead vocal is clearly  too quiet and doesn't have any high? Even the Hammond is louder in the mix than the lead.  Backing vocals are louder than the lead vocal, that's weird.  Kick and bass are too loud.
evaluations.original:
-Die 2 gitaarmics links en rechts gepanned zijn vreemd. Het lijkt dan alsof de gitaar nergens zit.
-De lead vocal is duidelijk te stil en heeft geen hoog? Zelfs de Hammond zit luider in de mix dan de lead.
-Backing vocals staan luider dan de lead vocal, dat is raar.
-Die kick en bas zijn te luid.

evaluations.comment: Vocal is just about not loud enough.  Guitars are too loud and  sound panned too much.  Too wide which feels unnatural.  The sound of the guitar is quite alright though.  The bass is too loud as well.  The total mix sounds too dull as well.  Kick and snare sound quite powerful/present though.
evaluations.original:
Zang staat net niet luid genoeg. Gitaar staat te luid en klinkt teveel gepand. te breed wat onnatuurlijk aanvoelt.
De klank van de gitaar is wel in orde.
De bas staat ook te luid. De totale mix klinkt ook te dof. Kick en snare klinken wel krachtig/aanwezig. 
Cimbalen mochten helderder.

evaluations.comment: Weird phase with the guitars? Quite dull.  Vocal quiet.
evaluations.original: vreemd fase met gitaren ?  Vrij dof. Vocal stil.

evaluations.comment: Voices way too quiet, collapses a little bit.  The backings add little energy because of this.
evaluations.original: Stemmen veel te stil, valt een beetje in elkaar. Ook de backing brengen hierdoor weinig energie bij.

evaluations.comment: large space，echo, 现场感

- Too much effects on vocals (reverb)
- Good keyboard mix, but missing some guitars
What's going on? Interesting. Live setting simulation. Catchy.
rought
i don't like reverb on vocal
Interesting but overwhelming vox verb, gets old with time. Great backing vocal sound though.
Vocal sound sucks. Vocal verb is crappy and too hot. Drums are lifeless, need EQ and proper compression. Your mix actually gets quieter when it should get bigger?!?! Levels OK overall.
Vocals are too hidden by the reverb.
evaluations.original: Voz muito escondida pelo reverb.

evaluations.comment: too much reverb
Excessive reverberation on the vocals
evaluations.original: reverb exagerado na voz;

evaluations.comment: EQ has some problems. Sounds not very comfortable.
Strange vocals. Too reverb-y, or at least more than is acceptable in songs of the type.
evaluations.original: Voz estranha. Com bastante reverb, ou melhor, mais do que é presente nas musicas de género.

evaluations.comment: bass lumpy
Balanced, but the reverberation in the vocals could be better. It is too roomy.
evaluations.original: Equilibrado, mas a reverberação poderia ser melhor na voz. Tem demasiado espaço.

evaluations.comment: vocal verb aint right
ok but personally dont like the verb on the vox
Drums cut through. Too much reverb on vocals
too much reverb on vocals
Reverb time is far too short, singer in the bathroom and not in the same space as the rest of the mix so doesn't bed in at all. Drums are quite bright and fatiguing to listen too.
not a fan of the vocal sound
Vocals are too prominent.  Bad eq on the drums
too much reverb for this genre of music.
Too wet. Midrange sounds good, but vocal verb is super distracting
The reverb on the vocal doesn't fit the rest of the instruments.  It makes it sit back, you can hear the room they are in too much.  The drums also don't seem panned approperiately.
as if in a room
Main vocal reverb is really obvious, distractingly so. Bottom end is obvious but a little 'untamed'.
too much verb on vocal
Inappropriate Reverb on vocal. No real low end.
Vocal has to much reverb it seems the reverb was put in the vox track instead of an aux send. The drums seem nice. Probably needs more guitar. Keys seem fine.
Too much reverb on the vocals.
evaluations.original: Demasiado reverb na voz.

evaluations.comment: Bad mix. Vocal too reverberated, excessively long reverb also in the backing vocals.
evaluations.original: má mistura, voz com excesso de reverb, reverb em excesso e muito logo também nas vozes do coro

evaluations.comment: vocal too wet
I don't like the vocal reverb, call too much attention to itself. Balance isn't bad, but the vocal ruins it for me.
bathroom verb on voc - bad. snare is too far back in the mix
Too much reverb, vocals too loud, too much reverb. My god turn down that reverb. Frequency balance is alright but that reverb! Did I mention that it's probably too much reverb?
Not good.The release sound is too sharp, I means that I feel like I'm hearing the sound in the space.
Pick a different verb for the vox.
bad.... the problem is that it is a little far when hearing the sound ,and it is like the singer is far from the audience and sing in a big hall

Inconsistent vocals, with too much reverb and compression, and lacking in gain. Not enough work on the guitars, which are also too soft. Pianos are too proeminent in the chorus and harm the song's equilibrium.
evaluations.original: Vocal inconsistente com de reverb demasiado e falta de ganho e compressão. Falta presença e trabalho nas guitarras. Excesso de pianos no refrão para o equilíbrio da mistura.

evaluations.comment: Why is the singer in the MMR bathroom?
weird small room on vox, bass and kik fight, vocals sound like from phone
horrible reverb on vocals, they all sound like they're in the bathroom, muddy drums
NO! on the reverb selection and level.  The rest of the mix is ok, but that vocal mix just destroys this.

What? Reverb all on the right? Way too much strange plate hall. Solo rhodes lick on the left is way too soft. Vocals are way to far. I prefer the bg vocals panned closer together near the lead vocal. The reverb is really distracting me.
What the heck is going on with vocals. Sounds horrible.
ridiculous verb, especially on LD voice.  bad mix esp on snare, kbd and gtr (both too low)
Too much reverb, mix loses impact.
The mix is not bright enough and the use of slap echo is exagerated, and makes the vocal to loose its glue to the rest of the material.
evaluations.original: A mistura é pouco brilhante e a utilização do "slap" foi exagerada o que faz a voz descolar de todo o instrumental.

evaluations.comment: Very boxy, very narrow. Dull in general.
SNARE IS WEIRD AND RUINING IT

- Very swampy sounding with too much low end

Not enough highs.. Feels muddy.
BASS OVER POWERS OTHER INSTRUMENTS.
Very muffled. All instruments sound like they have had the brightness taken off via EQ
a little less powerful and punchy

very narrow mix - snare is too high in the mix and not treated - very boxy
"good lord" Vox too high and not treated
hard to listen to
The mix is very dull. Vocals and drums sound boxy. Panned elements are disconnected from the mix.
LOW PASS FILTER TOO EXTREME, SOUNDS LIKE YOU ARE LISTENING THROUGH A WALL.
TOO BOXY, NEEDS WORK ON LEVELLING
DULL, TOO DRY.

not much high end in instruments
sounds low passed
muddy

Not a huge fan of the vintage sound they are going for
too many lows for it to sound authentic
Kick sounds really dry and too high frequency-wise. Poor mix. Overall the mix sounds like it's missing upper mids/tops.
so muddy and enclosed, can't hear anything in the upper frequencies clearly

not much clarity
quite boxy
drums feel a bit quite

Too muddy and drums are basically non-existent. Very muddy. Not enough highs in overall mix.
Vocals sound too dry. Mix sounds too narrow. No sense of space. Poor mix.
FEELS NARROW, IN THE REGARD OF THE STEREO IMAGE, AND THE FREQUENCY SPECTRUM. LACKS CLARITY IN THE LOW AND HIGH ENDS OF THE FREQUENCY RANGE.
Everything is mono. The elements are all competing for the same space.
No mids or lows for some reason

doesn't have any air or "lift" the vocals and guitar just seem to be very narrow and "boxy"
NO STEREO IMAGINE, BALANCE NOT GREAT. ALL VOCAL AND GUITAR.
Firstly I lack the bass. and more snare. But on the things that's audible some good low frequencies are lacking.
evaluations.original: För de fösta saknar jag basen. och mer snare. Men på det som man hör saknas en del goda lägre frekvenser.

evaluations.comment: poor balance between the different parts of the song the solo guitar is positioned at the front which I don't think fits.
evaluations.original: dålig balans mellan de olika delarna i låten sologitarren ligger längst fram vilket jag inte tycker passar.

evaluations.comment: Sounds half-finished. Is the kick panned to the left? Nice guitar though.
evaluations.original: Låter halvfärdig. Är kaggen panorerad till vänster? Snygg gura dock.

evaluations.comment: Very loud kick drum, several of the tracks are removed (which could be an interesting approach).
evaluations.original: Väldigt stark baskagge, flera av spåren borttagna (vilket kan vara ett interessant grepp).

evaluations.comment: Too loud and sharp/hard kick. Also panned to the left.
evaluations.original: För stark och hård kick. Även vänsterpanorerad.

evaluations.comment: very dry and some instruments disappears
evaluations.original: väldigt torr och vissa instrument försvinner

evaluations.comment: The drums could have been mixed better. Not very dynamic.
evaluations.original: Trummorna kunde mixats bättre. Inte så dynamisk.

evaluations.comment: Don't really understand the idea to make the mix like this and "knock out" all the instruments and make the kick fairly "click". All the feeling is removed from the song..However it does sound kind of cool in the chorus when the choir and more voices enter.
evaluations.original:
Förstår inte riktigt tanken med att göra mixen så här och "slå ut" alla instrument och göra kicken ganska "klickig". All känsla tas bort från låten.. 
Dock låter det ganska coolt i refrängen när kören och fler röster kommer in.

evaluations.comment: Unfortunately this doesn't even sound like a mix. The kick is positioned to the left speaker and is, together with the guitar, the only thing that's audible. The background vocals that appears sound mid/treble. The entire mix is poor [literal translation of the Swedish word for someone who doesn't have any money, I guess the comment means the mix is bad] and there is no love in it at all. Unfortunately.
evaluations.original: Detta låter tyvärr inte ens som en mix. Kicken ligger i vänster högtalare och är tillsammans med gitarren det enda som hörs. Bakgrundssången som kommer in låter mid/diskant. Hela mixen är fattig och det finns ingen kärlek i den alls. Tyvärr.

evaluations.comment: A bit unmodern panning technique, lacks treble and energy. Too little snare [refers to the level of it, not the size of the drum], but the guitar sits nicely.
evaluations.original: Lite omodern pannoreringsteknik, saknar diskant och energi. För lite virvel, men gitarren sitter bra.

evaluations.comment: The overheads are barely audible, the kick clicks. There is no bass, no proper level balancing for the tracks.
evaluations.original: overheads hörs knappt, kicken klickar. Finns ingen bas, ingen ordentligt satt nivå på alla spår.

evaluations.comment: Only guitar vocals and drums are audible. Lacks a lot of frequencies.
evaluations.original: Bara gitarr sång och trummor som hörs. Saknar mycket frekvenser.

evaluations.comment: The kick [is] far too clicky, the cymbals are barely audible
evaluations.original: Kicken alltför klickig, cymbalerna hörs nästan inget

evaluations.comment: Weird that the kick is positioned in the left speaker, it was way too tangible. Poor balance between the instruments.
evaluations.original: Konstigt att kicken låg i vänster högtalare, den var alldeles för påtaglig. Dålig balans mellan instrumenten.

evaluations.comment: I think most elements are removed. Only vocals, kick and guitar? I don't like that the kick only appears to the left. Nice guitar.
evaluations.original: Jag tror det mesta är bortplockat. Endast sång, kick och gitarr? Gillar inte att kicken endast ligger i vänster. Snygg gitarr.

evaluations.comment: Completely different panning, might be cool, I find it very annoying. Good level-balance on what's there. Very dry
evaluations.original: Helt annorlunda panorering, kan vara coolt, jag finner det väldigt störande. Bra nivåbalans på det som finns med. Väldigt torr

evaluations.comment: Lacks instruments. doesn't feel lika song and most importantly not like a full mix.
evaluations.original: Saknar instrument. känns inte som en låt och framförallt som en fullständig mix.

evaluations.comment: [I] hear a kick and some voice, and a guitar. No, no. no.
evaluations.original: Hör en kick och lite röst, samt en gitarr. Nej, nej. nej.

evaluations.comment: It feels as if there are a lot of distortion somewhere. The kick is sharp [not meant in a good way] and "high frequent" (if one can say that). The music har vanished, it appears. Now I realized what it was - the bass is gone.
evaluations.original: Det känns som om det distar väldigt mycket någonstans. Kicken är för skarp och "högfrekvent" (om man nu kan säga så). Musiken har försvunnit, verkar det som. Nu kom jag på vad det var - basen är borta.

evaluations.comment: Too dry and too much kick. The kick is more too the left as well :/ Just the kick and the vocals that really stands out. Lacks depth. Not a mix.
evaluations.original: För torr och för mycket kick. Kicken ligger mer till vänster också :/ Bara kick och sång som verkligen kommer fram. Saknar djup. Ingen mix.

evaluations.comment: The drums are in your face [the student used the actual English words "in your face"]. The kick is panned and the clicky is hard-panned too the left.
evaluations.original: Trummorna är in your face. Kicken är panorerad och det klickiga är hårdpanorerad till vänster.

evaluations.comment: It sounds as if the only tracks I get to listen to are the kick drum track, the guitar as well as the vocals and choir tracks. The instrument tracks sounds as I can imagine that they did [coming] directly into the mixing console.
evaluations.original: Det låter som de enda spåren vi får lyssna på är bastrumsspåret, gitarren samt sång och kör spåren. Instrumentspåren låter som jag kan tänka mig att de gjorde direkt in i mixerbordet.

evaluations.comment: The kick is panned to the left and [sounds] very sharp/hard/harsh, vocals, guitar and kick is audible apart from that I lack a lot of components of the mix.
evaluations.original: Kicken panorerad till vänster och väldigt hård, sången, gitarr och kick hörs annars saknar jag många komponenter i mixen.

evaluations.comment: Worst mix so far. The kick is fully panned to the left, some instruments isn't even present. Is only kick, lead vox and guitar. [Not clear if it's a question or not. The wording suggest that but it lacks a question mark and is not a full sentence.] There must have been some kind of mistake during mix down. The lead vox doesn't even sound EQed.
evaluations.original: Sämsta mixen hittills. Kicken ligger helt panorerad till vänster, vissa instrument är inte ens med. Är bara kick, lead vox och gitarr. Måste blivit något misstag vid mixdown. Leadvox låter inte EQad.

evaluations.comment: Feels very plasticy, the low end is completely missing, very dry, the kick is panned and feel very weird, the voice is distorted.
evaluations.original: Känns väldigt plastig, botten är helt borta, väldigt torr, kicken ligger panorerad vilket känns jättekonstig, rösten distar.

evaluations.comment: Coolt idea to make a super-dry mix, but all of the instruments isn't audible at all in this mix.
evaluations.original: Cool ide att göra en supertorr mix, men i denna mix hörs ju inte alla instrument överhuvudtaget.

evaluations.comment: Poor level, weirdly panned kick. Don't hear any bass. Lacks elements. Too heavily compressed vocals.
evaluations.original: Dålig nivå, konstigt panorerad kick. Hör ingen bas. Fattas element. För starkt komprimerad sång.

evaluations.comment: The mix lacks some instruments and are a bit too dry.
evaluations.original: Mixen saknar vissa instrument och är en aning för torr.

evaluations.comment: One can only hear guitar, drums and vocals. Solo button activated by mistake at mix down?
evaluations.original: Man hör enbart gitarr, trummor och sång. Solo knapp på av misstag vid mixdown?

evaluations.comment: The kick is very weird, there's no bass overall and it sounds like they have removed several tracks on the song. [The student wrote the comment in English.]
evaluations.original: The kick is very weird, there's no bass overall and it sounds like they have removed several tracks on the song.

evaluations.comment: ÌÏbercompression everywhere. [The student used the prefix "ÌÏber".] Don't really understand if this is serious[ly made/done], but the kick drum is only emitting fro the left, the rest of the drums seems to barely be there, the guitar are loud in the middle and the vocals and choir as well. They seem to distort sometimes. Where are all the other instruments? Mostly makes me annoyed.
evaluations.original: Überkomprimerat överallt. Förstår inte riktigt om detta är seriöst, men baskaggen kommer enbart från vänster, resten av trummorna verkar knappt finnas med, gitarren ligger starkt i mitten och sången och kören likaså. De verkar dista ibland. Var är alla andra instrument?! Blir mest irriterad.

evaluations.comment: Lacks bass. Weird mix overall. The kick is loud and too strongly panned to the right. The drums sound as if it is [they are?] some ambient sound in mono in the back. Poor mix.
evaluations.original: Saknar bas. Konstig mix överlag. Kicken är stark samt d för starkt panorerad till höger. Trummorna låter som det är något ambient ljud som ligger i mono längst bak. Dålig mix.

evaluations.comment: I don't know what happened hear. A minimalistic approach doesn't work for this kind of song.
evaluations.original: Här vet jag inte vad som hände. Minimalistisk approach funkar liksom inte på en sån här låt...

evaluations.comment: Not to be "the one" but uh‰Û_ this is a natural disaster comparable to hurricane Katrina. The accident in Tjernobyl (is it spelt that way? [the students comment, not mine]). A crime against humanity. The kick is like [the same kine of "like" that I mentioned in an earlier comment] panned completely to the left. The bass didn't make it at all. The drums sounds as if they've been recorded using a cellphone. I wouldn't call this a "mix". Some people just want to watch the world burn. [The last sentence is in English in the students comment. I think it's a reference to "Batman: The Dark Night Returns".]
evaluations.original: Inte för att vara "den" men eh... det här var en naturkatastrof som kan jämföras med orkanen Katrina. Olyckan i Tjernobyl (stavas det så?). Ett brott mot mänskligheten. Kicken är typ pannad helt åt vänster. Basen kom inte med alls. Trummorna låter som om de spelats in med en mobiltelefon. Jag skulle inte kalla det här för en "mix". Some people just want to watch the world burn.

evaluations.comment: What happened here? A clicky kick, a guitar track and vocals. Impossible to assess as a full mix.
evaluations.original: Vad hände här? En klickig kick, ett gitarrspår och sång. Omöjligt att bedöma som en hel mix.

evaluations.comment: Bad‰Û_ like no reverb at‰Û_ [I hope "like" is the correct translation here. It's a translation of the Swedish word "typ" which is one of those almost meaningless words that (young) people tend to throw into sentences. Not "like" as in "I like something" but as in "And I was like, duuuuuh".] The drums are very poorly compressed. Sounds piss poor. did someone do anything but compress and mix down? BOOOOOH! *THROWS TOMATOES AND OLD DISEASED cATS*
evaluations.original: Dåligt... ingen reverb alls typ... trummorna är jättedåligt komprimerade. låter skitkasst. gjorde någon något annat än att komprimera och mixa ner?  BUUUUUUUUUU! *KASTA TOMATER OCH GAMLA AVLIDNA kATTER*

evaluations.comment: Where's the overheads???? Don't like this mix
evaluations.original: Vart är överhänget???? Gillar inte den här mixen

evaluations.comment: The kick drum sounds like shit.. Cardboard box. [The Swedish word is "pappkartong" which literally translated to "cardboard box". It likely means that the kick sounds boxy, or possibly as it it is and actual cardboard box that's being kicked, not a drum.] It only contains attack. The volumes are bad. The vocals are over compressed with poorly set hold and release, he [should probably have been "one"] hears that the compressor has time to release. The choir/background vocals are way too loud, the guitars as well. Sounds as if the drums was only recorded using the kick mic. The organ has been completely excluded here.
evaluations.original: Baskaggen låter skit.. Pappkartong. Den innehåller endast attack. Volymerna är dåliga. Sången är överkomprimerad med dåligt inställd hold och release, han hör att kompressorn hinner släppa. Kören är alldeles för stark, äben gitarrerna. Låter som att trummorna endast är inspelade med en kagge-mikrofon. Man har skippat orgeln helt här.

evaluations.comment: Bra balans i frekvens och snyggt reverb.
bekvämt balanserad, skön att lyssna på, vet ej om jag har mycket att kritisera på i denna mix. kanske att overheads ska upp en liten bit, men annars bra register, bra med rum och balans

Bra med värme och basåtergivning. Snyggt reverb på sång och fingerknäpp. Tydliga instrument utan att de sticker ut och blir något eget gentemot mixen i det stora hela. Sången ligger bra i mixen, lite mer framträdande kör kan vara önskvärt.
Bra stereobild, instrumenten ligger relativt bra i mixen med snygg efterklang. Dock lite tungt panorerad till vänster. Bäst utav mixarna till denna låt.
Bra balanserad, har både diskant och botten. Allt ligger bra och den är behaglig att lyssna på. Bra dynamik.
Bra frekvensspektrum, balans, effekter och dynamik. Inga invändningar.
Bra stereobild, bra balans både nivå och spektralmässigt. Rösten en aning burkig bara. Basen skulle kunna lyftas fram en aning!
Bra frekvensomfång, bra nivåer och efterklang. Fångar feelingen. Bäst hittills!
Jag gillar verkligen hur lätt mixen känns. Bra balans mellan varje element, förutom möjligtvis gitarren, som känns lite för vass och hård. Annars gillar jag den här mixen väldigt mycket.
Bra mix.
bra processerad sång. accordion perfekt nivå. bra balans
Bra balanserad.
Bra balans på mixen. Reverb och efterklang låter bra. Kan tycka att den låter något instängd.
Bra efterklang, lite "instängd" mix annars bra.
Snygg ballans lite "tjock"
Samma som 4an men med en bättre instrumentbalans i min mening. Men även här snyggt reverb på knäppningarna.
Bra efterklang. God frekvensbalans och instrumentbalans.
Varm och mjuk mix. Behaglig att lyssna på. Krispiga akustiska gitarrer. Sången, främst S-ljuden går att jobba på.
Bra nivåer. Bra effekter, bra värme. Kontrolleradf mid/lågmid.
bra mix: Mjuk och rund, bra effekt på sången.
Extremt framträdande knäppljud vilket tar fokus från sången, men är i sig snyggt mixat. Dragspelet fyller en bra funktion längre bak i mixen. Gitarrer och trummor känns välbalanserade.
Bra balans i mixen! Bra tydlighet och känns luftig.
Bra förutom att det låter lite instängt på sången

Den här mixen gillar jag! Bra balans i både nivå och frekvens. Bra reverb på sången - kanske skulle sången kunna vara lite starkare. Perfekt kick och bra virvel. Mixen skulle kunna ha lite mer "tjocklek" i lägre mellanregister, men bara lite.
Bra mix, aningen blöt och lite starkt mixat fingerknäpp.
kan behövas lite mer kompression i denna mixen. Annars bra.
Jag tror att lite mer sub i basgitarren hade låtit bra. Överlag är mixen är bra men jag saknar någonting. Kanske lite mer värme överlag.

Väldigt tydlig mix, alla instrument hörs bra. Allmänna soundet har en cool detaljerad klang med ganska mycket mellanfrekvenser. Med lite mer diskant på sången och ett litet mjukare mellanregister så sku mixen vara riktigt bra.
Bra nivåbalans och dynamik, lite diskantfattig men bra instrumentbalans
Bra balans i nivåer och frekvens, bortsett från att en av gitarrerna ligger för lågt i nivå.
väldigt lik låt 4, något klarare
Leadsången är en aning stark i förhållande till de andra spåren. Kicken saknas, för att ge mixen lite mer liv. Annars är ljudnivåerna okej och det är fin efterklang i mixen,
Bra frekvensgång. Volymbalansen är lite off med fingersnapsen. Bra dynamik. Snyggt delay och reverb.
Muddy bas. Otydligt dragspel, låter som att det innefattar mestadels mid. D
Känns muddig och dåligt frekvensfördelar. Skulle må bra av att öppnas upp i höga register. Annars ganska bra fördelning mellan instrument och bra med efterklang. För höga fingerknäpp dock.
för mycket mid, för lite diskant, låter instängt
Låter mullig typ
Lite för bumlig och instängd. Behöver öppnas upp i diskanten.
Burkig.
Best balance. Nice low end. All instruments present. Great vocal sound. Nice verb choice and placed well with the boack up vox. My favourite by far.
GOOD BALANCE, NICE AND BRIGHT

good initial sound
nice and wide 
great guitar sound
perfect click sound for the mix
balanced
Bel équilibre des niveaux et spectral. Tout vit!
the most detailed
Batterie plus compacte que 1, les plans sont bien gérés. C'est ample et cela respire, la voix est riche fréquentiellement et prend bien la place principale dans le pont.
All the mix is rather well balanced, in terms of volume and also spacially and timbrically. It only feels that the mid-range could be cleaner and have been more carefully worked on.
evaluations.original: Toda a mistura está bastante equilibrada tanto a nivel de volumes como timbricamente e espacialmente. Apenas me parece que a zona média podia estar mais trabalhada e limpa.

evaluations.comment: Vocals feel well placed, including harmonies. Feels like the mix could be cleaner.
this sounds good. all the parts shine through and have their own place in mix; tasty reverb.
Sounds pro and well mixed.
Vocals might need a little more presence
I like it. Dreamy accordion. Nice to hear some organ/piano. A bit confused/muddy, instruments not well separated.
Bass a bit too heavy and muddy. Nice balance, otherwise.
BASS TOO HEAVY WHICH IS A BIT DISTRACTING FROM THE REST OF THE MIX BUT IT SOUNDS COHESIVE IF I TRY TO IGNORE THE BASS IF THAT MAKES SENSE
Hear organ clearest on this mix. Can hear reverb.
Nice balance between male and female vocals.
evaluations.original: Bom equilibrio entre a voz masculina e feminina.

evaluations.comment: Masterisé ? compact.

Shimmery tops
Mid cut is too much
Wide panning. Can hear Rhodes very well. clear vocals. big bass. Big space. strumming guitar apparent.
Slightly masked/low lead vox, b. vox panning off to one side
Great mix, bass and kick are working. The voice sits in a nice place.

Très compacte, un peu trop de bas médiums dans le spectre général. 
Le synthé (à gauche) sort du mix, devrait être légèrement rentré pour être sur le même plan que l'accordéon.
Belle voix, bien placée. Très bon mix !
Nice one.
Very well balanced.
- a predominance of low/medium frequencies

good space & balance,
bass guitar a little loud
Good vocal, balance is good. The mix is a little dull. Bass is muddy.
good organ; a bit thin on the vox
reall nice. full of body.vocals sound great, could be a touch louder.
A balanced mix. I would take some of the low-end out of the bass guitar.
evaluations.original: Mistura equilibrada. TIrava um pouco alguns graves do baixo

evaluations.comment: Good Mix. probably has a bit too much bass. Good back vocals. Nice accordion.
First half is very well controlled. The vocals could be a little louder. Some master compression killing the volumes at time as well. Wonderful use of reverb to generate space in the second half.

Bien dans l'ensemble, compréhension correcte entre Kick/bass.
Manque de backlead.

Mix simple, manque d'idées créatives avec délais par exemple
Par contre bien réalisé

Refrain : Reverb bien sur les claps du refrain

Couplet :
    -> les synthés ressortent bien
    -> le phrasé de guitare 2 ne ressort pas assez
All these instruments match very well.
A bit too much reverb on vocals, whereas ac guitar pretty dry.
cant hear kick good vox/backs balance a bit bass heavy

Vocals not mixed well, too low in the mix. Guitar has too much attack, not compressed well. Can actually hear piano/bright, nice sounding, very low in mix. Drums are too loud compared to the rest of the drums.
mieux définie que sur la 1, cool les guitares, efficace, un peu trop de bas
LOWER FREQUENCIES SOUND MUDDY.
Beside the apparent good equalization, I was fond of how the instruments were distributed among speakers. Having for instance the accordeon panned to the left
evaluations.original: Alem da aparente boa equalização, gostei da distribuição dos instrumentos pelas colunas. Panorâmica por exemplo acordeão ao lado L.

evaluations.comment: Depth in the vocal, clear drum sound in the center, overall balance and image are good.
Vocals are a little thin and quiet and the mix is bassy
great levels just not as bright as it could be, which would really allow the guitar to shine in the mix
DRUMK KIT MAY BE SLIGHTLY TOO DARK.
vox a bit low

Good mix overall. There is however excessive loudness in the basslines. Interesting presence of the keyboards and acoustic guitars. Nice use of panning (accordeon - left / piano - right). Reverb would have been necessary on the backing vocals.
evaluations.original: Boa mistura, porém há um excesso nos ganhos das linhas graves (baixo).  Interessante presença mais marcante das teclas e guitarras acústicas. Bom uso das panorâmicas (acordeon - left / piano - right). Falta reverb nos backing vocals.

evaluations.comment: Nice balance of the harmonies... Could have added reverb and or been panned to one side? Drums are nice for the style. The clicks are nice and reverb-y and they are at a good level in comparison with the vocals.
Instrumentals have good impact.
a bit of proximity but i'm ok with it
Reverb sur la voix qui ne raccorde pas vraiment avec le reste du mix.
BASS IS TOO LOUD AND KICK NEEDS TO BE BROUGHT UP. VOCALS NEED DE ESSING. OTHERWISE GREAT MIX

Bon mix car tous les instruments trouvent leur place, la voix est un poil trop derrière, et la guitare un poil devant.
Accordeon sur le passage calme trop fort.
Un peu trop de grave globalement qui ne marche pas si bien que ça avec ce style. Mix propre esthétiquement, manque de crade comme le ferait 1 et 8, mais moins d'erreur de niveaux que les autres.
Esthétique du mix un peu plus pop que 1 et 8, qui avaient un esprit plus "music country" et REM.
The bass is too present in some moments. The main vocal is too distant.
evaluations.original: Baixo torna-se demasiado presente em alguns momentos. Voz principal demasiado distante.

evaluations.comment:
Refrain : beaucoup de guitare acoustique. Manque de batterie et de guitare electriques. Les reverb ne ma plaisent pas. Belle présence dans les graves

Couplet : très peu vivant

Low-end is slightly excessive. The first section is amiss as the instrumental part should not be as present as it is. The lead singer should not be so present. Panning is ocasionally too wide, sending the mix out of equilibrium. The vocal reveberation is nice enough.
evaluations.original: Ligeiramente demasiados graves. O inicio falha pois o instrumental não deveria ter estado tão presente. O vocalista não deveria estar tão presente. As panorâmicas a certos pontos estão demasiada abertas desequilibrando a mistura. O reverb da voz no entanto está simpático.

evaluations.comment: instruments‘ sound too loud

Guitare acoustique trop forte là aussi, idem pour les overheads et le claquement de doigts. On n'entend plus la caisse claire et le piano électrique est à peine perceptible. Un peu trop généreux en basses
Bass has too much subsonic frequencies. Vocals are too mid-rangey. One does not feel the piano. Guitars are also not proeminent enough.
evaluations.original: baixo com excesso de sub; voz com equalização muito média; não se sente o piano, guitarras pouco presentes também

evaluations.comment:
- Drums could be higher
- Vocals are well mixed, maybe could use a little reverb
- Bass a little too powefull
- Strings too high
cymbals could be brighter and closer; tubby bass; accordian is as important as vocal? nuh uh
Too much mids, a lot of phasing issues so the stereo image is not stable. But there is a nice country feeling to this mix.
The back up is bit loud in this one too.
vocals really thin and far away, rest is boxy and dry

- Bass heavy overpowering the guitars but the vocals ring rough which even further detaches it from the rest of the overall instrumentation 
- Snare is way to intense and booming
the space in the music is too large and the reverberation is too obvious.
quiet vocal
wacky reverbs, way too much bass; accordian too low; drums obscure

muddy, not much clarity
kick and bass get lost in each other
BGV need to come down
Too much bass. Too much bass. You cannot differentiate instruments in the second part.

4th: Great balance. Vocals with a touch of reverb that is too much. Stuff gets muddy on the low end, while trying the compromise between roundness and confusion. Good mix technically, but does not fit the song, and the timbre of certain elements is not appropriate.
Powerful drums, nice mix. Present and engaging lead vocal.
Very warm, subtle mix.
Vox too quiet. drums sound swag but are too loud; good amount of bass freqencies (bgtr & kik); reasonable person's panning of the 2&4 gtr ++; sounds like a record. too much sub bass.
nice bass, tight drums.
Best of all, although I would have liked to hear a little of reverb in the female voice in the first part. The drums are maybe too present.
Nice tight bass. Good balance
Great dynamic mix. The groove really comes alive in this mix.
Bass a little forward, different space than vocals. quite clear.
ok mix; ok drums; clicks little too dry and loud
good low end, good balance, good vocal
The sense of space is not bad. The right or left sound track is mixed in a wonderful method.
Clicks a bit high, vox a bit isolated
the timbre is not good enough.
Would like to hear the backing vocals a bit more
pretty balanced
Nice driving bass.
Drums a bit too loud. Kick and toms feel way up front, with cymbals way back.
generally good
not too bright; lots of punch
Nice mix but lead vocal is really limp and lost. feels like it is from another song
vocals not so prominent on the vocal parts
Too much comp on drums

Vocals can be a little too quiet and therefore sound sometimes a little thin! In the second half the clicks are far too loud for the quiet vocals. Needs better balancing and automation use. Instrumentation at the start is nice.
less snaps. please
Mix is good, sounds a bit flat EQ whise. Pan is ok
伴奏声很重
muffled bass, overall image is slightly narrow
weak, distant, better in the first part but a bit too much low freq (not when he says waiting)
Drums a little loud on mix.
Vocals too quiet
too much of drums
best: Impactful and well balanced. Vocals are just a touch buried in the first half. Fits with the song.

Not very wide
Very even Frequency range
great levels, great compression on guitars and vocal. Can hear everything clearly with a great amount of brightness.
Close Vocals, Nice harmony balance, My favourite mix.
Här har jag inte mycket att klaga på. Kanske lite starkt mixade fingerknäpp.
grosse basse, la plus présente, marche super bien, punchy
VERY GOOD BALANCE ON EVERYTHING, VERSE SOUNDS A LITTLE TO AGGRESSIVE FOR MY LIKING BUT IT WORKS
Bra balans i frekvenserna. Mixen låter som en helhet. Dock något instängd. Sången kunde framhävas lite mer.

a bit too much low end weight but pretty tight
guitar could come down a bit
vocals up a little
gitarrspåret är "lite" jättelite för hög och slår sig ut lite extra än vad den ska göra.
Bra balans i frekvens. Sången kunde vara lite mer framträdande.
Lite fegt panorerad, hade kunnat fått en snyggare stereobild om man panorerat fullt, men överlag en bra balans i mixen, det mesta ligger där det ska.
Good drum balance. Nice punch to the mix. Acoustic guitar is a little detached from the mix. Vocals are good.
Min favorit i testet. Känns öppen, levande och ganska torr. Jag tycker att det passar musikstilen bra. Kanske hade kunnat ha lite mer sub i basgitarren för att förstärka det sköna groovet.
Luftig och snygg! Bra balans mellan instrument och snygg efterklang. Allt låter naturligt och limmar bra.
Skön rund ton. Bra frekvensbalans och instrumentbalans. Bra dynamik.
Väldigt fin balans och väldigt vackra gitarrer. hade kunnat ha lite starkare sång ibland, men är inte så man stör sig för mycket på det.
Bra nivåbalans, men rösten skulle ha varit starkare på refrängen. Bra stereobild, men panoreringen lutar en aning åt höger.
Väldigt bra frekvensspektrum och balans, kanske något tung i lågmiden.
Mjuk bra mix som är behaglig att lyssna på.
snygg balans riktigt snygg balans. saknar reverb på knäppljudet.

La basse est un peu forte, et les deux guitares (accords) aussi, au point que la voix paraisse derrière et que l'ensemble paraisse agressif. Cependant l'homogénéité entre les instruments n'est pas mauvaise.
Öppen, tydliga instrument. Sången är lite tillbakadragen och lite åt det vassare hållet.
För lite eferklang, men övrigt en välbalanserad behaglig mix att lyssna på.
ganska bra balans
Skön!
seemed well balanced
trummorna känns något mullrig, inte så klara..
VOX TOO DEEP IN MIX AT TIMES.

Le kick sort du mix, dommage. La voix est un peu loin dans la première partie, on a parfois du mal à comprendre les paroles (masquée par la guitare). On sent un compresseur travailler (pomper) régulièrement... (le plan de la voix bouge).
Claquements de doigts trop devants par rapport à la cymbale en contre temps. trop de guitare en contre temps (masque d'autres éléments). C'est un bon mix !
Bra frekvensbalans, bra nivåer. Lite för smal stereobild.
Lovely reverb on the vocals. Good level for the finger clicks. The harmonies are at a nice level too. Guitars are at a nice balance with the rest of the instruments.
klar och fin röst. lite torr och för mycket typ 500Hz i basen tror jag
Grymt akustiskgitarr-ljud men lite starkt, snyggt reverb. Bra dynamik,
Stabil mix. Sången kunde ha varit något starkare i mixen. Fin klarhet och attack.
Tydlig och ren sång. Något starka "s". Bra tjocklek, botten, och tydlighet i mixen. Om något skulle mixen kunna ha lite mindre lägre mellanregister - ett mellanting mellan den här och mix 5.
Tydliga gitarrer som ligger långt fram i mixen. Snygg efterklang på sången, men den hamnar lite för långt bak i mixen. Bra knäppljud.
SLIGHTLY TOO COMPRESSED, SOUNDS LIKE THE MIDS HAVE BEEN SCOOPED SOMEWHAT, MAYBE TOO MUCH
Bra mix, synd att sången ligger bakom gitarren. Kanske lite för diskantrik.
Bra frekvens och nivåbalans. Bra reverb, lite låg sång.
- good mix, but the voice seems to be not loud enough (guitars are too loud)
Bra tydlighet i sången och bra balans.

On sent que ça pompe. Sinon ça reste plutôt correct et agréable à l'écoute. La voix est bien traitée. Le duo basse / guitare acoustique est très rond et à l'avant, que qui enlève au morceau son côté creux.
TRY AND FOCUS ON THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE KICK DRUM AND THE BASS, MAKE THEM GEL TOGETHER
sången ligger för långt bak, någon sub basfrekvens som ligger lite högt, överlag bra
Kick and bass are too loud, guitar too bright and the vocal gets drowned.
Konstigt skuren i mellanfrekvenserna. Annars helt ok. Kanske vissa bakfrekvenser för genomträngande.

- Odd dynamics on the guitars where the upstroke sounding strum is way too heavy and pushes down the rest of the mix
- Bass rings out constantly with no rest and is too audible
Lagom efterklang
Bra mix, dock är den lite för tunn och tappar känslan. Sången är väldigt "SSSSS--ig" (Låter som man ökat frekvenserna på sången runt 5-8khz.)
Cool mix, bra nipper. Varm, stabil. Även här lite för starka diskonter på rytmgitarren.
Varm och "kaxig" mix, men sången försvinner lite i allt annat.
KICK DRUM TOO LOUD. SNARE IS ALL TONE, NO PUNCH.
Reverb +, voix lead pas au centre ? Guitares sèches fortes, mais du rythme.
Creux dans le bas medium pour une présence très accentuée dans le haut du spectre, ce qui fait perdre de la présence à la voix. Guitare rythmique sur mixée. Batterie punchy.
Bra dynamik. Lagom mycket reverb.
För mycket reverb och vass diskant på sången. Annars bra botten.
voice too far & too much acoustic guitar
Voix un peu sous mixée, et ne s'épanouit pas, guitare prend trop de place

The balance does not work. The vocal is not cutting through except for the bridge, the instruments of the rhythmic section sound separated to each other. The acoustic guitar sounds nice but makes the image left-heavy and is not supported by the drums and bass enough. And the general color is a bit nasal.

Refrain : Beaucoup trop de guitare acoustique et de kick. trop gentil à mon gout. la voix 

Couplet : peu vivant. On entend beaucoup trop la compression de la voix
En aning för mycket punch i kicken, basen försvinner in i mixen. Den akustiska gitarren är en aning för stark, kunde även ha varit en aning bredare. Mixen är även en aning torr.

Kick un peu fort !
Impression de petit son de voix qui est trop derrière
Problème d'équilibre de niveaux sur le couplet. 
     ->Sur le refrain la voix arrive d'un coup sur le devant, gênant
     -> Synthé trop faible sur le couplet


Basse bien sur le refrain

mixed a little more to the right. very weird sensation
acoustic has a nice tone
harmony is lost in mix
good click

Trop de différence de niveau de voix entre couplet et refrain. 
Manque de backlead. 
Kick pas dans le mix.
Guitare acoustique un peu aggressive.

Guitare trop devant également, voix trop derrière, kick trop fort et batterie. Couleur spectrale de la guitare sympa, marche avec la musique.
Globalement trop de grave.
Lite grumlig. Bra akustiskt gitarrljud.
Låter relativt omixat. Låter väldigt panorerat till center. Snygga fingerknäpp.Tycker att gitarrerna tar över för mycket, annars så är nivåerna ok.
Väldigt komprimerad.
Good spatialisation. Vocals sound lost in the mix in the first part of the sample.
Bra volymbalans och dynamik, snygga effekter och bra old-school "riktig känsla". Lite för stark virvel framförallt bara.
Sången tar över. Trummorna låter helt omixade. Basen försvinner.
Bra balans och lagom med reverb. Basfattig.
Bra avvägd. Mycket närvaro och attackrik utan att bli hård.
Klart bäst med klarhet och bra balans
Bra dynamik. Lagom mycket reverb.
Bra nivå och spektralbalans. Rösten skulle kunna stärkas lite och kicken och snaren sänkas lite dock.
lite för "tunn" mix, man hör att spår saknas om man jämför den med sina rivaler. Bättre nivåer hade uppskattats
Bra mix men den saknar en del botten
Bra balans i ljudbilden. Låter bra!
bra mix, sången kunde legat lite längre fram i mixen
Bra balans på mixen. Sången låter lite för lång bak i mixen och väldigt s-ig. Kicken låter tung.
Helt okej. Aningen top-ig.
Kanske lite starka trummor ibland, men är fortfarande en bra mix som känns väldigt genrerätt. Gillar reverbet som är lagt på knäppningarna. Sången låter riktigt nice.
Det är något som skär i öronen. Mindre hög-mid frekvenser hade räddat det ganska bra.
För tydliga trummor. För lite bas och låg mid. Aningen mycket dynamik. God efterklang.
Lite instängd mix. Inte jättesnygg virvel.
Känns för mono och för torr. Annars ganska snygg frekvensbalans. Några jobbiga frekvenser som sticker ut och saknar lite bas.
Tydliga trummor, en aning hård mix, hade kunnat göras mjukare, annars bra.
Bra tryck. Dock lite för mycket tryck, och inte så behaglig att lyssna på när man vrider upp volymen.
Saknar lite mid, men har bra effekter och balans och trumsound.
På gränsen till att sången är för vass. Bra och tydliga instrument, tycker dock att basen borde förtydligas.
för starka knäppljud, sången känns ensam. för stark snare.

Bra nivåer. Lite stark virvel. Kicken kommer ut och hörs tydligt. Kanske sticker den ut lite ur mixen. Det är mycket möjligt att detta är min och Fredriks mix - jag mixar nästan alltid trummor förhållandevis starkt. Bra reverb på sången! Mixen känns lite hård och "garageig". Till mitt försvar hade jag bara sovit en timma natten innan mixning.
Annars bra men sången har för mycket mellanfrekvenser, för lite diskant.
För lite botten i mixen. Sången är väldigt vass och middig. Knäppljuden träder även här fram för mycket. Virveltrumman ringer lite för mycket för min smak.
Lite "väsig" men hyfsad mix!
för lite bas
Dålig stereobild då endast gitarrerna uppfattas som smått stereo. Reverb finner jag också i mono. Men annars så fungerar mixen då instrumenten ligger bra i nivå. Bra iphone mix!
Stort glapp i balansen mellan instrument och sång.
Lite instängd sång men bra instrumentmix och bra dynamik.
Väldigt tunn i sången. Saknar frekvenser i botten. Trummor lite plastiga, och för starka jämförelse med det andra.
Något burkig och instängd. Generellt lite för hård. Men komponenterna är tydliga och bra på så sätt.
Okej nivåer, bra effekter. Saknar sub. Lite för diskanta gitarrer.
Leadsången är en aning nasal, okej efterklang. Ljudnivåerna är obalanserade.
Mycket walki-talki över sången jämfört med andra mixerna
Väldigt burkig och nasal. Behöver större bredd i frekvensspektat.
För diskantrik, annars bra
Väldigt nasal ibland
La voix est un peu forte et il y a un peu trop de chorus dessus. Les équilibres entre les instruments sont bons et la cohésion entre eux l'est aussi.
Dry approach, fat sound on the rhythmic section, interesting stereo image, works well for the style but the lead vocal is slightly masked by the instrumental, especially the drums.

Voix lead un peu derrière, mais le niveau de 2ème est intéressant. L'image stéréo est vivante, est le mix du background est bien : il est plus analytique, on entend toutes les interventions sans ne pas être compacte pour autant.

Un peu de trop de sifflantes sur la voix
un peu trop de caisse claire sur le couplet
pas assez de basse sur le refrain
Equilibre pas optimal entre guitare acoustique et électrique : il me semble que la guitare acoustique mériterait à être un peu plus en avant sur ce style de musique
Manque d'idée créatives avec délais ou autres
la voix 2 est un peu forte mais c'est intéressant
Mou mais équilibre +/- OK

Manque de basse
Trop de 2e voix (étrange quand elle s'arrête), elle est devant la voix principale.

too much snare top
missing ac guitar in 2nd part
Trop de backlead. Beaucoup de caisse claire et de kick, pas de fusion avec la basse. Snap un peu fort.
Bel équilibre, peut etre la snare est un trop compressée et sur mixée. Punchy.
Refrain : bons équilibres (mais trop de 2e voix)

Sifflantes de la voix qui est en plus de ça un peu trop haut médium et qui manque de chaleur, voix back a presque plus de chaleur que la voix principale, et voix un peu trop en dessous en niveau pour ce style de musique
J'aime bien le côté creux de la batterie, sans vrais graves, légère, pourrait être pris comme un défaut ça va bien avec le style. Prise de position.
Meilleure esthétique de mix selon moi même si plusieurs défauts présents.
pas fan de la snare,
- a big problem with the snare : too much medium frequencies
trop de snare et qui sonne boomy
Great.
i think the hierarchy is good and all instruments are clear.
The feeling of layers is perfect. The last beats and cantos are very good. The occured time of accordion is excellent. The transition of the different instruments are naturally.
sounds 和谐
good balance
Vocal reverb too long, needs some de-essing. The whole track has too much reverb. Pretty good balance in terms of level and frequency, though.
Too much reverb on the vocal.
Levels are good, prominent vocals.

Nice mix. The tonal balance is well achieved. Nice presence of the bass-line without compromising the remaining parts. Excellent dynamics in the vocals and backing vocals. I can understand every element in the mix. Excellent work in panning the strings and automating the panning of the accordeon
evaluations.original: Boa mistura, balanço de graves, médios e agudos bem definida. Boa presença das linhas de baixo, sem comprometer as demais linhas. Excelente dinâmica nos vocais e backing vocals. Percebo todos os elementos da mistura. Excelente trabalhos nos pans das cordas e automação panorâmica do acordeon.

evaluations.comment: Fairly balanced.
evaluations.original: bastante equilibrada

evaluations.comment: lead voc rev too crisp; bg voc needs better/more comp; piano/accordian mix little light
Very balanced mix. I enjoy the vocal processing. It is interesting for the song's style.
evaluations.original: mistura bastante equilibrada, Gosto do tratamento da voz. É interessante para o estilo de música

evaluations.comment: Plain in general, but not bad. Like the eq for the lead voice. Gives more of a live sensation, still track 8 is better.
sounds ok
Can hear reverb. Little too much high EQ
it seems a live recording (with all the room problems you can have in a live recording). Interesting.
Good balance. Fairly centred in the middle. A little dry perhaps?
In some moments the vocals are out of balance with the mix, becoming more proeminent and escaping the space that the reverb creates for the drums.
evaluations.original: Em alguns momentos a voz foge da mistura, ficando mais presente e saido do espaço criado para a bateria com o reverb.

evaluations.comment: Lacks definition and low end in some moments. The vocals are well crafted.
evaluations.original: Pouca definição e ausência dos graves em alguns momentos. Voz bem trabalhada.

evaluations.comment: vocal, drums dominates the mix too much. Panning is wide but lack of details and clarity.
good
sounds a bit distant, good balance
The drums are in a good path: it seems to sound a bit too dirty or scratched [sic] for what the song is asking. It started out very nicely. The lead vocal, however, should not have been as present.
evaluations.original: A bateria está no bom caminho: parece que soa demasiado suja ou arranhada para o que a música pede.  Começou muito bem. A voz no entanto não deveria estar tão presente.

evaluations.comment: nasal vocal
drums seem small. big vocals

- Good Drums mix
- Guitars and Strings too high
- Vocals also extremely high
- Good bass presence
Starts quite nice and punchy. Vocals are well balanced and lots of energy. Some volume drops, needs a better master compressor. Second half however the vocals feel quite dead.
Too much reverb on drums. I think they should have a bit more definition. Acoustic guitar seems a bit thin. Vocal should be a bit louder. Bass seem ok. And keys as well.
bright vox; somewhat hollow
The mix is enjoyable but I consider it to be lacking in low-end.
evaluations.original: Mistura está agradável mas considero que lhe faltam frequências graves.

evaluations.comment: The beginning back up vocal is also too loud. Vocal seems very seperate from the rest of the ensemble.
too roomy, but good otherwise

vox are overly harsh (too much 2-8k) and have too much reverb; good level and presence on drums; Why is everyone panning the one gtr that hits on 2&4 hard left???? there are too many lows and it really throws off the stereo image and is distracting, and also i don't like itwhere is the kick drum?
not sure about the reverb on main vox. vox loud.
This mix seems very well balanced, both in volume and in timbre. However, it seems to have a high-pass filter, as the low-end is too subdued.
evaluations.original: Esta mistura parece muito bem equilibrada, a níveis de volume e timbricamente correcta. No entanto, parece que lhe foi aplicado um passa-altos porque a zona grave está muito baixa.

evaluations.comment: Vocals and balance of lead backing is quite nice. Lacks body though
Very thin
too much reverb on drums, all sounds
Mix is ok, poor EQ
lyrics are too seperated from the instruments.
second voice not loud enough
Muffled, vocals too loud

2nd: Quite nice balance and positioning. The vocals are quite clear and well placed, treated differently for the first part and second which shows some thoughtfulness, though I'm not as fond of the way they sit over the second part.

- Great Drums and Vocals mixes
- Good Guitars and Bass mixes
- Strings too much on the right
- Good reverb on Vocals
Low-end is slightly excessive. Vocal reverb is too much. Very good balance and general spacialization. The handclaps are well placed.
evaluations.original: Graves ligeiramente muito presentes. A reverberação na voz é exagerada. De resto, há um muito bom equilibrio e espacialização geral. A percussão feita palmas mão está bem colocada.

evaluations.comment: Good stereo placement of the vocals.
evaluations.original: Bom posiç\ao da voz e imagem stereo.

evaluations.comment: Nice balance between the different elements. Mix not too bright nor too dark. The vocals couls have been sligthly louder in some moments. A little less reverb on the vocals might not be a bad thing.
evaluations.original: Bom equilíbrio entre os diferentes elementos. Mistura nem demasiado aguda, nem demasiado grave. Voz poderia estar ligeiramente mais alta em alguns momentos. Talvez um pouco menos de reverb na voz não fosse mau.

evaluations.comment: Excessive reverb and gain on the main vocals that places them "outside the song". The low-end lines are well balanced. Nice presence of the backing vocals. Accordeon and piano is not proeminent enough. Vocals are too loud overall (especially toms, snare and kick). Overheads aren't as proeminent as they should be during sparser instrumentation parts.
evaluations.original: Excesso de reverb e gain que desloca a voz para " fora da música", linhas graves balanceadas, boma presença dos backing vocals, falta presença dos acordeons e pianos, excesso da presença da bateria em geral (principalmente tons, snare e kick), falta presença de overheads nas partes com menos elementos.

evaluations.comment: Interesting mix, but the drums could stand out more in some moments.
evaluations.original: Mistura interessante, mas a bateria parece sobressair um pouco em alguns momentos

evaluations.comment: Drums are a bit loud when compared to the rest. Especially the snare drum.
evaluations.original: Bateria um pouco alta em relação ao resto. Principalmente o Snare.

evaluations.comment: The vocal seems ok, should have a bit less reverb. The drums seem a bit boxed up. Acoustic guitar seems fine. Bass is a bit high in the mix.Back vocals are ok.
Vocals not present enough and with excessive reverb. The mix is unbalanced, especially for the piano, accordeon and guitars.
evaluations.original: voz pouco presente e com excesso de reverb; mistura desequilibrada relativamente ao piano, acordeão e guitarras

evaluations.comment: The snare and voclas are too loud, but the mix is very well balanced. In general, I only think that the mid-range is to proeminent.
evaluations.original: A tarola e a voz estão um pouco altas, no entanto a mistura está muito bem equilibrada. No geral apenas me parece que o timbre médio é demasiado preponderante.

evaluations.comment: Very dynamic mix,  maybe a bit too much delay on the vocal.  The drums and vocals are together nicely,  the guitar on the right could be a bit softer, it doesn't play a lot of important melodies.  Balance lead and backing vocal is fine.
evaluations.original:
Heel dynamische mix, misschien iets te veel delay op de stem. De drums en bas zitten goed samen, de gitaar die
rechts in de mix zit mag misschien wel wat zachter, die speelt niet zoveel belangrijke melodieën.
Balans lead en backing zit wel goed.

evaluations.comment: The guitar on the right bothers me a little bit,  it is very present,  and makes it quite dry due to its directness.  The delays are fun but maybe a bit too much.  The bass could be a bit deeper/further in the mix as far as I'm concerned.
evaluations.original:
De gitaar rechts stoort mij wat, hij is enorm aanwezig, en maakt het ook redelijk droog door zijn directheid.
De delays zijn tof maar misschien net iets te veel.
De bas mocht van mij ook iets dieper in de mix liggen.

evaluations.comment: The guitars are a bit too much on the foreground in my opinion.  The delay on the lead is bothering me a bit.  The backing vocal could have been a bit louder as far as I'm concerned.
evaluations.original: Ik vind de gitaren te veel op de voorgrond liggen. de Delay op lead stoort mij een beetje. de backing vocal had van ,ij wat harder gemogen

evaluations.comment: Though the mix uses delays tastefully,  other elements are so loud and dry that the general atmosphere is compromised.  The whole sounds rather 'honky' (too much 800 Hz?).  The soft part is quite atmospheric, which is rather lacking in the verse.  In mono the mix almost retains its complete atmosphere  and it's obvious how loud the guitar and snare are.
evaluations.original:
Hoewel de mix smaakvol gebruik maakt van delay's, zijn andere elementen zo luid en droog dat de algemene sfeer gecompromitteert is.
Het geheel klinkt nogal 'honky' (een teveel aan 800Hz?)
De zachte passage is erg sfeervol, wat de strofe eerder mist.
in mono behoudt de mix bijna zijn volledige sfeer en valt het op hoe luid de gitaar en snare staan.

evaluations.comment: A lot of guitar,  not a lot of atmosphere from the accordion and percussion.  And a bit too much bass.
evaluations.original: veel gitaar, weinig sfeer van de accordeon en percussie. en iets te veel bas

evaluations.comment: Slapback delay is often annoying at the wrong times, especially in the quiet bit at the end.  Guitar on the right asking for too much attention,  too much (messy) bass.
evaluations.original:
Slabback delay vaak storend op de verkeerde momenten vooral in het rustigere stuk op het einde.
rechtse gitaar trekt te veel aandacht., te veel (rommelige) bas

evaluations.comment: Full band instrumental, which is nice as we can hear everything in the arrangements but some instruments are too strong compared to the lead vocal that is masked, too compressed and not leading enough. The synths on the left are definitively too loud. The acoustic guitar sounds very well. The up-beat is kind of loud compared to the down-beat.
cool la reverb' sur la voix, super batterie, voix intelligibles et bien intégré dans l'espace, mais un peu trop prononcé à 1khz
the difference between the 2 parts is interesting, rhodes a bit too loud
Voix un peu étriquée...

bon impact SD
bel espace et choix de réverb longue intéressante sur le refran
sur le couplet manque de réverb par contre ? 
Mais du coup contraste couplet/refrain intéressant !
la guitare 2 avec le petit motif un peu brouillon
la voix ressort bien, est bien traitée
le timbre de la basse est bien
belle couleur des claps dans le refrain
équilibré, correct, mais peu flatteur, agressif également.

Je n'aime pas beaucoup le timbre de la batterie, assez brouillon. Les guitares se mélangent, la voix pourrait être moins réverbérée pour mieux s'intégreer au reste. Il pourrait y avoir un poil plus de chorus sur la voix.
Plus compressé et mono, plus d'aspérité dans le son, son plus direct, mais voix ne respire pas assez
Equilibre général assez réussi. Un peu trop de guitare qui égraine les accords, et de synthé. La voix a une couleur assez particulière, un peu dure, mais dans le style. Manque légèrement de basse.

Problème dans le bas-medium avec la guitare électrique. 
Un peu trop de backlead dans le refrain. Les équilibres sont correctes.

- the sound engineer created a real "space" with reverbs : quite pleasant to listen
- the balance is not convincing

Refrain : couleur des voix intéressantes. 
Equilibres parfois peu cohérents : rhodes très fort, il aurait pu etre mieux suivi ou plus compressé

Couplet : la couleur des voix aurait pu changer un peu, elle convient moins bien au couplet. Claps très secs : étrange
Reverb voix sur la voix un peu too much, bon niveau par rapport à la musique sauf la guitare qui est un peu trop devant, manque de maitrise de la dynamique de la batterie
voix nazillarde et sous mixée, trop compressée. Fouilli dans le bas medium. bosse dans les 2khz désagréable
good overall mix , nice vocals punching through.

The vocals and choir are loud in relationship to the mix. The overall timbre of the mix is excessivelly in the high-mid range, that makes it hard to listen to. The use of reverbs makes the snare drum and the vocal too far away, and it removes definition and clarity.
evaluations.original:
A voz e os coros estão demasiados altos em relação a toda a mistura.
O timbre geral de toda a mistura tem um presença exagerada de uma zona média aguda que o torna difícil de ouvir.
A utilização de rverbs afasta demasiado a tarola a voz porque lhe retiram definição e recorte.

evaluations.comment:
good stereo mix. 
Vox too far back in the mix
less attention on Vox
nice keys tone
bass could be higher
I like this I think maybe the vocals could be louder in the mix or the instruments turned down. everything else is quite nice. the vocals have potentially too much mids.
The female vocal causes some discomfort.
evaluations.original: Voz feminina cria algum desconforto.

evaluations.comment: Mix plus roots, sonne bien dans ce style, background plus sec, traitement de la voix lead intéressant (un peu vintage), on sent l'espace et en même temps elle est toujours devant. Mais le suivi sur le lead est un peu irrégulier et s'étend par moment.
CAN HEAR THE COMPRESSOR MOVE SLIGHTLY ON THE MASTER BUS, LEAD VOCAL NEEDS DE-ESSING AND SLIGHTLY TOO COMPRESSED. STILL PRETTY GOOD MIX THOUGH
VOCALS SLIGHTLY TOO LOUD. THE MID RANGE FREQUENCIES ARE QUITE PRESENT, MAKING THE SONG SOUND SLIGHTLY OLD-RADIO'ESQUE, ESPECIALLY IN THE SNARE.
Needs a bit more main vocal. Overall good balance. Good Mix.
DRUM EQ WEIRD, SOME THINGS ARE STICKING OUT OF THE MIX WEIRDLY IN PLACES, SOME HARSH BITS

- Drums are very distant and don't sound connected to the rest of the instrumentation
- The vocals are very in your face
DRUMS AND BASS NOT BALANCED WELL.
VERY GOOD MIX. SOME MINOR EQ ADJUSTMENTS TO THE DRUMS AND SOME LOUDER BASS GUITAR WOULD MAKE THIS MIX BETTER BUT OVERALL VERY GOOD JOB.
Lacks a bit of body.
evaluations.original: Falta um pouco de corpo

evaluations.comment:
vocals could come up and guitar down
snare has a weird resonant?
vocal levels a bit up and down
more reverb when the instruments drop out
snaps could use a bit of space as well and pushed back a little

- Vocals too high, and too much reverb on the vocals
- Good Strings mix
- Could have more bass (like the track 2)

OH trop compressés pour moi, impression de retour du release
Refrain : Claps trop forts ? 
Couplet : bien pour la partie instrumentale. Par contre voix pas assez compressée ou automatisée. Elle est parfois trop rentrée et parfois trop sortie
Bass not proeminent enough. Snare too loud.
evaluations.original: baixo pouco presente, tarola muito alta

evaluations.comment: Snare drum is way too loud

This is a great mix. Great balance of all the instruments. The vocals almost need a telephone-sounding effect on them to create a unique texture within the song. Could have even been just for the "I've been waiting... etc"
Reverb de la voix non appropriée, snap à droite désagréable, stereo déséquilibrée la plupart du temps. Ensemble trop medium mais tout de même scintillant. Suivi en volume de la voix désagréable.
Too much EQ and compression, this mix sounds like a live stage performance with a difficult live sound system. Tiring for a studio production but very lively.

- something too much is the guitars (low/medium frequencies)
- a small space for the voice (short reverb, low level)
- too many guitars

Nice mix. Excessive presence of the attack cymbals [sic] coming from the overheads at some occasions. Lacking in gain control automation and reverb in the main vocals during the pre-chorus. Nice presence of the accordeon. Excessive mid-range and low-end in the rythm guitars (which also lack in stereo placement in order to have the sound be fluider and lighter).
evaluations.original: Boa mistura, excesso de presença dos pratos de ataque provindos dos overheads em determinadas partes, falta automação de controle de ganho e reverb nos vocais principais no pré refrâo, boa presença do acordeon, excesso de médios e graves na guitarras ritmicas (falta também uso de pans para deixar o som mais fluido e leve).

evaluations.comment: The snare is too loud and boxy. Vocals are dull. No sense of space. Electric guitar sounds like cotton wool.
Vocals sound too dry.
too much high end
Vocals has too much mid-range, which makes it muffled. The backing vocals have a reverb that does not fit. The lead vocal would need bigger attention to its volume variation.
evaluations.original: Voz com demasiados médios que a tornam abafada. Voz secundária com um reverb que não se adequa. Voz principal precisava de uma maior atenção aos volumes.

evaluations.comment:
Voix légèrement gonflée dans le bas medium, et un peu trop sifflante. 
Pas assez de kick.
Aspect compact des instruments, manque d'air. Pourrait être plus éclaté dans la stéréo. 
Problème dans le spectre général.
trop de 500 Hz, pas fan du traitement de la voix (reverb', eq)
can't hear the drums, vocals are clear
Dull and boxy.
Even if volume-wise everything seems alright, I feel no interaction between vocals and instrumental.
evaluations.original: Apesar de nos volumes aparentar tudo bem, não sinto interacção entre a voz e o instrumental.

evaluations.comment: La caisse claire est plus forte que dans les autres mixs. La voix est trop chargée en médiums, ce qui masque l'accordéon. La guitare acoustique est également trop forte. L'ensemble sonne médium, il n'y a pas d'assise dans le grave.
la snare n'est pas belle du tout. La voix ne marche pas sur la partie calme, semble surmixée
The melodic instrument in the beginning is too present. Creative reverberation does not fit.
evaluations.original: O instrumento melódico inicial está demasiado presente. A reverberação criativa não encaixa.

evaluations.comment: Voix claire, mais peu de basses. Equilibre OK

Niveau de voix un peu instable, pas très agréable. Certaines éléments important semblent sous mixés lors du refrain (bass, guitare) --> manque d'appuie. Snaps un peu trop fort.
Bon équilibre lorsque les voix sont ensembles.

CC un peu trop devant, la guitare n'a pas besoin d'être à ce niveau, toujours les sifflantes de la voix
Manque de profondeur. 
Couleur générale un peu trop 500Hz
Refrain : son de la batterie peu convainquant. couleur de la 2e voix : plutôt moche, ne marche pas avec la 1ere voix.
Wide and full
Nice vocals, with an elegant reverberation. The music is very well balanced and spacialized. Now [sic], I do not apreciate the asthetics of the song. The handclaps could be prettier [sic].
evaluations.original: A voz está bonita, elegantemente reverberada. A música está muito bem equilibrada e bem espacializada. Agora, não aprecio muito a estética da música. As palmas poderiam tar mais bonitas.

evaluations.comment: Good, spacious mix.

too much bass, maybe it's the room??! interesting to hear the guitar. Rocky. Groovy. Engaging. I had to move the chair to get the image right, since it's a complex mix.  But it makes the song so alive that you want to dance.
Bottom heavy but it works. Arpeggiated guitar a bit too present. Left-heavy (guitars). Good vocals. Good driving rhythm section.
Needs more reverb on the vocal maybe.
The vocals sound too soft in relation to the other instruments.
evaluations.original: A voz parece um pouco baixa relativamente ao resto dos instrumentos.

evaluations.comment:
- Good vocals mix (compared to the rest) and good use of reverb
- Low bass presence (could have more bass)
- Good Drums mix
the voice is small and unclear.
Lots of punch on the kick, too high though. It gets in the way of the vocals.

The electric guitar on the left side is too present. The vocal, even if loud, does not stand out properly in the mix.
