The instruments were not properly cleaned during the editing stage, which contributes towards having instruments with similar spectra to be masked and undistinguished, especially in the low-mid range.
evaluations.original:
A guitarra eléctrica presente no lado esquerdo está demasiado presente. A voz apesar de estar alta nao se destaca na mistura.
O pouco trabalho de limpeza dos vários instrumentos leva a que instrumentos com zonas frequências parecidas não se distingam e fiquem escondidos, principalmente na zona media grave.

evaluations.comment: vocal can be more present. I like the kick and it really helps the groove.
Rather balanced except for the electric guitar that sounds a bit loud.
evaluations.original: bastante equilibrada excepto a guitarra eléctrica que me parece um pouco alta

evaluations.comment: 伴奏声太大
vocal could be a little closer; cymbals could be brighter and close; little less kick; nice snaps
Too much kick drum
evaluations.original: Demasiado kick.

evaluations.comment: Vocals are not present enough. Drums are well defined. The bass is not too intrusive. The kick drum is too loud.
evaluations.original: Voz pouco presente. Bateria bem definida. Baixo não é demasiado intrusivo. Bombo muito alto.

evaluations.comment: Lacks high frequencies, nice bass. The arpeggio electric is too loud
Bass guitar is very strong and pushes the mix along. Vocals still too soft like track 1.
lots of bass; punch low end;
Mix is good, sounds flat EQ whise.

Kick drum, toms and snare are too proeminent in the mix (especially for the floor tom). Excessive compression and gate use. There is too little accordeon and piano details. Vocals are too centralized and lacking in dynamics and gain automations. Bass is nicely present.
evaluations.original: Excesso de presença de kick, tons e snare na mistura (principalmente floor tom) - excesso de compressão e gate, falta acordeon e detalhes de piano, vocais demasiadamente centralizados e sem dinâmica e automações de ganhos, boa presença de baixo.

evaluations.comment: bass a bit heavy for song, kick to punchy

Very similar to version 1, it's a good EQ. But I find the guitar to be a bit loud in relationship to the rest of the instruments. The acordeon is more muffled and centered and that might also be the reason.
evaluations.original: Muito semelhante a track 1, está uma boa eq. Mas acho a guitarra um pouco alto em relação aos restantes instrumentos. O acordeão está mais abafado também e está centrado pode ser por isso.

evaluations.comment: quite simple but ok,
strong, punchy but narrow kick. Too far forward? Can hear electric well. Drums and bass much more apparent than other mixes. mixed by a drummer? hahah
bass is too big for the rest of the song. rhodes disappears
May be it is compressed all the track a bit more, it is not clear to select the vocality. But this sort of mix is gentle and comfortable.
too much base for me
bass bit high
Bass guitar too high. Accordian too low in mix
there's nothing special about it... kind of boring.
kick and bass too loud
lots of drum spots
Low end over compressed
Lack of width; good intellegibility in vox; GTR doesn't balance with rest of mix tooo loud (and why is it panned hard left??); kik sounds unnaturally hyped in subs
vocal sounds clear, low freqencies are slightly heavy. Dimension and width is good.
Bass too loud and takes up too much space in the mix. Same with kick drum.
bass pumping takes over everything(too much compression!)
Too much bass. Not clear. The distorted guitar or organ in the background has too much presence.
Too much bass. The vocal seem ok.
too much bass
5th: Low end present, but not round enough, overstating the fact that bass, toms and electric piano are rhythmically trampling each other.
Rather consistent mix, the accordeon appears too loud during some parts of the mix.
evaluations.original: mistura bastante consistente, o acordeão surge em alguns momentos um pouco alto na mistura

evaluations.comment:
- Great final mix
- Good bass mix
- Everything is well balanced, but some instruments are too centered
- Great reverb on the vocals
Balanced mix except for the accordeon. Too muffled however. It would need a better equilibrium between accordeon and the remaining instruments.
evaluations.original: Mustura equilibrada menos o acordeão. Um pouco abafado no entanto. Precisaria de um maior equilíbro entre o acordeão e o resto dos instrumentos

evaluations.comment: Excessive low-end. Vocal processing is very good, and the female choir is doing a very nice accompainement.
evaluations.original: Demasiados graves. A voz foi muito bem processada, acompanhada simpaticamente pelo coro feminino,

evaluations.comment: The accordeon is too dynamic and thus steals the spotlight from the vocals.
evaluations.original: Acordeão demasiado dinâmico rouba protagonismo à voz.

evaluations.comment: Cleaning the cymbal bleed would help improve the vocals. The vocals do not have the necessary spotlight during the verse.
evaluations.original: Uma maior limpeza do bleeding dos pratos ajudava a melhorar a voz. Voz não tem o destaque necessário durante os versos.

evaluations.comment: This seemed to be the track with the loudest vocals. But the accordeon sounded too bass-y.
evaluations.original: Pareceu me a track com a voz mais presente. Mas o acordeão parecia um pouco grave.

evaluations.comment: Too much bassline. The piano and accordeon are almost occluded in the beginning of the song and at some point there is a sudden increase in loudness that is strange. The acoustic guitars should have been positioned outside the middle of the stereo field. The main vocal is too soft on the pre-chorus. There is a mistake in the fade out and cut of the overheads during the chorus. Female vocal is too subdued.
evaluations.original: Excesso de presença nas linhas de baixo. Ocultação quase total dos pianos e acordeons no iniício da faixa e depois repentino aumento o que causa estranhamento. falta uso de pans nas guitarras acústicas. falta presença da voz principal na parte pré refrão, erro nos cortes e fade outs dos overheads no refrão, pouca presença da voz feminina durante a música.

evaluations.comment: The vocal is louder than every other instrument and all the mix is too low and mid-rangey, lacking in brightness and definition. Other than that, the stereo image wasn't thoroughly used, making the mix too monophonic.
evaluations.original: A voz está mais alta do que todos instrumentos e toda a mistura está demasiado média e grave, não tem brilho nem definição. Para além disso a imagem stereo foi pouco utilizada tornando a mistura demasiado monofónica.

evaluations.comment: Too much low end on drums and on the bass. Everything is competing on this one as well...

refrain : bonne couleur globale. Bons équilibres. Basse-Batterie : marche très bien. Plutot punchy. Vivant

Couplet : choix intéressants. Reverb sur le kick : marche très bien. Accordéon dans la reverb : bonne idée. Couplet plutot vivant (plus que les autres mixs)
- the sound engineer added effects on the voice (echos), the idea is cool an interesting but i'm not sure it perfectly works

refrain : Trop de guitare
              effets intéressants de délais mais un peu trop pour moi

couplet : équilibre bien réalisé, on entend bien tous les phrasés
              le voix mériterait peut être d'être un peu plus sortie et avec un peu plus de reverb

Contraste couplet refrain intéressant

not enough lead voice,
good balance

Effet de delay sur la voix intéressant, mais n'est pas bien réglé... il paraît incongru. 
Réverbe sur les claquements de doigts n'est pas adaptée au style (trop claire, trop longue)
Effets sur guitares et synthés très intéressant, marche bien (au début de la deuxième partie), mais trop devant dans le mix. La voix est un peu trop en retrait. 
Trop de kick. 
Equilibre spectral bien réussi.
voix un peu masquée, batterie pas trés définie, beaucoup de reverb, gonfle un peu trop, pas fan de la guit sur la droite
trop de guitare électrique. Partie calme réussie, sauf pour la voix : semble dry sous-mixée, et le delay est peu subtil... Spectralement bizarre dans le bas, semble peu contrôlé.

La guitare acoustique est trop présente et l'accordéon est trop loin. La réverbe sur la voix pourrait être mieux réglée (High cut de sortie trop haut). La batterie et les guitares sont un peu trop compressées. Le son direct de la voix mérite d'être plus fort.
Après réécoute, l'équilibre général est peut-être généreux dans les graves mais répond à un choix qui est défendable.
Mauvaise gestion du délai dans le refrain. Voix un peu écrasé.
guitares fortes, voix étouffée... Punchy mais équilibre étonnant.
Tout est un peu trop loin, la guitare électrique est celle qui émerge le plus, et ce n'est ce que l'on voudrait entendre.

Left-heavy, the left guitar is way too loud and only low-mids. The lead vocal is not cutting through enough. the up-beat is too strong compared to the down-beat. The delay is too long, it makes the bridge flabby.
Voix sous mixée, effets superficiels (ex : echo). Kick beaucoup trop fort, hors style. Fouilli dans le grave et bas medium.

The finger snaps are very in the face, they could certainly be a bit further back in the mix.  At certain times something weird happens to the vocal, seemingly a weird effect. Just when the music goes quiet a bit and the vocal starts again is when you hear this most.  Otherwise certainly a fun mix.
evaluations.original:
De vingerclicks zijn redelijk in the face, die mochten zeker wat verder in de mix.
Er gebeurt op bepaalde momenten iets raar met de stem, precies een raar effect.
Net op het moment dat de muziek wat stil valt en de vocal terug begint hoor je dit vooral.
Verder wel zeker een toffe mix.

evaluations.comment: Very open acoustic guitar,  all instruments are audible,  maybe a bit too much finger snap halfway through  and a bit too much reverb on vocals at the start.
evaluations.original: hele open akoestische gitaar, alle instrumenten zijn hoorbaar, Misschien iets te veel snap half ver Wegen. en iets te veel reverb op de zang aan het begin

evaluations.comment: A rather powerful mix in terms of balance choices,  but a bit less with regards to EQ.  The reverb on the lead vocal is a bit too much,  which makes the guitar seem quite dry.  In mono the mix nearly retains its complete atmosphere,  but it becomes obvious how loud (and dry) the finger snaps are.
evaluations.original:
Een eerder krachtige mix in zij balanskeuze, maar iets minder in de eq'ing.
De galm op de lead is iets teveel, waardoor de gitaar erg droog lijkt.
in mono behoudt de mix bijna zijn volledige sfeer, maar valt het op hoe luid (en droog) de vingerknip-elementen staan.

evaluations.comment: The finger snaps or hand claps could be more in the background in my opinion.  And a bit too much effects on the vocals.
evaluations.original: het vingergeknip of handgeklap had van mij meer op de achtergrond gemogen. en iets te veel effects op de zang

evaluations.comment: Guitar on the right too loud,  claps too loud
evaluations.original: Recgtes gitaar, te luid, claps te luid,

evaluations.comment: The guitar on the right of the mix plays a certain stroke the whole time.  He is too loud in the mix.  The claps also scared me a bit because of the level.  The voice has a nice spot in the mix though.  The drums are a bit far away for this genre of music.
evaluations.original:
De gitaar die rechts in de mix zit, speelt heel de tijd een bepaalde slag. Die zit veel te luid in de mix. Ook de claps deden me wat schrikken door het volume.
De stem heeft wel een mooie plek in de mix. De drums zijn een beetje ver weg voor dit genre muziek.

evaluations.comment: Hey in tihs one you can actually hear the instruments as they should be
muffled kick drum, vocal is too soft

- Good final mix
- Vocals too high (but good use of reverb)
- Drums could be higher
- Great mix of the bass
All tracks seem clear on this mix although acoustic guitar could do with a slight boost. Can hear panning.
The beginning mix of the instruments are fantastic.
good balance between instruments
Starts off very strong. Keyboard level nice and gets through. Drums well mixed and balanced. Vocals strong. In second half need some mastering techniques to keep the energy up.
The eq is not quite right, maybe lots of mids. There are dynamic jumps too. Not too bad in the end. Some instruments sound 'muddy'
The electric piano is too proeminent. The acoustic guitar on the left side unbalances the mix.
evaluations.original: Piano electrico muito presente, e guitarra acustica do lado esquerdo desequilibra a mistura.

evaluations.comment: not bad, correct
dont like accordian in middle, voc too dark
Drums a bit low
The vocals are a little bit loud, as is the acoustic guitar. The drums are not present and defined as they should. In general the mix is muddy and to low-mid-rangey.
evaluations.original:
A voz está ligeiramente alta assim como a guitarra acustica.
A bateria está pouco presente e recortada.
No geral a mistura está muito embrulhada e com desmaiado médio grave. 
Com uma melhor utilização da imagem stereo a definição e clareza de cada ia instrumento poderia melhorar.

evaluations.comment: somewhat bland, but not bad; I like the organ!
The vocals could be slightly louder. Nice balance between instruments that allows for a clear perception of each one. The reverb in the finger snap is too obvious and easy to hear in excess.
evaluations.original: voz poderia estar ligeiramente mais alta. Bom equilibrio entre instrumentos que permite a percepção clara de cada um. Ouve-se em demasia o reverb do estalar de dedos.

evaluations.comment: Drums too comressed for my personal taste, especially the snare. You can really hear it on the pop. Good balacing
Lacking some punch
vocal could be closer/ brighter; nice organ; cymbals could be closer
The electric guitar looses some brightness. The vocals are also out of the spotlight and aren't bright enough.
evaluations.original: Guitarra eléctrica perde um pouco de brilho. Voz também tem pouco destaque e brilho

evaluations.comment: Too much comp. on bass. The mix is pumping

Drums too distant and therefore lack punch and drive. Reverb and/or compression on drums make it sound synthetic/80ies, although professional and finished. Overpowering acoustic guitar, which makes mix left-heavy.
some instruments too loud than others
punchy kick. Dark. lots of space. muddy.
Vocals a bit too quiet
Kick feels over-compressed and too small. Mix needs more room to breath. Not a fan of vocal verb.

The snare is too reverberated and there is an excess of compression and low-end in the kick drum. The accordeon lacks in reverb and the pianos and overdrive guitar are excessivelly proeminent. One would need automation on the vocals, especcialy on the chorus. There is not enough expansion on the reverb applied to the vocals and background vocals.
evaluations.original: Excesso de reverb na tarola e excesso de compressão e graves no kick. Falta reverb no acordeon e excesso de presença de pianos e de guitarra com "drive". falta automação para acréscimo de gain no vocal principal do refrão. falta reverb mais expandido nos vocais e backing vocals.

evaluations.comment: The snare is too loud and mid-rangey. Toms too loud. Very unbalanced pan-wise.
evaluations.original:
tarola alta e com muitos médios, toms altos
pouco equilibrada relativamente aos pan

evaluations.comment: Mix is a little busy, lacks space.
feels super flat. Low end is nice.
Vocal could be louder. doesn't jell as well.
Very muffled, low-end too present.
evaluations.original: Muito abafado, gama de graves muito presentes.

evaluations.comment: bass sound too loud
bit muffled

The vocal reverberation sounds bizarre at first, even if one gets used to it later on. The female choir accompains the lead singer very well. The big problem is the first part, with an excessively present instrumental part.
evaluations.original: A reverberação da voz inicialmente soa bizarra, se bem que depois entranha. O coro feminino acompanhou muito bem o solista. O grande problema é o inicio com o instrumental demasiado presente.

evaluations.comment: kick sounds boxy, no impact with snare. inconsistent bass
too quiet snare, loud kick
Spectral balance is bad to extreme. EQ is flat
lows really muddy, bass not audible
instruments too loud
Too boxy. The vocal seems a bit thin. Everything else is competing for space.
waaaaaay too dark; no definition in drums - just nondescript thumps; everything is washed out; GTR panned hard left is distracting
the voice is less prominent and lacks sense of space.
drums washed out & out of perspective with vocal and guits; too much a guit; bg vocal too loud; clicks way too low

6th: confusing, stuff is piling up all over the place and instruments trample each other. The electric piano is too loud for the dulness of the sound. The second half is pretty. After the example A it sounds dull, but everything would. Too much compression on the drums, and everything pumps. I understand panning was done for clarity, but I object to the perspective that was created, it does not flatter the syncopation between guitars and keys.
Saknar reverb på sången, annars ganska behagligt EQ:at
bra mix men saknar lite mid
Ganska ren och städad mix överlag. Krispigt men på ett behagligt sätt. Det enda som jag reagerar på är att gitarrerna är för starka
Bra mix som sakbnar en del botten.
Väldigt ustrålande gitarrspår, lite för mycket för min smak den balanserar inte med alla andra spår
Bra närvaro i mixen. Bra balanserat dock något starka gitarrer.
Bra EQ och ljud lite sämre ballans mellan instrumenten
Har lite för mycket mid, men är annars bra i frekvensspektret, bra dynamik och balans.

Bra groove. Intressant stereomix, hur de olika instrumenten ligger i de båda högtalarna. 
Kan tycka att sången ligger lite för mycket i framkant jämfört med de andra instrumenten (förutom Dragspelet) Dragspelet borde ner i nivå en aning. Samt behöver mjuka upp gitarrerna.
Bra balans och bra plats åt alla instrument öppen och klar, men lite "hård" diskant
Tydliga instrument och sång. Lite klent med bas dock och lite mycket highs. Sången är lite torr.
Låter helt okej.
För mycket diskant. saknar botten.
Lite för nasal sång och påträngande stabgitarr.
För lite efterklang på sången. Bra stereobild.
Burkig mix och sången får inte den plats den behöver.
Generellt ganska bra mix, dock väldigt torr. Lite starkt mixat dragspel och gitarr. Diskantig och torr sång.
Mixen är lite "in your face"
Bra stereobild. Sången och gitarrerna låter väldigt torra och gitarrerna tar över ibland.
Bra men trummorna hade behövt lite mer effekter. Gitarr lite för stark.
Sjukt torr mix, skulle behöva lite efterklang. Lite jobbig panorering enligt mig.
Lite obalans i mixen. Känns rörigt.
Dålig frekvensbalans. För mycket mid. För lite bas och diskant.
Bra stereobild, fast gitarrer lite för hårt pannade. Saknad av lägre frekvenser. Lite för vass i de högre frekvenserna, med tanke på saknaden av bas.
Gitarren alldeles för högt i mixen. För lite bas, mixen förblir väldigt middig på ett dåligt sätt. Om mer reverb och svagare volym på gitarren så skulle mixen vara helt ok.
Hård mix. För starka elgitarrer.
Jämn frekvensgång, kanske viss avssaknad av bas, lite väl torrt sound för min smak. Allting är lite för mycket "in your face" d.v.s. mixen saknar djup.

Gitarren är alldeles för stark. tar all plats och låter nästan som om när du är hemma hos den där kompisen som tror han är världens bästa gitarrist och ska spela med i låten, men som inte riktigt behärskat det här med dynamik än. Vad jag menar är att gitarren låter som om det inte är en del av mixen.
Ljudnivåerna är obalanserade, mixen är en aning torr och för mycket distorsion i gitarrerna.
Lite för hård mix, särskilt elgitarren (?) som ligger och "slår".
för doft och mulligt.
Elgitarren är alldeles för stark, liksom elpianot. Sången verkar inte ha någon efterklang.
Dov, saknar sub, värmer. Rörig.
Nasal, för mycket i mittfrekvenserna. Behöver mer bas och diskant. Lite för vass.
Saknar botten samt lite jobbig i frekvens mellan 2,5 - 4kHz. Dock ligger alla instrument relativt bra i mixen.
En aning torr mix. Nivåbalasen är inte jättebra då t.ex elgitarren tar över väldigt mycket. Inte så dynamisk.
låter skitdåligt på gitarren som tar över allt men bra dragspel och röst
Sången lite väl torr. Inte behaglig balans mellan instrumenten. Gitarren kommer fram och stör. Jobbigt trumljud även. Frekvenser som spretar och stör.
Kicken är klen, rösten är tunn och för svagt mixad - alternativt resten för starkt.

Un peu trop de caisse claire. J'aime bien le lien kick/bass. Effet sur le chant (chorus ?) qui brouille un peu les paroles. 
Effet téléphone super cool sur le refrain + snaps en stéréo rend très bien.

Trop d'aigus dans la voix lead, difficilement localisable. Le background est bien compacte et sonne bien, forme un seul instrument. Dans le pont, elle est trop en arrière, on pourrait aller plus loin dans l'effet en ajoutant plus de reverb.

Couleur générale très agréable : batterie très punchy. couleur des voix spéciale : beaucoup d'effet, mais ça marche plutot bien !
très bons équilibres

couplet
Couplet : couleur très spéciale. Ici, ça ne marche pas très bien à mon gout. trop d'accordéon, pas assez du reste
pas fan de la voix, original le filtre pendant le moment doux, marche bien!
Voix sous mixée et effet mal géré dans le break (voix téléphone). Belle couleur de la voix dans le refrain. Manque de punch. Trop d'éléments au centre de la stéréo (accordéon, clavier...)

SD trop forte par moments
un peu trop de sifflantes voix, sinon son niveau est bien contrôlé
effet intéressant dans le refrain mais aurait plus être mêlé de reverb ou être uniquement dans de la reverb. Impression effet non totalement assumé ou d'essai
Impression de retour de release de la compression des OH que je n'aime pas trop personnellement
Claps doublé bien
un peu fouilli dans bas du spectre vers 250Hz quand phrasé de GT Elec 2
voice too much processed

je pense que c'est mon mix. Batterie peut-être trop produite... Le mix reste agressif et l'énergie ne correspond pas forcément. J'apprécie tout de même vraiment la partie calme et notamment le retour de la voix pleine bande.
Spectraclement moche mais équilibre intéressant;

- problem with the snare (medium frequencies)

evaluations.comment: The drums reverberate in a way that is not natural for my ears as a starting point. Afterwards, the mix is globally nice. The handclaps are well placed.

evaluations.comment: Main vocals too dry and proeminent, one would need to have them processed (gain automation, and the application of room/reverb and delay). The mix has excessive mid-range and low-end, which makes the song dull. Background vocals are not proeminent enough. Pianos are almost totally occluded.
evaluations.original: Vocais principais demasiadamente secos e presentes, falta trato nas vozes (automação de ganhos e aplicação de room/reverb e delay). Mistura  com excesso de médios e graves o que torna a música sem brilho. Falta presença de backing vocals. Ocultação quase total dos pianos.

evaluations.comment: In this mix there is a very salient mid-high frequency zone. When adding an exagerarted mid-range, the mix is muddy and without clarity.
evaluations.original: Nesta mistura é preponderante uma zona média aguda estrita que se encontra ligeiramente alta. Juntando a isso um médio exagerado a mistura torna-se embrulhada e sem qualquer recorte.

evaluations.comment: The toms and kick are too bassy. Acoustic guitar seems ok, but is in the way of the main vocal. The main vocal should have a bit of reverb and should be louder.

evaluations.original: A guitarra acústica mais presente ajudava a dar brilho à mistura.

evaluations.comment: Overheads too loud. The vocal has excessive reverb. Backing vocals could have been more separated from the main vocals.
evaluations.original: OH um pouco altos; voz com excesso de reverb. Backing vocals poderiam estar mais afastados da voz principal

evaluations.comment: The relationship between bass and drums is good, however I feel that they end up making the vocals out of context with the rest of the instruments.
evaluations.original: Por exemplo a relação entre o baixo e a bateria está boa, no entanto acho que acabam por fazer com que a voz pareça desenquadrada do restante contexto instrumental.

evaluations.comment: Vocals have too much reverb, especially the backing vocal. The acoustic guitar could be more present. One hears the cymbals coming in and going out in the second part of the song. Some of the bass frequencies are too proeminent.
evaluations.original: Vozes com demasiado reverb, principalmente a secundária. Guitarra acústica poderia estar mais presente. Ouvem-se as entradas e saídas dos pratos na faixa da voz na segunda parte da música. Algumas frequências do baixo tornam-se demasiado presentes.

evaluations.comment: I like the treatment in the vocal, alongside the backing voclas. The drums are a bit muffled. It might needed additional body.
evaluations.original: Gosto do tratamento da voz, juntamente com os backvocals. Bateria está um pouco abafada. seria necessário um pouco mais de corpo se calhar

evaluations.comment: Too much reverb on vocals. Back vocals are not well placed. the drums should be a bit brighter. The bass is to high in the mix. Lack of definition all round.
The snare drum is slightly louder in comparison to all other instruments.
evaluations.original:
A tarola está ligeiramente alta em relação aos outros instrumentos. 
Timbricamente toda a musica tem um caracter médio muito presente principalmente na voz.
A utilização de rverbs e delay apesar de abrir a imagem stereo acrescenta um timbre medio que suja e embrulha mistura.

evaluations.comment: The mix is very unorthodox: I do not understand the cymbals (distorted?). The beginning sounds terrible!!! Even if the lead and backing vocals are elegant (but not well balanced with each other)
evaluations.original: A mistura está bem pouco ortodoxa: não entendo os pratos (distorcidos?) da bateria. O inicio soa terrível! Se bem que a voz do solista e do coro estão elegantes(mas não bem equilibrados entre eles).

evaluations.comment: Excess in the vocal and bass lines. Not enough gain in the rythm guitar lines, and excessive toms, kick and snare. There is a mistake in the cymbals coming from the overheads, which creates a sense of reverb and "dry cut", and a mix error, especially in the percussion-less parts. Poor mix.
evaluations.original: Excesso nas linhas de baixo e vocais, falta de ganho nas linhas ritmicas de guitarra e excesso de tons, kick e snare. Falha nas linhas de pratos que provém dos overheads criando efeito de reverse e demasiada sensação de "corte seco" e erro de mistura principalmente nas partes sem percussão. Mistura Pobre.

evaluations.comment: SOUNDS A BIT DULL, LEAD VOCAL SLIGHTLY TOO WET
Dull vocals, Inventive organ placement. Drums are boxy and cramped.
Weird to have a vocal harmony on the first half of phrases. Sibilance very noticeable. Good male vocal in terms of reverb.
NOT PARTICULARLY EXCITING, SOME WEIRD OVERALL EQ HAPPENING THAT I'M NOT INTO
Vocals feel very too the left. Don't like how the harmonica continuously changes sides that is being panned on....
Good spacial effects. Some instruments poke out too much.
- Vocals sink into the background while the drum and guitar take turns in the front of the mix

oddly placed in the stereo sound
vocals a bit rough and higher harmony very raw - nice touch to ping pong delay the sound for variance however is sometimes hard to follow.
consistency would have been better

panning of a little hard for my liking
not a fan of the panning from side to side
ride could come up but crashes down, and the snap could come down
VOX SOUND TOO NARROW.
can't hear any of the high mids in the vocal.  strange EQ choice on various elements like guitar and vocal
muddy, messy mix

Pan on the synth is real cool
Missing tops
LACKS HIGH END CLARITY. FEELS HOLLOW IN THE MID RANGE FREQUENCIES. VOCALS SLIGHTLY TO LOW.

Horrible everything. Drums are very disjointed Synth thing is being panned left to right during bridge type section? The vocals effect does not work for the male vocal I feel, but to add to another mix perhaps the harmony could have utilised this too a lessor degree. Also the harmonica sound is too loud.
VOCALS TOO LOUD. HIGH MID MAKES IT ANNOYING TO LISTEN TO. SOUNDS LIKE THE MIX WAS LO PASSED AND THEN THE HIGH MIDS WERE BOOSTED.

Everything sounds quite dry and a bit pushed together, there is little space in the mix, it could be opened up a bit more.  Especially where the music goes quiet the voice stays 'weirdly' dry.  Fun balance-wise  but maybe just a tad too nasal sound-wise.
evaluations.original:
Alles klinkt vrij droog en nogal opeen geduwd, er zit weinig ruimte in de mix, het mocht wat meer opengetrokken
worden. Zeker op het stuk waar de muziek even in een valt blijft de stem wat 'raar' droog.
Balansgewijs wel tof maar net iets te nasaal van klank misschien.

evaluations.comment: All instruments can be heard well.  Maybe a bit too much vocals.  Too bad there's no reverb on the vocals.
evaluations.original: alle instrumenten zijn goed te horen. misschien iets te veel vocalen. Ja,,er dat er geen reverb over de vocalen zit.

evaluations.comment: Too dry,  acoustic guitar is too loud.
evaluations.original: te droog, akoestische gitaar staat te hard,

evaluations.comment: Sounds quite mono.  The vocal too dry in my opinion.
evaluations.original: klinkt vrij mono. de zang te droog naar mijn menging

evaluations.comment: This mix sounds a bit mono,  but is not balanced because the voice is so loud and naked.  On top of that the backing vocal is regularly uncontrolled loud which compromises the atmosphere completely.  No clear choices are made and everything is rather cautious.
evaluations.original:
Deze mix klinkt nogal mono, maar staat niet in balans omdat de stem zo luid en naakt wordt geplaatst.
Bovendien is de backing vocal regelmatig ongecontroleerd luid wat de sfeer volledig compromitteert.
Er worden geen duidelijke keuzes gemaakt en alles is nogal voorzichtig. 
De galm op de vingerknips werkt wel erg goed.
Hierdoor in mono verliest de mix bijna zijn volledige kracht.

evaluations.comment: The guitars are to the front quite a bit while they don't play an important role and they take up a lot of the mix because of this.  The voice sounds a bit too dry in my opinion,  the backing vocal is a bit too loud. She is singing certain parts of the sentence, on this level you just hear her disappear
evaluations.original:
De gitaren komen redelijk veel naar voor terwijl ze niet echt een belangrijke partij spelen en nemen hierdoor veel van
de mix in. De stem klinkt iets te droog naar mijn mening, de backing die erbij komt iets te luid over.
Ze zingt bepaalde stukken van een zin mee, op dit volume voel je haar gewoon wegvallen.

evaluations.comment: väldigt stor och bred. bra ljudbild.
Ganska bright mix. Lite väl blöt sång.
Hade kunnat vara lite mindre reverb på rösten men annars bra mix.
För mycket bas men bra sång och dragspel bra reverb
Ett klassiskt exempel på vad som händer när man plockar bort för mycket kring 1 kHz. Det låter även lite distat. Annars gillar jag den våta ljudbilden, och mixen är behaglig för öronen.
Badrumsmix. Som skulle behöva ett bredare frekbvenspektra. Och inte lika mycket efterklang.

Fet med kanske lite mycket bas dock, Känns som att masterkompressorn pumpar lite dock. Någonting pumpar iallafall. Lite off Delay som också är lite starkt. Obalans i volymbalansen med sången stundtals. Snygga effekter på dragspelet.
Varm mix. Dock lite för mycket sub för min smak. Lite "s"-ig och vass diskant, men även basinnehållet tar för mycket uppmärksamhet. Under det lugnare partiet föll allting på plats, tycker jag dock.

Vädigt cool mix, och "tanken var god" känsla kommer fram. Den hade verkligen kunnat funka om man fixade till vissa saker. Coola effekter. 
Det är något konstigt med basen (får lock för öronen). Det låter inte jätte behagligt hur vissa instrument är komprimerade. även sången är något "ssss--ig" (Ökning vid 5-8kHz.
Skulle behöva lite mer botten. För vass i diskanten. Lite för hårt reverb.
De lägre frekvenserna tar över alldeles för mycket och den låter väldigt komprimerad. Sången t.ex. rampar i volym ibland.
För blöt, för mycket efterklang. För hårt ställd kompression, side-chain? Borde skurit lite mer bas.
För mycket komprimering och effekter men bra frekvensspektrum.
Alldeles för basig.
För mycket  mid och diskant som skär, s ord i sång

Sången har för mycket efterklang. Det ligger någonting och komprimerar mixen vilket gör att den pumpar väldigt mycket. Dragspelet har extremt mycket efterklang vilket gör att den inte riktigt passar in i mixen.
Lite diskant. För grötigt med för mycket efterklang. Låter som att hela mixen har skickats genom ett reverb. Dålig ljudkvalité.
Väldigt "baktung", dov.
Alldeles, alldeles, alldeles för mycket reverb, kommer inte förbi det i  lyssningen. Allt blir som en dov gryta av reverb.
För mycket bas. För lite mellanfrekvenser - all "punch" försvinner. Vissa instrument hör inte alls. Sången ligger för långt bak i mixen. För mycket av ett reverb som inte passar.
för mycket reverb känns långe borta lite badhus
Väldigt hård compressor och limiter. Blir ett otight gung genom låten. Känns lite grötigt och inte så dynamiskt.
Väldigt basig, vilket blir lite grumligt.
För mycket low, ljudnivån är obalanserade många instrument försvinner. Skulle behövt en De-esser på leadsången då den skär.
För hårdkomprimerade trummor. låter som man står väldigt långt bort.
för mycket lågbas, saknar diskant
För mycket kompression. Bra sound på sång, men för tunn. Bra nivåer.
Lite väl mycket bas i mixen som tar fokus och plats från övriga komponenter i mixen.
Alldeles för hårt komprimerad, Man hör hur kompressorn andas och jobbar, störande på denna låt. Hård diskant men bra instrumentbalans i övrigt.
jättemycket bas som äter upp alla spår och gör dem grötiga
För mycket bas. Lite dov mix, saknar diskat. Känns som den "pumpar".
Känns som att det är för komprimerat överlag (mix bus kompressor?) vilket inte riktigt faller mig i smaken. Dynamiken får tyvärr lida, vilket inte passar musikstilen.
Alldeles för mycket masterkompression då det gungar fram och tillbaka.
Extremt basig och lågfrekvent. Väldigt komprimerad.
Hela mixen känns väldigt "muddig". Saknas höga frekvenser. Sedan känns den väldigt komprimerar och liksom "pulserar".
Bra nivåer. Lite väl mycket reverb. Låter instängt.
För mycket bas och alldeles för mycket reverb på allt.
För hårt masterkomprimerat. Mixen duckar, låter påfrestat. Dovt.
Hårt komprimerad sång samt låter sången och mixen över lag dov. Finner dock en relativt bra pannorering för instrumenten i mixen. Okontrollerad botten.
Nice balance,  nice atmosphere created through the effects
evaluations.original: mooie balans, mooie sfeer gemaakt met de effects

evaluations.comment: The mix is fine,  balance too.  Maybe the backing vocal could be a bit softer compared to the lead.  Fun delays but perhaps use a bit more subtly and not on the 6 times "I'm waiting" is being said.  Otherwise I quite liked the mix.
evaluations.original:
De mix zit goed, balans ook. Misschien dat de backing iets zachter mocht tov de lead. Leuke delays maar misschien iets subtieler gebruiken en niet op de 6x dat er "I'm waiting" wordt gezegd.
Ik kon me wel vinden in de mix verder.

evaluations.comment: Delays are certainly fun here,  they aren't always completely there yet though.  Generally the mix sounds a bit woolly,  here they chose to put the accordion more on the foreground, that's a musical choice, maybe it's just a bit too much sometimes.
evaluations.original:
De delays zijn zeker tof hier, ze zitten er wel niet altijd volledig op.
In het algemeen klinkt de mix wat wollig, hier is gekozen om de accordeon mee op de voorgrond te plaatsen, dat is een muzikale keuze, het is misschien soms net iets té.

evaluations.comment: Too bad about the delay again.  A good mix otherwise.  Retained.
evaluations.original: Weer jammer van de delay. voor de rest een goede mix. gedetineerd.

evaluations.comment: A dynamic mix  with tasteful delays  which should be controlled a bit more so that the mix remains contoured a bit more. The bass is on the quiet side but the groove stays intact because of the use of Rhodes and guitars. Very good presence on the vocals. In mono the mix almost retains its complete atmosphere,  but it's obvious how the accordion[ seems to fill everything up]
evaluations.original:
Een dynamische mix met smaakvolle delay's die soms wat meer onder controle moeten worden gehouden zodat de mix overall beter omlijnd blijft.
De bas is eerder aan de stille kant, maar de groove blijft intact door het gebruik van de Rhodes en de gitaren
Erg goede presentie op de stemmen.
in mono behoudt de mix bijna zijn volledige sfeer maar valt het wel hoe de accordeon alles dreigt toe te smeren.

evaluations.comment: vocals were nice and punchy

I like the presence on the lead vocals, there are interesting aesthetic choice, for instance the blend between the vocal and the accordion, but the mixer did too much and everything sounds quite chemical. There are phasing issues and the balance lacks control. Nice reverb and delay settings on the vocals though.

nice amount of verb on vox and good use of delay
guitars a little high in the mix
narrow mix
Very narrow, the accordion is too loud. Guitars sound dull.
Slapback delay is often annoying at the wrong times, especially in the quiet bit at the end.  Drums don't cut through enough.
evaluations.original:
Slabback delay vaak storend op de verkeerde momenten vooral in het rustigere stuk op het einde,
Drum komt niet voldoende door.

evaluations.comment:
On entend trop les doigts de l'accordéon, il est trop fort, devant la voix et au centre alors que ce n'est pas l'élément principal. 
Il gâche un peu le tout notamment à cause des effets. 
Les autres idées sur le refrain (délais) sont intéressants, dommage.
Rythmique mal géré.
EQ IS A BIT DULL
- TOO MUCH delay which really ruins the atmosphere and creates too many crazy repeats in the percussion and vocals
Too much delay on Vocals, doesn't sound right. Emphasises several vocal imperfections, particularly the sibilance. Piano is a tad loud. Guitar sounds a bit boxy, I think is the word.

Problème de sifflantes sur la voix
Guitare trop forte sur couplets
Quasi mono ! Gênant
idées de délais vraiment intéressantes, peut être un peu trop de feedback
BASS FREQUENCIES HARD TO HEAR.

NOT ENOUGH LOW END. ACCORDIAN SOUNDS TOO DISTRACTING, TRY TO USE IT MORE AS A TEXTURAL ENHANCING TL.L. VOCALS SOUND TOO BOXY, DELAY IS TOO LOUD AND IS VERY DISTRACTING. VOCALS ALSO NEED DE ESSING. SNARE SOUNDS TOO POKEY AND DISTRACTING
Delay on vocal seems out of place for acoustic style. Accordion too prominent.
Too much Delay on the vocals. Feels very out of balance. All the instruments feel lost and overpowered by the harmonica....
NO LOW END, DON'T LIKE THE VOCAL DELAY, ALSO VOCALS TOO COMPRESSED. NEEDS DE-ESSER
La batterie fait ploc ploc. Ça manque de largeur.
pas du tout du tout de grave, voix trop devant,  trés filtré, presque désagréable.
Mix assez mono, et étroit dans la bande passante. Bosse autour de 700 Hz qui concerne tout le master et qui n'est  pas très agréable à l'écoute. L'effet vintage n'est pas réussi.

Mono...Guitare rythmique trop devant, ça ne groove pas. Voix avec sifflantes encore, manque de chaleur (la prise doit y etre pour quelque chose)
Delay sur la voix de très mauvais gout. Instrument devant on ne sait pas pourquoi à moins de vouloir faire le plus mauvais mix possible.
BASS LACKS PRESENCE. VOCAL DELAY FAR TOO INTENSE.

snare is a little boxy
sounds like phase issues? thin
Hors phase... Pas de basse.

no choices of panning, everything centered
no bass guitar

- the mix has a predominance of medium frequencies content
- then the mix becomes unclear, some instruments are "masqué" (in french)
Narrow mix, everything is cramped and boxy.

La voix est trop chargée en médiums, mériterait d'être dé-essée et le delay qui est dessus est beaucoup trop fort. La guitare acoustique n'est presque pas assez fort. L'image stéréo pourrait être plus sollicitée. Pas assez de grave sur l'ensemble du mix.
Sounds somewhat muffled

Beaucoup trop de sifflantes.
L'effet de delay sur la voix n'est pas bien réglé, il alourdit plus qu'il ne sert le mix. 
Le spectre général est complètement déséquilibré : manque de basse (quasi inexistante), trop de haut médium,  et les sifflantes sont agressives.
Mono, aucun grave, trop medium, effets superficiels et hors style

Refrain : équilibres très mauvais, couleur générale peu agréable. Très peu large ( presque mono !). beaucoup trop d'accordéon, manque de rythmique (notamment batterie). Delay sur la voix ne marchent pas du tout.
horrible levels, strange EQ choice on the guitars and vocals, not very bright

Somewhat muffled
Cool verb in Pre-Chorus
Harmony vocal is too low in the mix. The change to a spacey vocal sounds alright, it's a nice change but the abrupt stop ruins this effect.

Vocals are way too muddy. They need work. The drums are also very muddy. Lovely difference with the reverb-y section. Clicks could have been louder here and less dry. Reverb section ended suddenly and felt out of place.
- WAY too much reverb and delay making the vocals and backing vocals bounce into the back of your head and making the rest of the mix sound damp
ACOUSTIC GUITAR IS TOO PRESENT, VOCALS LOST, DULL EQ OVERALL
Guitar and bass are anaemic. Voice is dull. Too much sub in the kick. Panning is off.
hollow mids. messy in the wider/denser sections.
Cool middle section with a great reverb. The rest is too dull. The elements are too separated. The electric guitar is too dull. Vocals sound good but the band lets it down.
SOUNDS TOO WET AND DARK.
VOCAL REVERB DECAYS FOR TOO LONG AND IS SLIGHTLY TOO WET, LOSES INTIMACY. DRUM KIT HAS NO PUNCH, AND FEELS WEAK.

low end is muddy and overpowering 
panning a bit strange for me when instruments drop out
a few editing issues

missing mids
very numbing to listen to
narrow mix - nothing too spread out
nice delay in background
weird cut out after the chorus - could be more automated
MISSING A LOT OF HIGH FREQUENCIES AND SOUNDS DULL. VOCAL REVERB IS TOO LOUD
BAD BALANCE, ACOUSTIC TOO LOUD, DRUMS SOFT AND MUDDY. WAY TOO MUCH DELAY ON LEAD VOCAL

This mix has far too much reverb and delay in the bridge section, it's not subtle at all and is cut too quickly. The guitar sound has a tinny sound from the strumming attack, this should have been Eq'd out. The drums are very muffled.
can hear the drums but they are really muddy and overbearing
Less natural than track 2. Good beginning, however, the last part should reinforced by turn up the volume of the ultimate instrument.
vocal stands out in the mix and instruments are far behind the vocal in the mix
I really like the acoustical space they are prestened in. Vocal and the instrument quality seems to be lot better in this mix.
Needs more body. Vocal is too loud, processing [sic]
evaluations.original: precisa de mais corpo. Voz demasiado elevada, processamento

evaluations.comment: Vocals is too distanced from the mix. The drums lack defenition.
evaluations.original: Voz muito distanciada da mistura. Bateria sem definição.

evaluations.comment: Most reverb on the vocals thus far, but I like it. Drums too roomy though, and buried. Can't hear the keys at all.
A bit sparse
less snaps and accordion
the voice is good, but the sound of bass is unclear.

- Vocals too high
- Drums too low
- Bass too low
- Good Guitars mix
- Strings are too high and on the right

The melodic instrument in the beginning is too present. The vocal is too strong, however it is well balanced in its relationship to the choir. The reverberation in the handclaps is on the right track: it does however still allow for too much attack.
evaluations.original: O instrumento melódico inicial está demasiado presente. A voz está demasiado forte, no entanto relativamente bem equilibrada em relação ao coro. A reverberação nas palmas está no caminho certo: apenas demasiado ataque.

evaluations.comment: vocal is double? phasing issues; Vocals too loud
lots of verb; poppy mix
Drums way too set back. weird reverb. Vocals / snaps way too forward comparatively. NO KICK DRUM?
The vocal is louder than every other instrument and the low-mid-range is too soft. Besides, the reverb that was used imposes a false space to the mix.
evaluations.original: A voz encontra-se muito mais alta do que todos instrumentos e a zona média grave e grave está muito baixa. Para além disso o reverb utilizado transmite uma sensação exagerada de um espaço falso.

evaluations.comment: Finger snap too reverby. The lack of bass makes the song sound too light. The gurar is too reverby.
evaluations.original: Estalar de dedos demasiado reverberado. A ausência do baixo torna a música demasiado leve. Guitarra muito reverberada.

evaluations.comment: too much compression
bass too low (non existent!)
Instruments not present enough
lyrics lack depth
Vocal has no processing, other than some reverb. It does not seem to have any EQ.
evaluations.original: Voz sem processamento audio nenhum, apenas com algum Reverb. Nao aparenta EQ nenhuma.

evaluations.comment: Too much finger snaps. The automation seems really wrong on the vocals. The drums are thin and not present. too much reverb on vocals. Back vocals are too present. Lack of good balance between instruments.
A poor mix. There is not enough overheads in the drum mix, the vocals stand out too much at some parts (no volume automation). Rythm guitar lacks punch.
evaluations.original: Mistura Pobre, Pouca presença de overheads na mistura da bateria, voz em primeiro plano um pouco exagerada em algumas partes (falta automação de volumes), pouco " punch" na guitarra riitmica.

evaluations.comment: much of the spectrum missing
"metallic", second voice too loud
nicee loud vocal, but everything sounds crunchy
no bass or kick. not sure about the reverb on the accordeon.
Too much reverb: distracting; Good level and placement on vocal, though too harsh; Lack of stereo width; ensemble (minus vocal) competes for same space; phasey and swimmy; no low end
vocals are way to loud and out of balance with the song/ EQ feels really wrong. balance between back and front items isn't working. No dynamic in song.
Weird EQ on the vocals maybe. Guitar doesn't really shine through.
Lively, but poor balance, room-y sound, partly through poor reverb setting. Finger snaps could be lower. Sounds unfinished.
too much reverb on everythin, thin vocals, everything thin
Vocal overload. Instruments just lost into this reverb soup! Vocals are not too bad and the second half is nice but unconstructed without some tracks.
No bass. Vocals excessively mid-rangey.
evaluations.original: sem baixo; vozes com excesso de médios;

evaluations.comment: Maybe a bit too much top end EQ on the mix. Reverb very apparent, especially on the finger snaps.
are you fucking kidding me?  weird balances; bad rev
Very thin, vocals too prominent

Reverb on the vocals is distracting. Takes away from the vocal sound. Vocals have a high-mid peak that is unpleasant to listen to. Needs a much fuller bass - can carely hear the bass. Also a lot too much reverb on intruments. Need a lot more of the direct sound from the band. Feels like they are at the back of a big hall.
To sharp and centered, it is harsh in general. Some instruments cannot be heard. A lot of high/mids content.
vocal‘s sound too loud
unbalanced
pretty bad mix... vocals too loud, drums too far.
Mix sounds cold and messy.

What happened?
Clear artefacts from compression, vocals and finger clicks way too loud and in the face, music is not existing and also it lacks the bottom end.

9th: The overall timbre is too nasal. Vocal a too loud for me (overbearing really), though it is well presented. There is little contrast between first and second part, second part is overall too loud. The reverb is overbearing. Some cool stuff with the dynamics but it doesn't save the overall feeling
Hård diskant, men bra reverb och instrumentbalans.
För mycket diskant. Saknar bas och mid frekvenser. Sång låter trattig.
För mycket diskant, men annars bra balans mellan instrumenten.
Bra nivå och klarhet lite väl diskant i rösten med ess ljuden lite dålig eq på sina ställen. lite torr
för mycket diskant, saknar bas
För mycket diskant som tar bort all botten.
Vet inte alls vad som är gjort med EQ;n på denna. Är som att det är satt en master EQ med en väldigt hög peak på någon frekvens i mellanregistret.
Saknar de låga frekvenserna helt. Väldigt mycket mid-frekvenser. Låter "liten radio".
Top-ig mix.
Bra men lite för avskalad.
Basfattig mix. För starkt mixad i diskantregistret. Skarpa s-ljud i sången.
Alldeles för essig! Väsig.
Lite för vass, stort inne håll i det övre frekvensregistret.
väldigt obehaglig att lyssna på, skär väldigt mycket i öronen, alldeles för mycket diskant
Saknar bas, väldigt skarpa s-ljud på sången.
Väldigt torr och för skarpa frekvenser. eller saknaden av bas frekvenser.
Väldigt lite bas och stark i high mid. ganska torr på sina ställen
Mixen är för skarp, saknar botten.
Alldeles för skarpa s-ljud. För diskantrik.
Alldeles för lite bas. Förstör hela mixen som annars sku kunna vara helt ok. Hårt sound på sången.
Väldigt, Väldigt vass! jobbigt att lyssna på tyvärr.
Väldigt nasal. Känns smal.
Extremt vass mix. Sången gör nästan ont i öronen, virveln likaså. Overheaden låter starkt.
För vass, "essigt". Mindre bra nivåer. Torrt, behöver mer effekter!
VASSSSSSS
Sången är för nasal, "smal" så att säga. Hygglig balans mellan instrument annars, för "vass" i de höga frekvenserna.
Fattas mycket bas i i princip allt. Inte jättebra balanser.
Alldeles för vass och för mycket diskand.
För tunn. Saknar bas och lägre mellan register helt och hållet känns det som. En gitarr som knappast hörs. För vass i toppen.
Väldigt S-ig och väldigt mycket mid. Låter lite som ett bandpassfilter lagts på. Samt att stereobilden inte är så tydlig, låter väldigt mono.
Väldigt vass. Jag skulle inte vilja lyssna på detta på ett större PA. Tunn. Sången hade mått bra av en de-esser.
Basfattig, alldeles för vass så att det blir obehagligt med s:en och frekvensåtergivningen.
Allt känns urvattnat och tunt. Sången är jättestark. Inte så behagligt för öronen överlag.
Väldigt mycket höga frekvenser som stör. "S"-ljud kommer fram väldigt. Saknas mycket bas i hela mixen, den hörs knappt alls. Pukor väldigt höga och irriterande.
Överdrivet torrt, vasst och överkomprimerat (förmodligen masterkompressor+ enskild kompression på framförallt trummor och gitarr.
För diskant och tunn mix, essig röst. Saknar djup.
Alldeles för mycket diskant
För diskant rikt, blir jobbigt att lyssna på, Vart tog midden vägen?
På tok för stark diskant, för hårt komprimerad snare, saknar botten samt så är mixen smått ojämn. Jobbig att lyssna på.
less snaps; more vocal
Vocals are too high, EQ = too much highs, way not enough bass.
thin, close and loud drums (small voice) fingersnaps!
Vocals too bright. Drums sound a little thin to me.
too bright, but otherwise nice
Lacking lows / low-mids
sounds dry, and certain instruments jump out
overall mix very bright, sounds thin.
Soft Mids. Thin vocals. Thin in general Heavy snaps. Forward accordian. vocals siblance very prominant
sounds narrow
Feels a bit thin. Vocals should be leading the band more. They feel pushed back and too quiet. Acoustic guitar nasal sounding - too mid heavy.
voice to loud compare to other instruments
Notchy, lack of low end, nasal voices.
No texture
no balance of elements in the mix
bright vox (HPF); wide;
holy high end batman! Unlistenably bright. Ensemble doesn't blend; shifty vox image
Vocal is not present enough. instrumentals do not balance well with the vocal.
sounds "metallic"
tinny
bizarre overall eq - thin; clicks too loud, bad rev

worst: clear and defined but lacks on the low end. Clean spanky guitar too obnoxious. Lacks depth. Sounds like it has been through a filter. There was no care in correcting for the fluctuations in the lead vocals.

- Great drums mix
- Solo guitar could be higher
- Good vocals mix (good use of reverb)

The volume is balanced among instruments, even if vocals and solo guitar are a touch above the snare drum. There is a nice use of the stereo image. This has enabled a good separation between instruments and their timbres. However, some of the effects used in the vocals make it confusing. It seems to me that the use of compression/limitation/saturation was over the top. This processing made the drums loose some of its character, mainly in the snare and hi-hats. The use of reverb and short delays, helps make the mix bigger and more enveloping. However, given that the low-mid range is too full, our attention is driven towards bass guitar and snare, making the overall sound undefined and unclear.
evaluations.original:
O volume entre instrumentos está equilibrado, sendo que a voz e a guitarra solo se encontra ligeiramente a cima da tarola.
Existe uma boa utilização da imagem stereo. Possibilitou uma boa divisão entre os instrumentos e os seus vários timbres. Contudo, alguns dos efeitos utilizados na voz tornam-a confusa.
Parece-me que a utilização de compressão/limitação/saturação foi exagerada. Este processamento fez com que, principalmente a bateria, perdesse algumas característica principalmente na tarola e pratos de choque.
A utilização de rverbs e delays curtos ajuda a tornar a mistura maior e mais envolvente, contudo como a zona média-grave está demasiado preenchida, a nossa atenção é desviada para o baixo e a tarola, tornando o som pouco definido e claro. 
No geral, menos compressão e uma maior limpeza da zona média ajudaria a melhorar o som geral.

evaluations.comment: The vocal is too far [sic] as the backing comes in. The compression makes the mix more audible. The percussion is well-handled.
evaluations.original: A voz está muito afastada quando entra o acompanhamento. A compressão torna a mistura mais audível. A percurssão está bem conseguida

evaluations.comment: Better definition than some. Vocals are too muffled. It is more open than other versions, in a positive sense.
evaluations.original: Tem uma maior definição do que algumas, A voz está muito abafada.  é mais aberto do que os outros no sentido positivo

evaluations.comment: As if the excessive reverberation on the lead vocals wasn't enough, they placed it panned to left and right, making it even weirder.
evaluations.original: Já não chegava o excesso de reverb na voz ainda colocaram as vozes em panorâmica na L e R, só torna as coisas mais estranhas.

evaluations.comment:
- Good drum mix (dry snare)
- Base guitar too low
- Bass too low

The volumes are out of balance, especially in the relationship between guitar-vocals-snare. It has too much center information, which makes the mix too jumbled and without space. In terms of timbre, the low-mid zone is too filled, which makes the mix too muddy and unclear. The use of effects, especially in the guitar, has made its sound unclear and in a space that is different to the rest of the band. In general, if the effect were improved or reduced, the mix would work out better.
evaluations.original:
Os volumes entre os instrumentos estão desequilibrados principalmente entre a relação guitarra-voz-tarola.
Possui muita informação ao centro o que tornou a mistura um pouco embrulhada e com pouco espaço.
Timbricamente a zona média-grave está demasiado preenchida o que torna a mistura um pouco embrulhada e pouco clara. A utilização de efeitos principalmente na guitarra tornou o seu som pouco claro e num espaço ligeiramente do resto da banda.
No geral se os efeitos fossem melhorados ou reduzidos a mistura iria resultar melhor.

evaluations.comment: The guitars sound nice. There is a well-managed volume balancing. However the vocals exhibit some effects [sic] that I disliked. The guitar solo it too concealed.
evaluations.original: As guitarras soam bem. E existe um equilíbrio de volume bem conseguido. No entanto a voz por vezes exiba efeitos que desgostei de ouvir. O solo de guiarra está muito esconcido

evaluations.comment: The definition in the vocals is slightly better than in the other versions.
evaluations.original: Definicção da voz é ligeiramente melhor do que as outras

evaluations.comment: Within the less agreeable mixes I have just heard this sounded like the best. Even though the drums are too soft, there is a nice relationship between these and the bass. The vocals need processing. The guitars need some spotlight.
evaluations.original: Dentro das não agradáveis misturas que acabei de ouvir pareceu a melhor. Apesar da bateria estar baixa existe uma boa relação entre a bateria e o baixo. As vozes precisam de tratamento. As guitarras precisam de destaque.

evaluations.comment:
- Drums could be higher (especially the snare drum)
- Missing some power to the bass (maybe more volume and a little distortion)
- Good guitar mix (base/solo)

The compressed drums create a heavier and more stable tone for the song. It however makes the mix go into a pop direction, which might not be the best solution in differenciating this from other songs.
evaluations.original: A bateria, comprimida, cria um tom mais pesado e estável a música. No entanto torna a mistura mais "pop" o que pode não ser a melhor solução na questão de diferenciar esta de músicas diferentes.

evaluations.comment: The volume relations between instruments is too unbalanced. The kick and snare are too loud when facing everything else. The reverb in the guitars makes their melody too confused and in a space that is different to all other instruments. In general the mix is too closed, with too much low-end and not enough definition. Across the song there are too many dynamic fluctuations in the vocals, making some words sound mumbled.
evaluations.original: A relação de volumes entre instrumentos é bastante desequilibra. O bombo e a tarola estão demasiado altos em relação a todo o resto. A utilização de rverbs nas guitarras torna toda a melodia bastante confusa e noutro espaço diferente dos instrumentos. No geral a mistura parece muito fechada, com demasiados graves e pouca definição.Ao longo da música sentem-se demasiadas flutuações da dinâmica da voz fazendo que por vezes se percam ligeiramente algumas das palavras.

evaluations.comment: Drums are too muffled, vocal is not too interesting. Drums are too loud. Snare drum lacks in definition.
evaluations.original: bateria está muito abafada, a voz não tem tem muito interesse. bateria muito alta, tarola sem definição

evaluations.comment: Volume-wise everything is fine. The guitars are a big mess (during the solo one should be able to distinguish more).
evaluations.original: Em termos de volumes tudo parece bem. As guitarras estão uma tremenda confusão (no solo tem se uma maior percepção).

evaluations.comment:
- The base guitar could be higher, as well as the solo
- Good drums mix
- Vocals too high

The vocal volume is too loud when compared to the instrument, especially the processed choir. The choice of vocal effect renders it distant from the rest of the band and in a different space. An element that also stands out excessively is the tambourine. The mix has too much center information, making the bass and guitar lines a bit confusing. In general, the bass region seems a bit loud and the high-end too subdued, making for an undefined sound. All instruments seem to be dynamically controlled without loss in timbre. In general, if loudnesses were better balanced, the mix would improve.
evaluations.original:
O volume da voz encontra-se alto em relação ao instrumental, principalmente nos coros com efeito. A escolha do efeito da voz torna-a distante do resto da banda e num espaço diferente. Um elemento que também se destaca exageradamente é a pandeireta.
A mistura possui muita informação ao centro fazendo com que as linhas de guitarra e baixo por vezes fiquem confusas.
No geral a zona dos graves parece um pouco alta e a dos agudos baixa, causando pouca definição no som.
Todos os instrumentos parecem estar controlados a nível dinâmico sem que o seu timbre se tenha perdido.
No geral se os volumes tivessem melhor equilibrados toda a mistura iria melhorar.

evaluations.comment: The vocal is strange, muffled. The tambourine is too loud in comparison to all the rest.
evaluations.original: voz está estranha, abafada e a pandeireta está com um volume demasiado elevado do que o resto

evaluations.comment: The choir should be compressed in order to tame the loudness fluctuations. Choir and vocals should be less present. And the vocals are processed in an unorthodox way... There is a bright percussive element that is too present.
evaluations.original: O coro deveria levar uma compressão para não variar tanto. Coro e vozes deveriam estar menos presentes. E a voz está processada de forma pouco ortodoxa.. Existe um instrumento brilhante percussão demasiado presente.

evaluations.comment: The worst of the mixes, vocals are excessively processed, I can't even put my finger on what it is. The bass sounds best overall.
evaluations.original: Pior das misturas, voz com excesso de efeito, nem sei dizer bem o que é. O baixo parece dentro de tudo o melhor.

evaluations.comment:
- Drums could be higher (especially kick and snare drum)
- Solo guitar too high (compared to base guitar)
The spacialization helps the song. However, the processed voice creates something bizarre. The instrumental guitar section lacks body and high-end: it becomes too thin...
evaluations.original: A espacializão ajuda a música. No entanto a voz processada cria algo de bizarro. A secção instrumental de guitarras falta corpo e agudos: torna-se muito fina...

evaluations.comment: The guitars and voclas are too loud when compared to the remaining instruments, so the timbre that stands out is the mid-range stemming from guitar and vocals, making the mix slightly aggressive. Even though the guitars are penned openly, in general the mix is not helpoed as all the information is too central. The use of reverbs, especially in the drums, makes all elements too distant and separated, it does not feel as if the are playing together.
evaluations.original:
As guitarras e as vozes estão demasiado altas em relação ao resto dos instrumentos, desta forma o timbre que predomina é o médio das guitarras e da voz, o que torna a mistura um pouco agressiva.
Apesar de as guitarras estarem abertas (stereo) , no geral a mistura não é beneficiada porque todo o resto da informação está demasiado central. A utilização de rverbs, principalmente na bateria coloca todos os instrumentos bastante distantes e muito separados, não parece que estão a tocar em conjunto.

evaluations.comment: Better definition in the guitar, but the rest sounds confusing / muffled.
evaluations.original: tem melhor definição na guitarra, mas o resto parece muito confuso/abafado

evaluations.comment: The attempt to pull the guitar towards the left has made it stand out against the whole instrumental, which has made everything strange. The vocals are not enjoyable to listen to.
evaluations.original: Tentativa de puxar a guitarra para o lado esquerdo, destacou-a em relação ao resto do instrumental todo. O que tornou as coisas um pouco estranhas. As vozes não estão agradáveis de se ouvir.

evaluations.comment: Less fullness and less low frequency.
Sounds very extremely to track 4. Good low and high end balance. Drums fit with the mix. Vocals are perhaps a little too high in mix.
Vocal sounds clean. Bass and guitar are a bit at the back and sounds slightly distant.
similar to tracks 0 and 1

Punchy, has a lot of forward-drive. Like movement during back vocals, but maybe moves too far?
The drum sounds dull and needs some compression.

more harsher - especially the percussions and more dry - at least it has some character

Perhaps too much room sound with the drums and drums are too high in mix generally. Or perhaps high end of drums dominates. Drums sound like they would be more appropriate for a different genre. More bass than track 0 though. Generally sounds more powerful than track 0 due to compression perhaps?

not that much different than track 0
Sharp, inhuman vocals, difficult to understand words.

Too much reverberation on vocal. Less middle frequency.
The vocal could be a bit more louder. There is a bit reverse effect in the background and it gives the impression as if I am listening the song in a container-kind of place.
overall well balanced mix

electronic guitar is too loud that overlaps a little on the vocal. The direction of instruments is not so obvious. Too many low frequencies.
so so nice. makes my ears feel warm even in the really shiny parts. beautiful.
lost some percussion and needs work on the strings. Nice balance
great

overall balance is good, vocal seems a bit dry.
finally a good EQ YES!
Vocals sound much fuller and warmer. More LF content

Vocals need a bit of reverb but it gives a nice touching presence to the voice. Mouth sounds can be heard. And plosives/sibilants too. Violin is nice and natural. Nice round and full bass tone. Good balance.

too much low mids in vox; perhaps slightly too little virb (or maybe everyone else made the song sound like it was in a cave, and now i'm thrown off by reasonable use of space)overall a bit muddy; fiddle and vox don't quite interact well - more riding needded on fiddle?

ok mix, bass too loud

The balance and timbre is amazing though. Panning is done with perfect clarity in mind. Dynamics control are masterful, and solves the vocal timbre. This one wins on balance and dynamics, but not on timbre.
best piano sound, best bass sound, best violin sound; near end of excerpt violin just overpowers vocal

nice.  Perfect. It was the first listening. It was before Bad and I brought it up to excellent.
After listening to all the other mixes I am still happy of my choice. This is sharp and smooth at the same time. All the instruments can be heard clearly and they are nice to hear. The song flows.
good mix, maybe piano too loud compared with vocal & fiddle
Nice vox reverb
Great balance and space.
I like the violin on the left. Leaves room for the vocals in the middle. Right channel underused. Vocal sibilants need a bit more processing. Good bass tone. A bit too much reverb on the vocals.
Piano is nicely done. Can hear it really clearly. Good reverb on the vocals

vox timbre is nice - good intellegibility; good kit levels; piano is perhaps a touch too close/compressed?; fiddle and vox interact well. macro dynamics are successful; reverb is not distracting and enhanced the song. refreshing.

the violin makes me headache. Bass player is nicely present. like vocal/instrument mix. vocals are a tiny bit lifeless

5th: Reverb is sexy but a bit too overbearing. Violin is in a different space to the rest. Good tonal balance. The double bass first note sticks out like a sore thumb, though. Vocal timbre is not too consistent (though more than A), so I assume it's a recording thing.
Very nice blance Everythign is heard and complementary to the genre. Could use bit more space. but still It's really good.
Great use of space.

Sounds way better produced that the other examples. The instruments are round, EQ is bright crisp and the bass is existent. Everything is glued together.
Bright Mix
the vocal 's timre should be more warm

panned instruments create a nice effect - could use a little more bass otherwise a good mix

too much reverb, but it pulls it off! cymbals get a little facey. but I like it.

nice intensity
