Way too much verb, nasty sounding verb too. Overall EQ very harsh and boxy, no warmth or low end at all. Back vocals too quiet.
Weird imaging, BG vocals too wide. Not a great verb on the vocals...BG Vocals chorus way too quiet, can't understand what he's saying. Sounds like he's in a sewer
The best one. Clear and balanced.
Like emphasis on vocals, mix of back vocals and main vocals and placement, though all very far back spatially. Feels coherent.
good balances, voc good, bass light in places..
Pretty dry... Good balance
pretty similar to 3
Nice bass, but no high frequencies. Almost don't hear drums.
more prominent bass and drums - somewhat suited to this style of music - ie. soul
bass a bit cut, not opening enough in the second part
Too much lead vox and everything tubby.
Narrow and thin.
bit muffled
Vox quite mid-rangey.  No air.
Lacks some bottom end as well as some air in the top end. The mix does not sound open.
Drums a little flat, lacking impact. Vocals nice and loud.
drums are compressed and dark, overall the tone is dark. bass sticks out too much, could use more lead vocal, don't hear piano and electric guitar that well, the organ is buried too much in the mix
Not enough reverb, too much mid.
overal too much midrange-main vocals muffled
snare too dark. mix overall dark. quite dry as well.
The vocal and the instruments sound in a harmony but the room sounds smokey. As if I am listening the band from far and as if I cannot reach them because of the smoke in the room.
bad BG balances; muddy and mismixed                                           nice ambience on LD V, though too loud.  Lead EGtr rev should integrate with LD V
drums equed strangely, lacks highs, really boxy
A bit dry. Boxy overall EQ. Backs too loud maybe. Drums have no low end or high end.
Not a nice eq overall. Lacks high frequenceis and the lows of the bass
Too dark all around. Lead vocal especially. gtr and keys muddy. Uneven lead vocal. no impact. sounds washed out.
Muddy. Vocals are well balanced. Drums are OK but lost in the mix. Everything else is a big swirling mess. Think caused by reverb and some troublesome mids in the vocals.
Problem of phase in the backing vocals. Not a very good mix overall.
Muffled and thick. Too compressed and pumpy. Kick needs more body. Muddy - have a hard time hearing individual instruments. Unpleasant to listen to overall.
Sounds like it was put thourgh a radio....Not a great mix....
Vocal might be a bit more in the back, sounds a bit strong. But still has a soft effect.
reverb does not match the mix
too much verb
sound a little distant than other tracks before 6
no...I feel confused by the atmosphere of the voice
LOTS of reverb. unecessary. everything is washy and not defined. Good level on lead vocal
Not good. Too much long reverb. Thin. Drums too quiet.
keyboard, guitars are too loud in the mix, drums sound far too back, backing vocals are too loud and too reverberant
Too quiet, needs a buss compressor (or a better one) to help keep the energy up when the vocals are out. During chorus everything is lost in the vocals reverbs!
Too much presence in the vocals
Too much importance for the voice.
Too much reverb and drums are too low in mix. Vocals too high in mix.
Verb too long. Sounds way overcompressed. Drums have no impact. BGV are in a cave -Sounds silly.
Too much reverb on back vocals, or too bright?
little too much reverb, bass comes and goes - sounds like too much buss compression... vocs too hot in chorus
Thin.  Vox sound like they're in a different room/space and are WAY closer than the band.
too much reverb. drums sound thin. uneven vocal levels. unstable mix
too thin, and muddy, vocals extremely present, chorus
Way too much reverb!
Too much reverberation.
sending all the tracks in an excessive amount of reverb does not make a good mix.

Too much reverb on pretty much everything. Especially snare! Sounds like the snare is at the back of a church and is barely audible and all reverb. Swimmy and muddy. Guitar is way too quiet and drowning in reverb too. The vocal reverb is too long and/or too high in level. Also track is too compressed.
Oh God, has this been mixed a church? Did you drop the mix in the reverb tank?
Feels quite cold. Drums lack impact.
Crushed drums, not loud enough....too much verb on everything. Same verb on everything?
truly a terrible mix, nothing more to say than hope noone needs to listen to this again

Worst mix by far. Verb is completely wrong and way too much, this isn't classical..... Drums are tiny and sound horrible. Voice harsh. Dull overall mix. Backup vocals way too loud. And wierd drum compression. This is awful.
More low end. Verb gets out of control when more instruments playing. Terrible.

weird LD V sound.                                                  main EGtr has weird stereo (the 2 channels shouldn't be panned)       weird bus compression - kick and vocals pumping really badly          too much organ in Choruses, too little in V's.  very bad choice / mix.
drums lack punchiness. vocals thin and compressed. organ too loud.
lead vocal level is unstable, piano too loud, wide drums, backing vocals too loud, don't hear the bass and electric guitar too well

Width is kinda cool, but very distracting. Keys way too loud and too compressed. Bad ensemble blend. Where is the vocal?? - it's too quiet, too uncompressed, too uneven. Chorus vox are grainy and scratchy.
Too much keys. need to feel da bass and kick. Vocal sounds chocked
Thin Lead BGVs way too far forward. robot???
Vox quite loud.  Quite compressed...
voc too dry and thin. too much HHat org too soft. too much compression on mix buss. bg vocs too hot. really take the compression off and listen again
vocals too low

Too compressed! Vocal levels are all over the place - it needs to hold a consistent spot in the mix. At times it's completely lost and at times it jumps way out! The delayed slapback guitar verb is interesting but I don't really like it. The BG vocals are way too loud compared to the lead. Levels overall are inconsistent and confusing. This is not a cohesive mix. The robot?
Lots of low end and highs, nothing in the middle..... Kick is way bigger than snare, not good. Organ way too loud. Buss compression isn't the answer to a bad mix...... Jesus that compression is bad.
Drums slammed...Snare has no body.. BG vocals way too loud in the chorus....thin vocals. BG vocals on the right only....

- Good final mix (between vocals and the other instruments)
- Bass guitar is well balanced, as well as the Guitar
- Missing some reverb to the backvocals

Main vocal very well handled (in terms of eq and reverberation); vocal backing is well achieved; the choir could be stronger. Guitar sounds nice, but could be slightly more visible. The dirty drums are cool.
evaluations.original: Voz do solista bem conseguida(reverb e equalização) ; o acompanhamento da voz está bem conseguido; o coro poderia estar mais forte. A guitarra está com bom som mas poderia estar liegeiramente mais visivel. A bateria suja é porreira.

evaluations.comment: The vocals have an interesting definition. I am not too interested by the backing vocals. The remaining instruments are too compressed (in terms of feeling). I would want a louder snare.
evaluations.original: A voz tem uma definição interessante. Não me agradam muito os backvocals. O resto dos instrumentos estão demasiado comprimidos (em termos de sensação). Sinto falta de uma tarola um pouco mais presente.

evaluations.comment: Out of all, this was my favorite mix. I think the vocal is well balanced with the rest of the instrumental.
evaluations.original: Das misturas foi a que mais gostei. Penso que a voz esta mais bem relacionada/equilibrada com o resto do instrumental.

evaluations.comment: The vocal slightly stands out from the other instruments. From a timbre standpoint, the low-end seems too exagerated and the mid-range too muddy. The use of effects in this mix is the best one, as it opens all instruments in the stereo image, without having them loose their clarity.
evaluations.original:
A voz destaca-se ligeiramente dos outros instrumentos.
Timbricamente a zona grave parece um pouco exagerada e a zona média um pouco embrulhada.
A utilização de efeitos nesta mistura é a que funciona melhor porque abre todos os instrumentos na imagem stereo sem que eles percam a sua clareza.

evaluations.comment:
- Drums could be higher
- Guitar too much on the left
- Good vocals mix (nice reverb)
- Good back vocals mix
- Bass could be powerfull
Panning options do not satisfy me: the vocal backing should not have been spatialized. The choir could have been stronger. The lead singer's voice could have been more worked on.
evaluations.original: as panorâmicas não me satisfazem: o acompanhamenteo da voz não deveria ter sido espacializado. O coro poderia ter sido mais forte. A voz do solista poderia ter sido mais trabalhada.

evaluations.comment: I liked the guitar divided in left and right. But I also find it louder in relationship with the rest.
evaluations.original: Gostei da guitarra dividida no L e no R. Mas também a acho alta em relação ao restante instrumental.

evaluations.comment: I don't like one of the drum elements, but I can't put my finger on it, even listening to the other versions. It is too present and disturbing. A sound that feels like  a"scratching" of sorts. The guitar is a bit muffled.
evaluations.original: Não me agrada um elemento da bateria que não consigo dizer qual é, mesmo ouvindo as restantes músicas. Está presente e é um pouco incomodativo. Um som que parece um "coçar" qualquer. Está um pouco abafada a guitarra

evaluations.comment: In general, all elements are balanced volume-wise. I just notice that the guitar is sometimes slightly louder than the remaining elements and the snare too low. From a timbre standpoint, the drums do not have presence and the guitar is making the mix muddy and mid-rangey.
evaluations.original:
No geral o volume de todos os instrumentos está bem equilibrado. Noto apenas que a guitarra por vezes está ligeiramente mais alta do que o resto dos instrumentos e a tarola relativamente baixa.
Timbricamente a bateria está sem presença e a guitarra está a tornar a mistura média e embrulhada. 
A utilização de rverbs e delays resultou bem e ofereceu à mistura profundidade e espaço.
A voz parece estar filtrada em demasia.

evaluations.comment:
- Good final mix (between vocals and the other instruments)
- Bass could be powerfull
- Guitar could be higher
- Vocals too much on the right
Cool panoraming spread; bizarre vocal processing; voice backing is well managed; reasonable choir. The low-end is too present.
evaluations.original: Abertura panorâmica porreira; processamento da voz bizarro; acaompanhamento da voz bem conseguido; coro razoável. Graves demasiados presentes.

evaluations.comment: Volume between instruments is well balanced, even if the snare and vocals sound more proeminent. Timbrically, that which stands out is the muddy and undefined snare sound. The vocal also seems to be excessively equalized. However, the distortion used in the vocals works very nice for this style of music.
evaluations.original:
O volume entre os instrumentos está bem equilibrado, sendo que a tarola e a voz som mais preponderantes. Timbricamente o que se destaca é o som de tarola pouco definido e embrulhado. A voz também parece estar equalizado exageradamente. Contudo, a distorção utilizada na voz funciona muito bem com este estilo de musica. 
Os efeitos de reverbs e delays estão moderados e favorecem a mistura. No geral a mistura timbricamente não está controlada e tem pouca definição e brilho.

evaluations.comment: I do not like the vocal, it is too thin, too much effort to sound radio-like. The mix of the instruments is rather balanced. I like the subtlety in the backing vocals.
evaluations.original: Não gosto da voz, demasiada fina, demasiado esforço para parecer radio-like. A mistura dos instrumentos está bastante equilibrada. Gosto da subtileza dos backvocals

evaluations.comment: Sounds too compressed. The vocal is lifeless - it sounds compacted [sic]
evaluations.original: Parece muito comprimido. A voz não tem vida nenhuma. Parece que esta compactada.

evaluations.comment:
- Kick Drum too high (compared to the rest)
- Hi Hats too low
- Good Guitar and Bass Guitar mix
- Good vocals and back vocals mix
Balanced, but it seems to be a bit muffled. I enjoy the chorus, however.
evaluations.original: Equilibrado, mas parece tudo um pouco abafado. agrada-me o refrão, no entanto

evaluations.comment: the choir is very well handled. The low-end is very strong. The beginning went very well [sic]. Lack of presence in the mids: the guitar is too invisible (as are the drums)
evaluations.original: o coro está muito bem conseguido. Graves muito fortes. O inicio correu muito bem. Falta presença nos médios: a guitarra está demasiada invisivel (tal como a bateria)

evaluations.comment: The vocals are too loud in relationship to all other instruments and the drums are too low. The mix is slightly muddy in terms of frequencies and lacks in definition. All sounds are very compressed, which makes them loose some character and timbre. Space was not well used, making the mix uninteresting and confusing. In general, the mix lacks more definition and presence in the low and high zones.
evaluations.original:
A voz está demasiado alta em relação aos outros instrumentos e a bateria ligeiramente baixa.
A mistura está ligeiramente embrulhada frequêncialmente e sem definição.
Todos os sons estão muito comprimidos o que lhes fez perder algum carácter e timbre.
O espaço foi pouco utilizado tornado a mistura pouco interessante e confusa.
No geral falta à mistura mais definição e presença da zona grave e aguda.

evaluations.comment: The bass guitar is too bass-y. It overpowers the remaining instruments.
evaluations.original: O baixo está grave de mais. Acaba por sobrepor alguns dos restantes instrumentos.

evaluations.comment:
- Missing some bass to the final mix
- Back vocals too high
- Bass guitar too low (could be higher and more powerfull)
- Guitar too much on the right
- Missing some reverb to the vocals

The low-end is missing. The overall equalization is really bizarre; no stereo opening. However, this mix transports the song in a new and very interesting direction. The vocals are very well handled, as are the drums. The guitar sounds very nice,
evaluations.original: Faltam graves! Está uma equalização geral mesmo bizarra; não havia abertura; no entanto esta mistura transporta esta música numa nova direção, esta muito interessante. A voz está muito bem conseguida tal como a bateria. A guitarra está a soar muito bem,

evaluations.comment: The vocals are even more radio-like, but it is not my cup of tea. Too much indefinition and too many high frequencies. The backing vocals do not fit with the main voice. The instrumental mix, however, is pleasant. I would like to hear a louder snare.
evaluations.original: A voz está ainda mais radio-like, mas não é de todo do meu agrado. Demasiada indefinição e demasiadas freqências agudas. Backvocals não encaixam de todo com a voz principal. A mistura dos instrumentos, no entanto, é agradável. Gostava de ouvir um pouco mais a tarola.

evaluations.comment: The vocals and guitar are louder than the rest of the instruments. All instruments seem too porcessed and equalized. The mix lacks body. The vocals, especially, only have high-end.
evaluations.original:
A voz e a guitarra encontram-se mais altos do que o resto dos instrumentos.
Todos os instrumentos parecem demasiado processados e equalizador, a mistura não tem corpo. A voz em especial só tem frequências agudas. 
A música está com pouca dinâmica e demasiado comprimida.
Todos os instrumentos parecem estar ao centro, desta forma a mistura tornou-se  menos interessante e pequena.
No geral sente-se que toda a musica está distorcida e demasiado filtrada.

evaluations.comment: The vocal EQ is too strange. It seems to be focused on the high end frequencies.
evaluations.original: A equalização da voz está estranha. Parece que está concentrada nas frequências mais agudas apenas.

evaluations.comment: Ahhhhhhhhh. Thank you.
Drums have great impact. Really good mix.
Interesting vocal sound. Great mix.
Sounds like track 4, better.
Home run! more alive than any other mix.  you can hear everything plus it has vibe and appears bigger than all of the mixes because...it was done correctly.
Nice balance between all elements.. low end is nice and controlled. Great mix!
Very nice, particularly good effect of space
nice balance
nice low end. nice drums.
love the drums. tied for first. missing some low end from the bass. otherwise well balanced - not as impressive-sounding as another mix
Nice! Good drum EQ, guitars could use some compression or delay to beef them up.
the only reasonable mix of the bunch.

The vocals jump out in the chorus a little too much, the rest is very good. The organ and guitar are conflicting with each other mostly because of the panning, you could also carve out some crap out of the high sparky guitar. Bass gets loud on some notes but compression and riding should fix it. Overall a very nice mix.
Levels are good, spacious mix.
Strong drums, though needs to come through more in the chorus. Guitars nice and balanced. Vocals don't sit well with the rest of the mix, feel disjointed.
the best balance
Nicely blanaced
Good balance, good build-up, instruments in the right place, some mud at the beginning.
Cool ambience on the vocals, nice snare sound
hook is nice. could have some of the mid frequency honk hacked out to make a bit more space. actually, not so. just don't like the snare. would have a bit more snap on it.
voc good, bass a little dark. drums good. couple voc lines need finessing.. this is mine, right?
Hard to describe the difference between it and track 6. The vocal sound is stuffy compared track 2 and track 0
snr lacks definition, nice vocal EQ,
normal
Sounds best.
Regular.
Nice tight and controlled mix. good use of compression on the drums to compensate the drummer's inconstancies. Lead vocals would benefit from being louder.

It make sense the pan the keyboard and guitar opposites because they are playing the same rhythm.  It really balances the mix in the stereo field.  The vocals don't sound properly compressed because it sticks out too much when she gets louder.
guitar at left it's too loud, suddenly jumps out
clearly
Could use more automation on the kick/bass: quiet in spots.
Good balance but a narrow mix
Fair but a bit too much of low. The others are better balanced.
Kick needs better deffinition. Low mids are cloudy esp in the chorus, where the vocals need help in terms of automation
less atmospherical, sounds a bit flat
good balance. kick and snare cut through. vocal sits right. sound opens up on chorus.
Really good spatial positioning of the delicate effects and synths. Vocals stand strong and clear. Guitars balanced
Similar to track 4.
Too much compression on drum.
Spacious, warm mix.
Here we here drums better, but it lacks a bit of overall enveloping or character. Good spread. I like it.
I like the balance but the vocal is out of control, needs automation and maybe tuck it in a bit. Snare sounds dull and every hit is different. Organ is a bit too wide, not natural
good
Great mix, clear and compelling. A little low heavy though.
Pretty nice, but bit too much reverb, and reproduction quality isn't excellent
good
Relaxing and enchanting.
Generally good. Vocals still get lost bit before the chorus (as with all mixes)
The vocal sound is lolder compared track 2 and track 0

vocal could use more clarity versus the keys. also, more compression once the chorus hits, her voice sticks out too far. otherwise cool! nice rhythm section. not a big fan of the vocal delay/verb personally.
nice vocal balance, maybe a little too much of the verb on main vox, snare is lost, kik sound needs a little lows

balance is good. not too much reverb like other tracks. decent spread of instruments, good balance between sources. maybe a little less on the reverb actually, or perhaps a bit of a LPF on the return of the reverb

Besides the guitar and keyboard being panned too far, this mix makes sense, maybe a little less wet sound on the reverb to make it fit with such a dry drum and bass sound, but that is more of a preference.
Weird L&R image, Nice vocals, Could have a bit more low end.
cool but a bit too much reverb and needs some better dynamic control on the voice.  drums and bass are too far down in volume
Snare too soft, weak. Nice vocal level.
reverberant
Very reverberant but it's ok, sounds good. Nice balance.
Reverb
thick - keys, guitar. snare too far back, but balance in general is good.
Guitar is too prominent, mix is too trebly
Horrible vocal verb. Horrible verbs in general. Drums have a bit of punch at least. Balances OK. Vocal needs leveling.
clear voice, more shiny overall
bad drum sound - bad lead vocal mix
Vocals a bit too loud. Quite a harsh mix.
don't like the vocal ambience that much
This vocal verb, I don't think it matches the voice.
Vocals are low, and diluted in a reverb with a lot early echo. This is really not helping them to cut through and to be intelligible.
Like the low end punch, need more pop from the snare.
Not enough kick. Verb pushing the vox back too much. Pick a different vox verb.
bad phase,
nice vox. ambiance goes well with rhythm instruments. kick covered up by bass. snare not cutting through enough
Nice mixing for this type of song.
bright vocal
Nice width to the mix
Hard to tell the difference between this and track 0. both are my favourite
Not enough low end, bass need a bit of a boost. A little bright overall as well, but all of the timbres are nice.
Drums have good punch.
voice too loud
I like the effect of the voice. It makes it more present in the memory. But maybe it stands out too much.
top drums too light; kick too loud for bass level / sound.  vocal verb not in perspective.
Vocal feels thinned out, which is nice. But needs more low end to fill under that. Snare too soft, no bite.
Drums almost sound good. Too much kick not enough snare. Guitar too far back. At least you're not wrecking it.
everything sits pretty nicely, the bass is a little too trebley
Vocals very prominent. Punchy drums. Guitar too quiet. Lacks subtlety.
toms a bit too loud, low tom especially not well balanced. Bass it a bit low.
Soft instruments. Guitars too distorted, should be cleaner to match the softer overall mix.
vocal is front and center, which is good. the tom sticks out. other instruments (besides the tom) could come up some to support the vocal & add some sauce.
can't hear all the instruments well. voice is too far up and distorting in level. poor multichannel balance
Rhythmic.
The verb on the vocal is wrong and doesn't really fit the song, but I feel the instruments are glued well together, and the vocal is the still the main focus.
No bass, too much kick, weird balance.Mix doesnt suit the music. Nice vocals
vocal boxy, reverb decent, spread is alright. very scooped, could do with a bit more body.
Drums seem a little carved out of something. I need some more meat from that snare.
more heights and depths, also recognisable bass guitar
another wierdo vocal reverb. hihat is roomy sounding. overall obscure mix
Quite nice all-round except the guitar is distorted. Probably not intentional?
weird mids, vox too up
Weird scooped vocal sound.
not right reverb for the vocal and other instruments need to be more louder compared with vocal
Lo-fi? Drums seem very weak, except the kick, which seems out of place. Then in the chorus you need to calm the drums down and keep them in the mix, same with the vocal at the end.
too long vocal reverb with weird color
seems a bit all over the place
Very verby, don't like the decay. Vox is muddy.

Instrument balance sounds wrong to me, drums are in the back in the begining and in the end they're too loud. There is a resonance in the low mids that clouds up the mix. Vocals get to loud and then go back.
Too much reverb, especially on vocals. Rack tom mic is way too loud.
Too much distortion on guitar.
terrible vocal reverb(broken plate), kik lack definition, vocal sits weird
nice vox, ambiant and dark, but everything around her sounds too dark. too much "poof" in kick. not enough "crack" in snare.
Overall, a good balance.
like the fullness of the mix. vocals could come up a hair, and with a different EQ & a bit of verb support it'd take 1st.
vocals are a bit dry/low
Guitar too loud. Drums could use some punch. Might have been nice to have a touch of verb on the vocal. Balances pretty OK.

dry, decent. a little boxy but not too bad. not too wide. a bit boring but better than extremes of others. sounds quite under mixed. a bit too aggressive on acoustic guitar in verse. could have been dipped more.
Dry mix, no depth. Vocal is too loud, the rest is pretty good. Where is the reverb? Come on, a bit won't hurt anyone. Oh god, the vocal needs it!
Prefer these stronger guitars than Track 1. However some energy lacking, odd periods of overly dry mix. Vocals stand out nicely, but too dry in the Chorus.
Ok mix but clarity isn't quite there.  can't hear the drums well and lose the voice in the bass build up at chorus
normal
Sounds a little crowded. Guitar track requires more compression.
Electric guitar is nice but too forward. No sense of forground, blanace is messy. Vocal is too dry.
Voice suffers from not enough reverb compared to the rest of the mix
Too much guitar, it dominates the vocal
Sounds like there is some noise in the background with the groove.
Too much low frequency.
Vocales don't cut through the instrumentation, while the mix is reasonably clear.
voice sound like not match the melody
not a good drum mix & sounds (weird snare).  ld vocal needs better context (with verb or something) and better rides
really dry, guitars cut too much in verse
dry vocals, also something inhigh mids in voice, drums distant
Nice. Vocals too dry. Drums too dry.
Undefined bass, weird EQ on vocals.
Sounds generates form a close place. Too close maybe
sounds flat, a bit confusing how instruments come together, sounds more harsh
The guitar is too loud in the mix.  It should have already been already be under the rest of the mix.
Plain.
Vocals a little dry.
Muddy. Need more presence/punch from ryhtm section, vox too loud in comparison
Guitar too loud. vocal very dry. Generally not well balanced.

Low end needs work. electric guitar is too loud. vocal EQ has some problems, sound phasey some times - not helping. Also, if the voice is going to be that dry, you need to work harder on your automation.
very dry voc, guit too loud - crazy compression on this one.drums much too low
over compressed, no groove
vocal too dry
too dry - doesn't sound like one performance
Weird low end and low mid heavy, too much! Meeh.
too much mid-high
vocal it's really dry, bass has too much low end
vox a bit too loud. need wetter vox. rhythm instruments too loud. drums need to be louder. bass needs more definition.
too much bass, overall a bit dry, kick too loud, the rest of drums too soft
Guitar loses impact due to compression, but creates a nice subtle mix.
Less low frequency.
bright
I love this track. Effect is great
Reverb and voice a little high.
Nice, guitars are a little muffled though
Soft and warm.
inst. seem distant/muddy
vocals dominant,
the voice too ahead
too much vocal

This is an unorthodox mix. But the effect of muffling the backing instrumentation very nicely serves the lead vocals on the verse. It would be interesting to open the sound a little more on the chorus, that fails to get the lift it needs.  There are strange abrupt volume changes in the instrumentation of the chorus. Caused by a bad balance of the ride cymbal vs. HH ?
The reverb on the vocal doesn't fit, and the guitar and keyboard could come up a bit more.
vox sound good but everything else is a little undefined
Good depth of the voice. I noticed the guitar with this mix. It needs more presence of the rhythmic structure. Compared to the others, there are things missing.
Instrumentals lack impact. Quite a lot of reverb on vocals, but this give the mix warmth.
would like it wider. music feels very low, vocal is VERY up front. the rest of the music doesn't
keys don't need so much verb. vocal could use more eq correction & a different verb. not balanced yet.
Drums too quiet (especially kick).
no drums? drums too low
weird phase in bass
Inappropriate reverb. Weird L&R image. No high end.
Missing some presence on the acoustic guitar and punch from the band. A little wet too.
cool, silky vox. rest of band sounds dark and far back. cooler if it was a bit closer and more intimate.
Sound like I'm in a church - very incongruous reverb.
Reverb on the keys makes it soupy. Vocal level a little upfront this big roomy thing behind it.
Where are the drums?? Totally out of balance, all I hear is high hat, maybe a little snare. Verb is washy.
Too much reverb
both guitars up the middle. too much voc reverb. crazy rhodes treatment. where are the drums? 1 800 drums? long distance please come home in time for dinner....
dark and boomy; almost cannot hear drums
not a mix in any sense of the word.  drums ridiculously low.  too much verb on vocal and kbd.
Cool vocals but where is the rest of the mix?  Sounds like a HPF on the rest.
Muddy, no transients or punch. Vocals stand out nicely.
where are the drums? seriously.  Nasal vocals.
Terrible resonance in the low mids, please kill it and burn the body. Vocals too loud and the instruments are a mess.
Drums too far, really weird balance. not good.
Drums WAY too low. Vocal verb is way too loud. Too much verb overall, no definition. Vocals too loud. Balances are all wrong.
The vox is loud, but everything else is too quiet. Where are the drums? Can't hear the kick.
It sounds a little muddy.
the

punch of the snare could be at a higher pitch, overall nice, balanced. vocal is nice. smooth. a bit simple compared to other mix's could have more vibe. probably close to the best, but i would have more reverb on the vocal

whoah pumping compression- terrible!! voc bright thin and to soft inplaces... the buss compressor is killing the mix. bass is nowhere. I hope this is the robot and not one of our students...

eww. Can't even listen to this. Everything is completely wrong.
2. Brittle, grating HH and guitars. Too bright and thin. Can REALLY hear mix buss compression - very unpleasant to listen to overall.

4th: Good popping mix, but not super-tight. The snare is too deep and the vocals not deep enough which is a strange placement option for me. The kick works well with the bass even if it is sometimes a bit too compressed. The toms are too loud.

Very Nice balance between all instruments. Good equalisation, sounds balanced. Not too bassy and retains brilliance. Could maybe do with some more reverb perhaps, but this could be down to preference.

Nice job overall - full & appropriately balanced bandwidth, good levels, not reliant on reverb for a nice mix. Backup singers too close - would've liked less level, more verb on them. Maybe just a bit more piano.

Stands out for the incredible amount of compression though, which is a good consideration to take into account if it is ours.

10th: This mix confuses me. It is unconventional but I do not object to it. The main problem is that the drums are too soft and the vocal to loud and dry. The vocal seems to have a flanger and is dynamically out of control. I would normally rate it really low, but somehow there is something here that shows thought and criteria. Still the worse in the bunch, though
Good mix, but the vocals needed more attention in order not to get subdued at some points of the song.
evaluations.original: Boa mistura mas a voz precisava de mais atenção para não se perder em algumas partes da mistura.

evaluations.comment: Fairly balanced, the guitar are well mixed, and so is the bass. The snare could have more low-mid range, so as to have more body.
evaluations.original: bastante equilibrada em que as guitarras estão misturadas, baixo também. a tarola poderia estar com mais médio grave de forma a dar-lhe mais corpo

evaluations.comment: The proper definition of individual elements helps to figure the song out better. Guitars are too loud, especially starting from the pre-chorus, where it steals attention away from the voice. The vocals are not present enough from the pre-chorus. Hihat too loud on the chorus. If the vocals were slightly louder on the chorus, the mix would be, in my opinion, more balanced.
evaluations.original: Definição dos elementos ajuda a perceber melhor a música. Guitarra demasiado alta principalmente a partir do pré-refrão que rouba a atenção da voz. Voz pouco presente a partir do pré-refrão. Prato de choques muito alto no refrão. Se a voz estivesse ligeiramente mais alta no refrão, a mistura estaria, na minha opinião, mais equilibrada.

evaluations.comment: The drums don't have any room to them. The vocal is quite low and masked by the other elements. the back vocals need to be tighter, and they seem to disappear in the mix. Mix tends to the left. The guitar in the middle 8 is quite loud.

The overdriven guitars are excessively proeminent and have too much mid-range. Their panning is too far towards the left side. The snare toms and kick are not present in the mix, while at the same time we notice some exageration on the way the hi-hats are proeminent in the chorus. Lacks in EQ and compression on the mix bus.
evaluations.original: Excesso de médios e da presença das guitarras com overdrive, talvez pelo ganho ou pans demasiadamente levados ao lado esquerdo. Tarola, timbalões e bombo sem presença na mistura, ao mesmo tempo notamos certo exagero napresença dos hi hats no refrão. Falta corpo à mistura, falta EQ e compressão no Canal Final de Mix.

evaluations.comment: The drums should be more present. The bass guitar is a bit loud. The vocals have an excessive high range.
evaluations.original: bateria deveria estar mais presente, o baixo está um pouco alto voz está com excesso de agudos

evaluations.comment: The temporal processing is not flattering. Guitars are not present enough. Drums lacking in loudness.
evaluations.original: Efeito temporal na voz não elogia nada. Guitarras pouco presentes. Falta de volume na bateria.

evaluations.comment: The vocal effect is excessive. The overall mix is too muffled. Vocals stand out too much on the loudest part of the song. Drums are hidden. Not enough strength to carry the song when it is needed [sic]
evaluations.original: Efeito na voz é demasiado. Mistura no geral muito abafada. Voz demasiado destacada na parte mais "puxada" da música. Bateria muito escondida. Não tem força suficiente para carregar a música quando precisa.

evaluations.comment: Excessive processing on the vocals, making them plastic. They are also too loud in respect to the additional elements. One does not hear any drum element other than the overheads high-mid-range. Nice bass balance. Pianos are too proeminent.
evaluations.original: Excesso de tratamento à voz, gerando plasticidade estranha. Excesso de presença em relação aos demais elementos. Não ouvimos as demais peças da bateria além dos médio agudos dos overheads. Bom equilíbrio de baixo. Excesso de presença dos pianos.

evaluations.comment: Mix is quite boxed. drums and bass are so low and masked. some weird things are happening to the vocals. Again the keyboards seem to stand out.

The vocals could be slightly stronger and slightly less dry. The keyboard element could be a little louder on the verse in order to provide the song with aditional dynamics. The drums could be louder overall, but bearing in mind the hihats. The chorus backing vocals are too loud. The hihat is too loud during the chorus.
evaluations.original: A voz poderia estar um pouco mais alta e ligeiramente menos seca. Elemento de teclas poderia estar um pouco mais alto no verso para dar mais algum dinamismo à música. Bateria no geral poderia estar mais alta, mas tendo em atenção os pratos. Coros no refrão demasiado altos. Prato de choques muito alto no refrão.

evaluations.comment: The mix is lacking in strength. The background vocals are occupying too much space that should belong to the main vocals. The keyboard with delay adds an interesting space.
evaluations.original: Falta um pouco de força à mistura. Vozes de backgroud ocupam demasiado espaço que pertence à principal.As teclas com delay acrescentam um espaço interessante.

evaluations.comment: Bass not present enough. Vocal is too mid-rangey.
evaluations.original: baixo pouco presente; Voz com excesso de médios

evaluations.comment: Needs a bit more vocals. The vocal seems a little dead. Drums don't have any punch to them. Guitars are a little "low middy". Back vocals are too loud when compared to the main vocal.

Excessive drums, vocals and backing vocals (especially in the chorus). Some work was needed in the vocals (applying EQ for added brightness compressor for dynamic presence and reverb to simulate the room that the original studio was lacking in). Gutars and bass-lines are missed.
evaluations.original: Excesso de bateria, vocais e backing vocals (principalmente no refrão). Falta trabalho nas vozes (aplicação de EQ para dar mais brilho, Compressor para dar mais presença dinâmica e reverb para simular o room que a sala do estúdio original não apresentava). Faltam guitarras e linhas de baixo.

evaluations.comment: Vocals are too poorly defined and not present enough. The synthesizer is not congruent with the mix. Guitars and drums lack body.
evaluations.original: Voz pouco definida e pouco presente, O sintetizador está solto da mistura. E falta corpo nas guitarras e bateria.

evaluations.comment: I feel a lack of high-end in the vocals. Too much mid-bass is making the mix dull and heavy. The hihat is too loud on the chorus.
evaluations.original: Sinto falta de agudos na voz. Demasiados médios graves tornam a mistura "aborrecida" e pesada. Prato de choques muito alto no refrão.

evaluations.comment: Feeble mix. Excessive overheads. Snare drums very poorly equalized. Vocal has no presence.
evaluations.original: mistura fraca, excesso de OH, tarola muito mal equalizada, voz sem presença

evaluations.comment: Excessive proeminence of keyboards and vocals. The guitars have a strident timbre. Excessive hi-hats on the chorus. One does not hear the details on the drums (should have been compressed and gain automated).
evaluations.original: Excesso de presença de teclados e vozes. Guitarras com timbre muito estridente. Excesso dos hi hats no refrão. Não se ouve com detalhe os detalhes da bateria (falta compressão e aumento de gains).

evaluations.comment: It seems that someone forgot to mix this one. A lot of keyboard,

-Balans is goed.

evaluations.comment: In the chorus I'm hearing a guitar which I nearly don't hear in the other mixes.  Drums and bass carry the song quite well, better than the rest.  Guitar sounds nice.  The voice isn't compressed well enough I think.  This chorus is the best.
evaluations.original:
In dit refrein hoor ik een gitaar die ik in de andere mixen bijna niet hoor. Drum en bas dragen het nummer vrij goed, 
beter dan bij de rest. Gitaar klinkt tof. De stem is volgens mij enkel niet goed genoeg gecompresseerd. Dit refrein is 
het beste.

evaluations.comment: Very fun mix, sounds lively and clean,  maybe just a bit too clean.  I'm missing the organ joining in on a few notes here and there.  The drums [have got] a lot of punch though,  too much in my opinion for this type of music, but that's a matter of taste.  Well done generally.
evaluations.original:
Heel toffe mix, klinkt levendig en proper, misschien niet iets té proper.
Ik mis het orgeltje ook dat hier en daar enkele noten meespeelt.
De drum heel wel heel veel punch, naar mijn mening te veel voor dit soort muziek, maar dat is smaak afhankelijk.
In het algemeen tof gedaan.

evaluations.comment: The mix gets its atmosphere from the delay on the vocal, which gives the whole an interesting spaciousness.  The transition from verse to chorus works quite well.  Because the cymbals are mixed so loudly, they [fill up quite a bit] at times, which is unfortunate for the impact of the whole.  In mono the mix nearly retains its full strength,  but it becomes obvious that the vocals are still a bit uncontrolled.
evaluations.original:
De mix haalt zijn sfeer uit de delay op de stem, wat het geheel een interessante ruimtelijkheid geeft.
De overgang van verse naar chorus werkt erg goed.
Omdat de cymbalen zo luid worden gemixt, smeren ze bij momenten wel veel toe, wat jammer is voor de impact van het geheel.
in mono behoudt de mix bijna zijn volledige kracht maar valt het vooral op dat de stemmen nog wat ongecontroleerd zijn.

evaluations.comment: Good combination of drums and bass. They nicely stay in their spot.  Defined mix, sounds open.  Vocals are nicely balanced.  This is certainly my favourite and I think it's [radio worthy]. Time was spent on this mix, and the music was listened to properly.
evaluations.original:
Goede Combinatie drums bas Blijven mooi op hun plaats, gedefinieerde mix, klinkt open. samen zang mooi in balans
Dit is weker  mijn favoriet en vind hem radio waardig. er is tijd in gestopt, en goed geluisterd naar de muziek

evaluations.comment: Similar to track 1. Reverb on vocals help to bed the track together. However sometime vocals get too quiet and cannot hear some lyrics. Drums are nice and punchy.

Maybe the vocal is a bit too quiet,  and there is a bit too much reverb as well.  It sounds quite big,  but I'm wondering if this isn't too much of a good thing, at times.  The cymbals sound really washy.  Maybe there's a bit too much hi-hat as well in this mix.
evaluations.original:
Misschien staat de vocal iets te zacht, en is er ook een klein beetje teveel reverb. Het klinkt heel groot, maar ik vraag me af of het niet een beetje teveel van het goeie is, met momenten. De cymbalen klinken echt washy. Er is ook misschien wat teveel hihat in deze mix. 
Het laag klinkt ook niet 100% strak in mijn oren.

evaluations.comment: Nice balance.
evaluations.original: Mooie balans.

evaluations.comment: The mix is good.  The proportions are okay  and the song sounds present.  Effect on the vocal fits the song quite well too.

De mix zit goed. De verhoudingen zijn ok en de song klinkt aanwezig. Effect op de zang past ook goed bij de song. 
Misschien iets teveel gitaar tijdens de strofe.

evaluations.comment: Light and very roomy sound, washes out the details a bit

I think there is a little much rev on the vocals at points, so maybe some automation or even a compressor? - the reverb isn't quite right. but the overall balance is nice
Vocals are a bit too quiet, the bad sound of the guitar recording is very obvious here
it seems good, live room effect maybe too much. I like the guitar
This one is like a soup of tracks

Veel bas; live gevoel , weinig vocal / onverstaanbaar; Algemeen luider !  vreemde reverb (te lang?) , Bas iets te luid.

evaluations.original: iets te veel HH / overheads

evaluations.comment: sounds like the vocal is far away from me, maybe it ought to increase the volume of the vocal part

evaluations.original: Hi hat is luider en dan het overige van de drumkit. Wat voor mij wat stoort. Opnieuw zakt de stem wat weg.

evaluations.comment: Distant vocals create a muffled effect and for a pop/rock track this is not a desirable outcome. Vocals should have been placed a lot more in "front". This makes it a poor mix but instruments seem quite balanced otherwise
Vocals hard to hear. Weird reverb going on.
Best mix overall. Well balanced
i like this.  Clearer voice but not getting over the rest of the tracks

With the exception of the vocals which could be a bit more controlled in their dynamics,  the mix is quite musical and powerful.  The reverb on the snare is a bit big/long for the song.  Too bad that spaciousness is not used more in the choruses (delay on the vocals?).  In mono the mix nearly retains its complete strength,  but it becomes especially obvious that the vocals or still a bit uncontrolled.
evaluations.original:
Met uitzondering van de stemmen die wat meer gecontroleerd zouden kunnen zijn in hun dynamiek, klinkt de mix erg muzikaal en krachtig.
De galm op de snare is wat groot/lang voor de song.
Jammer dat de er niet wat meer ruimtelijkheid wordt aangewend in de refreinen (delay op de stemmen?)
in mono behoudt de mix bijna zijn volledige kracht maar valt het vooral op dat de stemmen nog wat ongecontroleerd zijn.

evaluations.comment: I'm a fan of this balance.  Maybe this mix sounds a bit dry, the song sounds quite powerful with a bit of reverb,  but in itself this is mixed quite tightly.  Maybe a bit brighter in general.
evaluations.original: Ik ben wel fan van deze balans. Misschien klinkt deze mix een beetje droog, Het nummer klinkt best wel powerful met wat reverb, maar op zich is dit vrij strak gemixt. Misschien in het algemeen een tikkeltje brighter

evaluations.comment: Good mix,  the voice stays a bit too dry in my opinion, it could use a bit more space. Then it would also fit the space of the instruments more.
evaluations.original:
Toffe mix, de stem blijft naar mijn gevoel iets te droog, daar mag wat meer ruimte in.
Dan gaat hij ook in een keer wat meer passen bij hoe ruimtelijk het instrumentale klinkt.

evaluations.comment: Nice balance  and stereo image.
evaluations.original: mooie balans en stereobeeld

evaluations.comment: In this mix there is a lot of energy for me.  Drums (snare especially) may be a bit too loud which makes the rest less audible.  I miss guitar in the chorus. This is quite crucial after all.  Voice is a bit too quiet at the start.  It is balanced quite well otherwise.  Voices are well balanced with respect to each other.  This mix is quite successful even though the snare is too loud.  Guitar had to be a bit louder in the chorus.  This mix seems louder and more open than the rest.
evaluations.original:
In deze mix zit voor mij wel veel energie. Drums (vooral snare) staan mss iets te luid waardoor de rest minder
hoorbaar is. Gitaartje in het refrein mis ik. Dit is toch vrij belangrijk. Stem staat op het begin te stil. Voor de rest is die wel vrij goed in balans. Stemmen zijn tov elkaar goed in balans. Buiten dat de snare te luid staat vind ik deze mix vrij geslaagd. Gitaar moest iets luider in het refrein. Deze mix is precies luider en meer open dan de rest.

evaluations.comment: We discover things we can't hear on other mixes. Good presence and punchiness. Bass drum a bit too boomy. A bit "in your face" but fits well the style. Better use of panning than other mixes. I like the guitar pads on the sides. Vocals should be a bit louder on the verses especially in the quiet parts. Really good chorus. Like the effect on the vocals in the chorus.
is like the improved version of 4, with a bit more gain and levels more balanced
A very direct mix,  I'm missing some effects  and think the vocals are too much to the front, especially with the vocal harmonies.
evaluations.original: een hele directe mix, ik ,is hier wat effecten en vind de vocalen te ver naar voren komen in de mix. vooral bij de samen zang

evaluations.comment: The vocal floats above everything a bit in the verses.  Drums can be a bit too filtered in the lows.  The snare doesn't have a lot of impact anymore.  Bass is a bit loud,  but sounds quite good (which is something).  In the chorus the guitars fall back all of a sudden,  these are better in the verses.  The chorus seems a tad empty because of this.  Quite a good mix in general.
evaluations.original:
-Vocal hangt er iets boven in de verses.
-Drums zijn soms iets te gefilterd in het laag, de snare heeft niet veel impact meer.
-Bas is een beetje luid, maar klinkt wel goed (da's al iets).
-In het refrein vallen de gitaren plots naar achter, in de verses zitten die beter. Het refrein lijkt erdoor ietswat leeg
-Over het algemeen een goeie mix.

evaluations.comment: Punchy track. Very nice in chorus. Well balanced. Guitars need to be stronger. Drums are tinny. Everything coming from centre apart from spaced guitars, sounds dead at times when guitars get lost.

Most visibly the "heaviest" mix of all. More prominent kicks but not so visible on the Bass so not a complete EQ on overall mix but on the drums particularly. Vocals could be louder here but otherwise a fair balanced mix
good, bass bit too much
Drums a bit too loud and vocals a bit too quiet in the verse
Vocals sound quite dull.  More high in the mix?
evaluations.original: Vocals klinken redelijk dof. Meer hoog in de mix?

evaluations.comment: The vocal is missing some effect  and is a bit too quite in the verse as well wrt the chorus.  The song sounds quite clear though  and the proportions are correct.  Guitars sound a bit too thin most of the time maybe.
evaluations.original: De zang mist wat effect en staat in de strofe ook iets te zacht t.o.v. de refrein. De song klinkt wel helder en de verhoudingen zitten juist. gitaren klinken misschien iets te dun.

evaluations.comment: Vocal quite dry in terms of reverb,  a lot of top high,  energy is conveyed quite well.
evaluations.original: vocal vrij droog in reverb, veel top hoog , energie komt goed over.

evaluations.comment: Vocal is quite dry in the mix.  And very transparent,  maybe a bit too much to the front in the choruses.
evaluations.original: Stem redelijk droog in de mix. En heel transparant, misschien iets te veel op de voorgrond in de refreinen.

evaluations.comment: mixed by a bass player?
instrument volume is too loud
Bass-heavy
the vocal sound is quite prominent in this soundscape
Voice is too quiet, guitars are too loud
Too much kick and snare,  vocal too quiet in verse
evaluations.original: te veel kick/snare stem te stil in vers.

evaluations.comment: This lacks a bit of punch, and there seems to be an EQ effect on it that makes it sound a bit distorted/played over bad speakers
Drums a lot more to the front.  Too much for me which makes me listen to the vocal less.  It helps that the voice is louder in the chorus
evaluations.original: Drums veel meer naar de voorgrond. Voor mij teveel hierdoor ga ik minder naar de stem luisteren. Dat de stem in het refrein luider is helpt wel.

evaluations.comment: The voice is too low compared to the other instruments
perfect
best mix, everything sounds good in stereo. I can clearly differentiate the different instruments
interesting use of space, bit flat in the front
Something's wrong with the eq on this one?
Guitars are low, nice high end overall. Maybe the best mix, but just because you cannot hear the bad overdriven guitars
the balance is ok , but I do not like it
Vocals a bit too much "excited" by some kind of tube-modelling

What I usually achieve by setting the EQ to "rock" on a hifi system. Heavy low and high frequencies. The amount of high frequencies are more that I like. Guitar seems stereo. Overall a fair/good mix but would be tiring to listen to more than a few minutes and it lacks too much mid frequencies. This is noticeable towards the end where the keys come in
Good but the guitar is too present and not well panned in my opinion
Good width with the panning. Too much drums with exaggerated reverb, like it's being played in a stadium. Vocals are too thin. Doesn't sound natural. It's the FM sound.
A little tinny sounding
That mix seriously lacks punch, I guess the drums should be more present
Vocals too high and dry - sounds flat and lifeless.
Very nice mix, not really something to note unfortunately :)
evaluations.original: Zeer leuke mix en balans. Helaas niet echt een opmerking :).

evaluations.comment: Hard to make out the lyrics. Vocals should be louder.  Nice balance otherwise

Nice mix,  something in the voice in the low mids bothers me.  Nicely done otherwise.  In terms of effects and spaciousness this is more than okay.  The drums could be a bit more present in my opinion.
evaluations.original:
Toffe mix, er stoort mij net in stem nog iets in het laag-mid. Verder heel tof gedaan.
Op het vlak van effecten en ruimtelijkheid is dit wel dik oké.
De drum mocht nog wel iets meer aanwezig zijn naar mijn mening.

evaluations.comment: the voice stands a bit too much
maybe the EQ balance affected and mixed all these sound sources together, not bad
Nice but some panning should be added to all the instruments (very similar to track 3)
good, but compared to others less rich . voice very over the rest

The voice comes in quite brutally as well in the chorus,  but is better in terms of balance nonetheless.  Reverb on the snare sounds nice.  This mix sounds more open than mix 1 and 4  and is better in terms of balance.  Toms are well balanced wrt the rest of the drums.
evaluations.original: Stem komt ook vrij brutaal in tijdens het refrein, maar is toch beter qua balans.. Galm op de snare klinkt leuk. Deze mix klinkt meer open dan mix 1 en 4 en is beter qua balans. Toms zitten goed in balans tov de rest van de drums.

evaluations.comment: A bit too much reverb for my taste. Quite punchy and clear mix though. Vocals dominate too much over the instruments. Good build up to the chorus which sounds more energetic than the verse as it should be. A bit more guitar would be welcome.
Personally I would use a bit less reverb,  and a different patch especially.
evaluations.original:
Ik zou persoonlijk wat minder reverb gaan gebruiken, en vooral een andere patch. 
Zou evt ook wel wat brighter mogen klinken en wat minder wollig, het klinkt niet per se open.

evaluations.comment: Background vocals very prominent, Vocals overall a bit too prominent in comparison to remaining instruments. A very interesting mix
Very narrow stereo width, vocals are too prominent
Well balanced and spread out. Vocals clear and with nice space from the reverb. Could have more energy in build-up to chorus.
Not the best  but certainly not bad.
evaluations.original: niet het beste maar zeker niet slecht

evaluations.comment: there is a high cut here but I can't pin point the main characteristic of this mix. In the beginning vocals are not very well mixed but it gets better in the second section of the mix.  Fair mix but lacks excitement
Mix sounds quite empty.  Make more space with EQ?
evaluations.original: Mix klinkt redelijk leeg. Via eq misschien meer plaats maken?

evaluations.comment: A bit too much drums and vocal,  not enough guitars, especially the melodic guitar.
evaluations.original: te veel Drum/stem te weinig gitaren, vooral het melodische gitaartje

evaluations.comment: The mix has little presence in the vocals.  Because of the loud cymbals you would expect the vocals to be EQd more 'freshly'.  In mono the mix loses a bit of power  and the uncontrolled vocals are most apparent.
evaluations.original:
De mix kent weinig presentie in de stemmen. Omwille van de luide cymbalen, zou je verwcahten dat de stemmen ook 'frisser' zouden worden ge-eq'ed.
in mono verliest de mix wel wat van zijn kracht en valt vooral de ongecontroleerde vocals tot uiting.

evaluations.comment: Nice balance,  good EQ,  reverb not over the top,  misses a bit of 'freshness' though.
evaluations.original: Mooie balans , goede EQ , niet overdreven met reverb , mist wel een beetje frisheid.

evaluations.comment: It's very irritating that the backing track of the lead vocal is running along - they are not synchronous.  It's not a very bad mix in terms of balance.  But I simply can't listen to it - it's bothering me a lot.
evaluations.original: het is heel storend dat de backing track van de lead mee loopt. deze lopen niet synchroon. qua balans is het geen hele slechte mix. maar ik kan er gewoon niet naar luisteren . het irriteert mij mateloos.

evaluations.comment: This lacks punch as well, although I find it better than the first two. The whole mix is not very loud and the guitar is not distinctive enough

The vocal is good in terms of effects  but is a bit too loud at times.  The EQ of the vocal is quite alright as well.  Maybe a bit more compression on the vocal.,  The song itself is missing a bit of power as well.  Drums are quite soft too.
evaluations.original:
De zang zit goed qua effect maar staat net iets te luid op sommige momenten. De EQ van de zang is ook dik in orde.
Misschien iets meer compressie op de zang. Nummer zelf mist wat aan kracht. drums staan ook redelijk zacht.

evaluations.comment: Too much rev, where have the vocals gone?

Vocal sits nicely in the mix,  but it seems there is a very dull delay on the lead and that doesn't sound good at all.  Instruments seem very strongly EQd in this mix just to cut through the mix, but don't sound nice.  I'm missing definition.  The chorus has a weird balance, almost just drums, vocal and keys, while there is a lot more in it.
evaluations.original:
-Vocal zit goed in de mix, maar er zit precies een heel doffe delay op de lead en dat klinkt echt niet.
-Instrumenten lijken in deze mix sterk ge-EQ'd om gewoon in de mix door te komen, maar klinken niet mooi. Ik mis definitie.
-Het refrein heeft een vreemde balans, da's bijna alleen drums, vocals en keys, terwijl er veel meer inzit.

evaluations.comment: barely can hear drums. voice it too present and not improved.
vocals get lost in places
some delay effect
Mix sounds right.  Nice, spacious image,  but snare drum is a bit small.  Sounds quite far.
evaluations.original: Mix klinkt juist. Mooi ruimtelijk beeld maar snare is wat klein. Klinkt vrij ver.

evaluations.comment: This one is also ok but I feel 0 is more balanced
Vocals a little lost in the drums.
Quite heavy and very dry vocals.
This has a bit more character than the others, perhaps thanks to the guitar
The voice is too compressed should have a higher volume

Attenuated high frequencies on vocals are the most prominent feature here. Everything else seems quite well balanced but this EQ is making the mix dirty and therefore it's not a desirable effect. Fair mix
the vocal sound is a little bit vague
underwater
Guitar/bass instruments sound "fragile" / dampened and fuzzy. Sounds like listening through a radio
Bad, unnatural midrange, sounds like an mp3
doesn't sounds clear.  very poor mastering
channel balance is kind of weird
Low-pass filtered. Lost of definition. Feels like a highly compressed (in the audio coding sense) version.
Tight drums + bass.  The guitars are placed around it nicely.  Maybe the vocals have a bit too much effect[s] for this sound.  Further I quite liked this mix and balance.
evaluations.original:
Strakke drums + bas. De gitaren worden daar mooi rond geplaatst. De stemmen hebben dan misschien iets te veel
effect voor in deze sound. Ik kon me verder wel vinden in de mix en balans.

evaluations.comment: voice is too much present. it sounds much more than the instruments. moreover i can't barely listen the guitar. I can hear the echoes of the singer in the room

The voice sticks out above the mix a lot, it's masking the guitars almost completely.  In the chorus everything disappears except for voice and drums, the musical [aspect] disappears almost, that's a shame.
evaluations.original:
De stem steekt wel enorm uit boven de mix, hij camoufleert de gitaren bijna volledig.
In het refrein valt alles weg buiten stem en drum, het muzikale verdwijnt bijna, dat is wel jammer.

evaluations.comment: vocal is harsh

Not a lot of low mid.  The guitars really lose their body because of this.  These guitars almost seem like DI signals,  something filtered out in 2-5 kHz as well?  This mix fills the frequency spectrum in the lows and highs better than in the lows (?) A lot of delay! The chorus are a bit too loud in the chorus,  but they sound quite nice though.
evaluations.original:
-Weinig laag-mid. De gitaren verliezen daardoor echt hun body. Deze gitaren lijken bijna DI-signalen, ook iets te veel weggefilterd tussen 2-5kHz?.
-Deze mix vult het frequentiespectrum.in het laag en het hoog wel beter uit vergeleken met het laag.
-Veel delay!
-Die keys in het refrein staan eigenlijk iets luid, maar ze klinken best tof.

evaluations.comment: The vocal jumps out a bit.  In itself I think the balance between the instruments is quite alright,  but the vocal really floats above it.  Sounds very live.
evaluations.original: De vocal springt er wel wat uit. Op zich vind ik de balans tussen de instrumenten wel oké, maar de vocal zweeft er echt over. Klinkt super live.

evaluations.comment: Time has been spent on this mix,  with a lots of effects and [...] vocals pushing the rest to the back.  Guitars aren't audible at all anymore.  A bad mix in my opinion.
evaluations.original: Er is wel tijd gestoken in deze mix, met heel veel effecten en heel vocalen die de rest naar achteren duwen. gitaren zijn helemaal niet meer hoorbaar. ik vind het een slechte mix

evaluations.comment: Maybe a bit too much vocal.  Guitars disappear towards the chorus.  Quite a lot of reverb (too large space).  Sound is alright.
evaluations.original: Misschien wat te veel vocal. Gitaren verdwijnen naar het refrein toe. Wat veel reverb (te grote ruimte). Sound zit wel goed

evaluations.comment: This mix completely relies on delay and vocal in the atmospheric voices,  but in the choruses more tangible elements are expected.  Among others the guitars are so quiet that energy and harmonic information is not present.
evaluations.original:
Deze mix steunt in de sfeervolle verses volledig op de delay en stem, maar in de refreinen verwacht je toch meet tastbare elementen.
Ondermeer de gitaren zijn zo stil geplaatst dat de energie en harminische informatie ontbreekt.  
in mono behoudt het geheel zijn sfeer omwille van de delay op de stam, maar verliest de mix wel wat van zijn kracht en valt vooral het gebrek aan bas en gitaren op.

evaluations.comment: This mix contains a lot of vocal, it's quite loud.  I'm missing some guitar at times.  The tambourine is quite loud wrt the rest of the drums.  I'm missing energy in the drums and the whole song.  It's not very cohesive/'together' in my opinion.  I think the sound of the guitar in the chorus is quite nice though.  I like that the vocal isn't so dry,  but it's a bit too much.
evaluations.original:
In deze mix zit vrij veel stem, staat vrij luid. Ik mis soms wat gitaar.
De tamboerijn staat vrij luid tov de rest van de drums. Ik mis energie in de drums en de hele song. Het zit niet zo goed samen naar mijn mening. Ik vind de sound van het gitaartje in het refrein wel mooi. Ik vind het wel fijn dat de stem niet zo droog
is, maar het is een beetje te veel van het goede.

evaluations.comment: really impressive echo and reverberate effect on this track, but i think it too much
Mix sounds a bit thin.
Bit too bass-heavy, guitar barely audible, vocals seem to artificial
Too much reverb and the vocals are too predominant. Too much air/HF on the hi-hat which is too loud, tiring for the ears. Weird delay on the vocals in the chorus.
The voice is too loud,  drums  and bass are lacking, especially in the chorus.  If the vocal were less loud, a lot would be solved.
evaluations.original: De zang staat te luid, er mist drums en bas, vooral in het refrein. als de zang minder luid zou staan zou er al veel opgelost zijn.

evaluations.comment: Little guitar,  a lot of vocals with a rather ugly EQ,  quite open though.  A gap in the low mids.
evaluations.original: Weinig gitaar , veel vocals met niet zo mooie EQ , wel open. Een gat in het laagmid.

evaluations.comment: dreamy, edgy at high, voice far too prominent and screaming - rough
Too much vocal,  not enough guitar,  exaggerated effect in the choruses
evaluations.original: te veel stem te weinig gitaar, overdreven effect tijdens de refreinen

evaluations.comment: too much on the reverb
A lot of vocals  and effects.
evaluations.original: veel zang en effects

evaluations.comment: Vocals are clearly too loud and the space design used here therefore seems too much too. Although it could be due to everything else being so quiet. The rest of the mix is being severely affected when vocals are in and even if they were mixed well vocals is affecting what we hear a lot negatively
Too much reverb. Bass isn't very well defined. Neither is the kick.
Vocals are too present compared to the instrumental behind
Snare has a better place in the mix, more a part of the rest of the drum kit.  Better pulse which support the vocal more as well.
evaluations.original: Snare heeft een betere plaats in de mix, sluit mer aan bij de rest van de drumkit. Betere puls die ook de stem meer gaat ondersteunen.

evaluations.comment: The voice has too much reverber and it has a too much higher volume compared to the other instruments
Balance between instrumental and vocals completely wrong. Vocals far too loud. Spatial balance good though. Nice sense of space
Where is the band? It is vocals only, in  a pool of reverb
Sounds like i solo'd the vocal reverb track...
Sounds very nasal, a bit weird, can be due to the listening environment during mixing (earbuds, headphones, monitors, …).  Nice balance wise,  a bit dry though.
evaluations.original: Het klinkt heel nasaal, een beetje raar, kan te maken hebben met de manier van afluisteren tijdens het maken van de mix (oortjes, koptelefoon, monitors, ...). Balansgewijs wel tof, een beetje droog nog wel .

evaluations.comment: Not a lot of low,  not a lot of high. Drums are not in their place at all, way too quiet. Guitars are too loud in the verses. Balance is better in the choruses. In general this mix works pretty well.
evaluations.original:
-Weinig hoog, weinig laag. 
-De drums zitten echt niet op hun plaats, ze zijn veel te stil.
-Gitaren zitten te luid in de verses.
-Balans is in de refreinen beter. Over het algemeen klopt deze mix best wel.

evaluations.comment: Completely different mix,  guitar obviously more to the front.  A bit of a singer songwriter way of thinking.  Also a shaker which are reminiscent of a sixties production.
evaluations.original: Totaal andere mix, gitaar duidelijk naar de voorgrond. Beetje een singer songwriter denkwijze. Ook de shaker doet denk aan een jaren '60 productie.

evaluations.comment: I'm hearing a lot of vocals.  A bit less guitars.  And drums somewhere in the back completely.  It lacks definition.  I'm also not hearing effects, unfortunately.
evaluations.original:
Ik hoor heel veel zang. iets minder gitaren. en ergens helemaal van achter drums. er zit weinig definitie in. Ook hoor
ik jammer genoeg geen effecten.

evaluations.comment: Sounds muddy
The balance is okay,  but the guitars and vocals are bit too much on top of each other.  A lot in the 800-2.5k area.
evaluations.original: De balans is wel oké, enkel zitten de gitaren en de stemmen iets te veel op elkaar. Veel in het 800-2.5k gebied

evaluations.comment: Lacking a bit of drums  (way too little toms)
evaluations.original: iets te weinig drum (veel te weinig toms)

evaluations.comment: This mix could be more bright perhaps.  The drums don't contribute enough energy the way they are right now.  Sounds quite dry as it is, and I'm missing a bit of punch in the drums.
evaluations.original:
Deze mix zou misschien wat brighter mogen. De drums brengen naar mijn mening niet genoeg energie bij
zoals ze nu zijn. Het klinkt op zich ook vrij droog, en ik mis wat punch in de drums.

evaluations.comment: "Old tape" mix?
Doesn't get very clear until the vocal vocal bursts through. Guitar hard to hear correctly.
Sounds quite lofi.
evaluations.original: klinkt vrij LoFi

evaluations.comment: Not a lot of body.  Vocal disappears a bit in the mix.  Quite dry.
evaluations.original: Weinig body, Vocal verdwijnt wat in de mix. Redelijk droog

evaluations.comment: the vocal sound is too vague, and it sounds like lack of some harmonies.

Guitars sound a bit messy sometimes,  but are quite audible.  The voice is not very intelligible at the start.  In the chorus the voice comes in quite brutally, it's too loud. I don't like this.  The voice isn't deep enough in the mix in the chorus.  I'm missing a bit of sub  and cymbals.  The balance of the drums isn't quite right.  Cymbals and toms are too quite with respect to the kick and snare.  Balance could certainly be better.
evaluations.original: Gitaren klinken soms wat rommelig, maar zijn wel goed hoorbaar. Stem is op het begin niet zo goed verstaanbaar. In het refrein komt de stem vrij brutaal in, staat te luid. Dit vind ik niet mooi. De stem zit niet diep genoeg in de mix in het refrein. Ik mis een klein beetje sub en cymbalen. Balans van de drum klopt niet helemaal. Cymbalen en toms staan te stil tov de kick en de snare. Balans kan sowieso beter.

evaluations.comment: Everything is too compressed, there is lack of dynamics, and it is too filtered, in particular low frequencies are too filtered
Way too little drums.  The guitars are at the front but don't sound right,  not clear.  The vocal could sound clear as well  with more effects on it.
evaluations.original:
Veel te weinig drums. De gitaren staan veel op de voorgrond maar klinken niet lekker, niet helder. De zang zou ook
helderder mogen klinken met meer effect op.

evaluations.comment: Tinny with no bottom end...
too much cutting -

Attenuated frequencies at low and high end and mix centred around mid frequencies.Low level of excitement. Some grouping seems to happen between guitar and drums as the guitar sound seems to be cancelling the drums in the beginning.

Little focus in balance choices: I don't know what to listen to...  While in the verse the vocals are rather unintelligible (which doesn't bode well for the emotion and is somewhat frustrating),  they become suddenly loud in the chorus.  The choice of the snare sound is quite interesting,  but it's too quiet to play its role as anchor point.  In mono the mix loses a lot of its strength  and the weird balance choices are more apparent.
evaluations.original:
De mix kent weinig focus in zijn balanskeuzes: ik weet niet waar ik moet naar luisteren...
Waar in de verse de stemmen weinig verstaanbaar zijn (wat de emotie niet ten goede komt en enigszins frustrerend is),
worden ze in het refrein plots luid geplaatst.
De keuze van de snare sound in erg interessant, maar staat te stil om zijn rol als ankerpunt te vervullen.
in mono verliest de mix veel van zijn kracht en komen de vreemde balanskeuzes nog beter tot uiting

evaluations.comment: guitar and drum is weird
sounds like everything is mixed from just 1 mic (singer's mic)
Vocals too low. Guitar too loud. Generally very poor balance.
The whole mix sounds very lo-fi, as if it was played over an old telephone or a radio. Otherwise the instruments are relatively well balanced
No bottom end, no high end. All midrange. Vocals are hidden behind the too-loud guitars
Overall very middy. Lacking bass and highs. Guitars are nice. Drums have no energy at all, no kick and snare is muted. Vocals very dry and stand out, though don't bed well.
The vocals and actually everything is too narrow (EQ). Guitars too loud. Not bad chorus though. Good presence. Panning could be a bit more used to spread things a bit more.
A lot of guitar,  weird EQ especially in the mid which makes it sounds like it was put through a radio.
evaluations.original: Veel gitaar, vreemde EQ vooral in mid waardoor het door een radio klinkt.

evaluations.comment: Drums are too proeminet. The mix is too strident. Lacks body.
evaluations.original: Bateria bem presente. Mistura demasiado estridente. Sem corpo.

evaluations.comment: Vocals stand out too much and are too dry. Tambourine is too loud and steals attention from the remaining elements. The bass is not present enough. I miss the backing vocals that grab the song between verses.
evaluations.original: Voz demasiado destacada e seca. Pandeireta demasiado alta rouba a atenção dos restantes elementos. Baixo pouco presente. Sinto falta das vozes secundárias que agarram a música entre versos.

evaluations.comment: Guitars are too bright, without low end at all, sound to thin. The vocal is quite thin also. The bass is a bit low, needs a bit mor roundness. The drums seem to have a bit too much room when the snare hits.

The bass frequencies are completely missing. Sounds like a bad-quality stream. Despite this, in what general balance is considered, it is interesting. Excessive pianos in the chorus. The vocal lines could have been worked more cerefully (reverb and gain automation in the pre-chorus).
evaluations.original: Falta completa das frequências graves. Soa como um streaming de má qualidade. Apesar disso, com relação ao balanço geral, me parece interessante. Falta presença do baixo. Apresenta excesso de pianos no refrão. Falta melhor trabalho nas linhas de voz (reverb e automação de ganho nas partes que antecedem o refrãO).

evaluations.comment: Excessive mid and high range. Kick almost can't be felt. The snare lacks in low-mid-range. Vocals [sic]
evaluations.original: excesso de médios e agudos; kick quase sem se sentir; tarola com pouco médio grave; voz

evaluations.comment: Excessive proeminence of the main vocal fir this type of mix, yet the internal balance of the vocal group, and the instrument group, when considered separatelly is well balanced. They are not balanced with each other though.
evaluations.original: Presença excessiva da voz principal para essa mistura, porém apresenta bom balanço no grupo VOZ e no grupo INSTRUMENTOS. Falta aplicação de balanço entre esses 2 grupos.

evaluations.comment: Vocals are too loud and separate from the mix.
evaluations.original: Voz demasiado alta e separada da mistura.

evaluations.comment: The lead vocal has too much mid-range, it sounds muffled. Tambourine is too loud. A better balance between keyboards and guitar during the verse might help getting a fuller sound. The snare drum is too buried.
evaluations.original: Voz com demasiados médios, soa demasiado abafada. Pandeireta demasiado alta. Um equilibrio maior entre guitarra e teclas durante o verso talvez ajudasse para um som mais cheio. Tarola muito escondida.

evaluations.comment: The vocals are too boxy, this eq is bad! The back vocals/choir seem ok. The drums need more brightness.  Tamborine should be a panned (in my opinion). Guitars seem ok.
Mix too feeble. Bass lacks presence. Guitar clashes with main vocals. Tambourine too loud.
evaluations.original: mistura muito fraca; baixo sem presença, guitarra a chocar com a voz principal, Tamborine alto demais

evaluations.comment: Mix is too muffled. The keyboards are too proeminent.
evaluations.original: Mistura um pouco abafada. Teclas demasiado presentes.

evaluations.comment: Mix is more balanced. However the bass guitar should be eq'ed in a way that would make it more defined.
evaluations.original: mistura mais equilibrada, no entanto o baixo deveria estar equalizado de forma a estar mais definido

evaluations.comment: Vocal is too low and needs a little less reverb.Keyboards are too loud, causing some pumping effect. Drums seem to be in the right place. Guitars seem ok. Keys sometimes cover the voice up.
Vocals too muffled and faint. One hears too much the reverb tail on the vocals. Keyboards may be a little too loud compared to the guitar.
evaluations.original: Voz demasiado abafada e baixa. Ouve-se demasiado o fim do reverb na voz. Teclados talvez um bocado altos em relação à guitarra.

evaluations.comment: Excessive vocals, pianos and background vocals in the chorus. Drums are not proeminent enough (with the exception of the overheads). Additional work needed in EQing and compressing the mix bus to generate additional weight and strength in the mid and low-range. The vocals would need more brigthness and reverb.
evaluations.original: Excesso de voz, pianos e backing vocals no refrão. Falta presença da bateria (com excessão dos overheads). Falta trabalho de equalização e compressão da Mix Output para gerar mais peso e força nos médio e graves. Falta brilho e reverb na voz.

evaluations.comment: The center becomes too empty when the vocal panning is done to right and left. Panning should be less extreme. Vocals too faint during the first part of the song. Snare drum disappears on the second part of the song.
evaluations.original: O centro torna-se demasiado vazio quando a panorâmica das vozes é feita para a direita e para a esquerda. Panorâmica deveria ser menos extrema. Voz demasiado baixa durante a primeira parte da música. Tarola desaparece na segunda parte da música.

evaluations.comment: I feel the option to put the vocals further back was good, yet slightly exagerated. The bass is good and so are the guitars. The kick could be more present.
evaluations.original: parece-me que a opção de afastar as vozes foi boa, mas um pouco exagerada, o baixo está bem e as guitarras também. a bateria poderia estar com o kick mais presente

evaluations.comment: Reverb is too apparent on the sibillant content of the vocals. Drums lack defenition.
evaluations.original: O reverb sente-se nas sibilantes. Bateria sem definição.

evaluations.comment: Lousy application of vocals throughout the song. The two voclas are excessively present as the present too wide panning. The additional elements, especially the drums, are too subdued, lacking in colour and brightness. The dynamics between bass guitars is insufficient [sic]. It also lacks in low-end and "pick". The guitars should have been EQed and compressed. Excessive panning in the guitars.
evaluations.original: Péssima aplicação de vozes em toda a faixa. Excesso de presença dos dois vocais pois apresentam panorâmicas demasiadamente elevadas. vocal1 - left / vocal2 - right. Demais elementos, principalmente a bateria, muito suprimidos, sem cor e brilho. Dinâmica entre guitarras baixos insuficiente. Falta graves e " pick" no baixo. Falta equalização e compressão na guitarra. Excesso de pans nas guitarras.

evaluations.comment: What is happening to these vocals? This mix just seems to have no center. What is going on here? Very creative mix indeed. Terrible balance.
